# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=842%2E791427%2ERFL8qv)

$1. That's the contribution that Ilhan Omar is asking you to make today.
No, that's not a typo. $1 is all we ask.
$1 to ensure our campaign has the resources to take on the right wing and their billionaire-funded super PACs this year.
$1 to send an unmistakable message to the wealthy and powerful special interests who want nothing more than to see our movement fail.
$1 because it's _never_ just your dollar.
When all of us are chipping in and doing our part, $1 quickly becomes $2. Then $2 becomes $5, $5 becomes $25, and pretty soon, our movement is stronger than anything our opponents can throw at us.
By the time you reach this part of the email, someone else is making their $1 contribution. Now they're counting on you to add yours. So please:
**[Can Ilhan count on you to chip in your first $1 contribution today? Each and every contribution — no matter the amount — all adds up.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan24.NN5r_X&refcode=em240107-1-t2&t=2&akid=842%2E791427%2ERFL8qv)

We know you are busy, but we wanted to reach out to our top supporters to discuss the state of the race and recap our polling numbers for 2023!

**[Our momentum throughout the year continued to grow, and we are forever grateful for your continued support!](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=6e1fd31df1cf4a4ca97da62062510e09&_e=uOJyDfkjNn9oQWlKEGVUhbwftPdFtAN70PAVObawbT7xIu4vfskou7JmxsUBOvrUk5RwYVlmdA9OPHcZeSsyV_W8bq6vxAC6PET5Eu78gMBamhFvn4uT2U19PuG2Q6vVbzuklrFIW6XApgPbCIRxJkvUPkduCJuzpDzl9AZcYYknZ5ZqOQHdbPUJpn4Kj2dZAg6B4C6K5VmpvtrK7juvTj1E4PklWJ1l-ZGu9Xs0kDRQs4fGcJ8q1tgqM_QkGh1kFxhqlOQy2WuKIROS3FYLp6xtnDU3WlgRffZuZqGgePRCkq5oyc_OF-URr73Cgzil)**

**[Matt Dolan is THE TOP GOP candidate. He is polling the highest OF ALL GOP Candidates in the Ohio Primary for the US Senate seat and now leads Sherrod Brown, according to the latest Emerson poll.](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=6e1fd31df1cf4a4ca97da62062510e09&_e=uOJyDfkjNn9oQWlKEGVUhbwftPdFtAN70PAVObawbT7xIu4vfskou7JmxsUBOvrUk5RwYVlmdA9OPHcZeSsyV_W8bq6vxAC6PET5Eu78gMBamhFvn4uT2U19PuG2Q6vVbzuklrFIW6XApgPbCIRxJkvUPkduCJuzpDzl9AZcYYkw_WDQAf5HEmhRGljyH2oop-Lhga59g7NiJ1UdFV0JjA9IYmi5b6qARGtfGBV3xrePUplf_MvolMf2W-i4umBHDZaTypbX1q-Vic4d6ORAr9ayCcO9-x2o8_vvTKp3P5XhU062HA3jsZmyFJVTDlte)**

Our opponents only come out ahead when they pay for the polls themselves. This race has a high number of undecideds, but with Matt's track record and strong Conservative principles, we know we'll come out on top.

**[In the latest poll released on October 10th, we are ahead of our Democrat opponent, Sherrod Brown, by two points.](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=6e1fd31df1cf4a4ca97da62062510e09&_e=uOJyDfkjNn9oQWlKEGVUhbwftPdFtAN70PAVObawbT7xIu4vfskou7JmxsUBOvrUk5RwYVlmdA9OPHcZeSsyV_W8bq6vxAC6PET5Eu78gMBamhFvn4uT2U19PuG2Q6vVbzuklrFIW6XApgPbCIRxJkvUPkduCJuzpDzl9AZcYYkJP90Xj8l9QS3vjQBZLI5Ljli3aQ_3EKlO_SG92ddvzq_JqwPGrv1kM2YKzEnAIdWkvPhYujzdfOipFHMUN4oB4lMivmDRS8gqBls8BPjgLqotBD07dR8YUNVcuL-gebGq6Z41TiAjvLiEtiDr_oSU)** [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=6e1fd31df1cf4a4ca97da62062510e09&_e=uOJyDfkjNn9oQWlKEGVUhbwftPdFtAN70PAVObawbT7xIu4vfskou7JmxsUBOvrUk5RwYVlmdA9OPHcZeSsyV_W8bq6vxAC6PET5Eu78gMBamhFvn4uT2U19PuG2Q6vVbzuklrFIW6XApgPbCIRxJkvUPkduCJuzpDzl9AZcYYnrCRiGQ92tF61kpimigve2zt0jVOmDp4H7ZFApPhlL1rmYovFyvF72Hi2xdUpAVqi2C-FplODQ7KVwmruOs0VroDY4osxmpGLXnqs7Assn198XBNTJMGXNAukP9Sbu91zfZBhcZqwB-jUriszB--E7)
An earlier poll still had Matt Dolan as the most formidable opponent for Sherrod Brown in 2024, with Dolan within striking distance.

[](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=6e1fd31df1cf4a4ca97da62062510e09&_e=uOJyDfkjNn9oQWlKEGVUhbwftPdFtAN70PAVObawbT7xIu4vfskou7JmxsUBOvrUk5RwYVlmdA9OPHcZeSsyV_W8bq6vxAC6PET5Eu78gMBamhFvn4uT2U19PuG2Q6vVbzuklrFIW6XApgPbCIRxJkvUPkduCJuzpDzl9AZcYYn3ipu3YFFlqkvpEHAIXVt5gX7xzaPoKJ8bYlTtaLHBO0I70-wM7Q9FxoIrh4gc4Buw-H6FSAHrxLCTXYG5D5qJ0wVQZz_sSOSYKwN4nTCAntCh0IT2W2VSe15Fj3TYQhGjDoJfS_ERjJQoD3u81aMZ)
**Simply put, these poll numbers could change at a moment's notice, but it 's clear we're the best-positioned candidate to win. We are coming down the final stretch.**

**_With the most resources and grassroots supporters of any candidate in the field, we know we have what it takes to win this race. We cannot take our foot off the gas._**

**[In order to stay ahead in the campaign and stay strong in the March primary, we need each of our supporters to chip in $15 or any amount TODAY.](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=6e1fd31df1cf4a4ca97da62062510e09&_e=uOJyDfkjNn9oQWlKEGVUhbwftPdFtAN70PAVObawbT7xIu4vfskou7JmxsUBOvrUk5RwYVlmdA9OPHcZeSsyV_W8bq6vxAC6PET5Eu78gMBamhFvn4uT2U19PuG2Q6vVbzuklrFIW6XApgPbCIRxJuI0VgyCk77rgZkVrAEuxM2N_1JN8TtjkpAnwXhHfaT4hmk43FuHdiBrqzCieeMT_Dwqn3h3-qJYz1bHbt62q2WXvv7iZmmXOJp-IkAN0r_t9mjt63iiE153gtURnQqmJEHnVomBoo6ETQcRBHFUzMwSUk39BgzWFVscMYQL_Bqp)**

Peter, if we come up short, we risk falling behind our radical opponents. Larose and Moreno have NO SHOT against Sherrod Brown in the general election.

**[We're counting on you. If you want to FLIP OHIO RED and REGAIN THE U.S. SENATE MAJORITY IN 2024, act now.](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=6e1fd31df1cf4a4ca97da62062510e09&_e=uOJyDfkjNn9oQWlKEGVUhbwftPdFtAN70PAVObawbT7xIu4vfskou7JmxsUBOvrUk5RwYVlmdA9OPHcZeSsyV_W8bq6vxAC6PET5Eu78gMBamhFvn4uT2U19PuG2Q6vVbzuklrFIW6XApgPbCIRxJkvUPkduCJuzpDzl9AZcYYmKODYnR36eyZWaDcJV4-b4XGSgJ7wEPYDl9jseeMm5yhrcBhJMq-d0Xv81IghWNJmHDY6CL0oYC_q1NfseIim8zBbX6VWzfFiE_1pHZHkv4cqXg9qB7Cv_6YdmOJGjEGiHu1WvzYGarSXm1NY5FbM-)**

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Decorating our new headquarters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=997%2E135344%2E5hMYRS)

We have some exciting news: Team Slotkin has officially moved into our new campaign headquarters! We have less than ten months until the election, and we are full speed ahead on growing our team and putting in the work to reach voters.
Now that we’re all moved in, we need some help decorating our space – which is where you come in. You see this wall below? Our plan is to fill it up with the names of all of our recurring donors: what we are calling “Slotkin Sustainers”. These are those small-dollar donors who help power our campaign by chipping in month after month with a recurring donation.
[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.7ZaLga&refcode=em240107-1-30&t=2&akid=997%2E135344%2E5hMYRS)
**[Become a Slotkin Sustainer >](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.7ZaLga&refcode=em240107-1-30&t=3&akid=997%2E135344%2E5hMYRS)**
With ten months until Election Day, we will soon launch a robust field program, air TV ads, and begin talking to voters on digital ads. That means mapping out month after month what we need to raise – and spend – in order to be able to afford the critical investments we need to win.
Recurring contributions are especially helpful in that effort, because they help us predict our cash flow through Election Day – and decide when we can scale up our operation. Being able to count on a few dollars a month from a bunch of people helps us make the strategic decisions we need to win this race.
[**So, here’s where we ask: Will you make a commitment as a Slotkin Sustainer to chip in even $1 a month until Election Day? Doing so will help us build a winning campaign, and we’ll add your name to our Recurring Donor wall in the office!](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1960?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.7ZaLga&refcode=em240107-1-30&t=4&akid=997%2E135344%2E5hMYRS)**
| | **[Donate $5 MONTHLY](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/1961?c0=ebs-em-jan24-monthly.JbWbbE&c1=em240107-1-30.m_6bMO&t=5&akid=997%2E135344%2E5hMYRS)**

****

**TODAY'S HEADLINE**
---
Nikki Haley called the police on journalist Laura Loomer due to Loomer's presence at her Iowa Town Hall on Saturday. During the question and answer segment of Haley's town hall, Loomer had planned to ask Haley about her alleged affairs and SFA PAC, a super PAC supporting Haley, accepting a donation from Epstein associate Reid Hoffman. Haley's removal of a journalist is a tactic straight from the DNC playbook. This should come as no surprise as Haley has been courting Democrat global elite donors and encouraging Democrats to vote for her in the GOP Primary.

subject: Just $5.80

body:
| Every day, I’m working to deliver results on the issues Californians care most about — including lowering the cost of health care, holding bad actors accountable, leveling the playing field for hardworking families, and defending our democracy.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=4998%2E5257348%2E-_GU4f)
Derek,
Today is a special day on our campaign: We are officially 58 days out from the March 5 Jungle Primary.
**58 days to win all 58 counties in California — and in less than four weeks folks will begin to get their ballots in the mail.**
California’s elections aren’t like most across the country. There is no _Democratic primary_ and _Republican primary_. There is one primary election for candidates from all parties, and only the top two finishers advance to the general election in November.
On top of that, we’re on the ballot _twice_ — for a special primary election to complete the remainder of Sen. Feinstein’s term, and a regular primary election for the full six-year term that will follow it. **And with a GOP candidate surging in the polls, now is the most critical time yet for our campaign.**
**[I’m running against over 30 declared candidates, and with time running out to reach voters, I’m asking you to chip in $5.80 or any amount to help us win. It’s crunch time.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3424?c0=jan2024_abs_em.qfp_F5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240107_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=4998%2E5257348%2E-_GU4f)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [EXPRESS DONATE $5.80](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2846?c0=jan2024_abs_em.5XV-iM&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240107_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4998%2E5257348%2E-_GU4f)

---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=jan2024_abs_em.0AdxjZ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240107_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=4998%2E5257348%2E-_GU4f)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=jan2024_abs_em.VHS4F-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240107_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=4998%2E5257348%2E-_GU4f)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=jan2024_abs_em.LcS_Pn&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240107_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=9&akid=4998%2E5257348%2E-_GU4f)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240107_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=10&akid=4998%2E5257348%2E-_GU4f)
---
I entered this U.S. Senate race because I believe the people of California deserve a fighter. Someone who’s not afraid to step up to take on the bullies and the tough fights. Someone with a proven record of getting results. Someone effective.
That’s exactly what I’ve spent my career doing.
When corporations were destroying our environment and smuggling toxic chemicals into Mexico from California, I took them to court — and we won.
I helped bring people together in the California Senate to update school textbooks and expand the Metro Gold Line to improve public transportation. I brought people together in Congress to expand access to affordable health care.
I held Donald Trump accountable as the lead impeachment manager in his first Senate trial, securing the first bipartisan indictment vote in history.
And every day, I’m working to deliver results on the issues Californians care most about — including lowering the cost of health care, building more affordable housing, leveling the playing field for hardworking families, and defending our democracy.
**We are in an existential fight for the rule of law. I’m ready to be a fearless fighter in the Senate to protect the country we love for generations to come.**
**[Derek, will you rush in just $5.80 to help my campaign reach voters across all of California’s 58 counties in these final 58 days? Just a few votes could determine the outcome of this election.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/3424?c0=jan2024_abs_em.qfp_F5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240107_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=4998%2E5257348%2E-_GU4f)**

**She’s asking the Democrat judge to unilaterally force me to pay $370 MILLION and to _BAN_ _ME_ ___FOR_ _LIFE_ from practicing real estate in the state I helped build.**

Team,

It’s hard to believe, but it’s officially the election year! Things are certainly ramping up for our campaign on the ground, but**I’m never going to lose sight of what’s important in this race: you.**

Raising a family of my own, I know the unique challenges Oregon families face these days. It feels harder and harder to get ahead.

**So as we kick off this new year, I’m hoping to get your feedback:**

[**We want to hear from supporters like you. What issues are most important to you as you think about the 2024 election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76672269/448129018/-2010322972?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWM0ODIyNzUtYmRhZC1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=AImAVcxoy3_YdYtaWOOuDERpCIWFyiAzp9v4cKQ78g4=&emci=0508853f-79ad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=ec482275-bdad-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=14434323)

From lowering the cost of prescription drugs to protecting abortion rights, building more affordable housing to taking on the climate crisis – my community has always come first for me.

This is a grassroots movement and as a member of our team, your input is highly valued.

[**I’m running for Congress so I can deliver for you, and the only way to know what issues matter most is with your input. _Janelle_

**Janelle Bynum is running to represent Oregon's Fifth Congressional District. With a reputation as a tireless champion for real progress, Janelle has worked in the State Legislature to safeguard our rights, lower costs, and create pathways to success for the next generation.

subject: 40 FBI Informants
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Comer for Congress**
body:
In the Biden Family
|
---
| [ ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ef549abee2fe40daa50ad87b867a8658&_e=hmGgtdHjCSpu9fLS_HHMXtoP-bnf50aRkRpevvNOLvqUk-tMzXF0jcysnlkDMQe2cdg3sD6FEEXbpwcqz0X0h74talY0oDi9WrCW5I0v43iQqghLB-gZ9KmOnO0HgBdWHm6acD5XC5eWGR_bqQKE4-aumJ61TAzocZwbLFUwB0ijPLZBBnHP999EtyF8AdrYer61sLPZNmSRrybbIzCLzIL_Uwid66H5o-4eepy70dTtANGvO5hpr528_epPzPeVk3hf6-oOU3x-e_NMATv9IoaJJtR6X2Y0ToU49VZpCDEruSSwJ2oi0MW07ESjrIUi9Q0G9UWdh_2RLNHMtnsiBGfNRdzK62fFrseJiBVzLJlguVBC3SeLc-jwG1JfVTtQ)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ef549abee2fe40daa50ad87b867a8658&_e=hmGgtdHjCSpu9fLS_HHMXtoP-bnf50aRkRpevvNOLvqUk-tMzXF0jcysnlkDMQe2cdg3sD6FEEXbpwcqz0X0h74talY0oDi9WrCW5I0v43iQqghLB-gZ9KmOnO0HgBdWHm6acD5XC5eWGR_bqQKE4-aumJ61TAzocZwbLFUwB0ijPLZBBnHP999EtyF8AdrYer61sLPZNmSRrybbIzCLzIL_Uwid66H5o-4eepy70dTHZyuUaxb6Bzb-J8rcrcsp-yAPhXwxqCGRPGiwrwsfYi_SuzEnCtnfUW0yNq3qOQDtIA-HQeOCqIxNdxh0n2G7_hUWrtMfY4FYNNKjlC-uVKzoPXZ39Dt1h4uKcG1a4ZLPBvQW9Bxsew6cDvtJJzEJ)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ef549abee2fe40daa50ad87b867a8658&_e=hmGgtdHjCSpu9fLS_HHMXtoP-bnf50aRkRpevvNOLvqUk-tMzXF0jcysnlkDMQe2cdg3sD6FEEXbpwcqz0X0h74talY0oDi9WrCW5I0v43iQqghLB-gZ9KmOnO0HgBdWHm6acD5XC5eWGR_bqQKE4-aumJ61TAzocZwbLFUwB0ijPLZBBnHP999EtyF8AdrYer61sLPZNmSRrybbIzCLzIL_Uwid66H5o-4eepy70dQLGpngshGpbFhPuXkseTwuSkvShMi_Kv-6lMoou7JlzWyWAK8GXZwTqqyASY3zaSl9rSehzDPbkmsjNfJAgr6R5FTuUDOMYShUA53-s-ynRutABCDR3uJyR5LC7bHczsqcIQLU4O14Lr70AyyoZZZN)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ef549abee2fe40daa50ad87b867a8658&_e=hmGgtdHjCSpu9fLS_HHMXtoP-bnf50aRkRpevvNOLvqUk-tMzXF0jcysnlkDMQe2cdg3sD6FEEXbpwcqz0X0h74talY0oDi9WrCW5I0v43iQqghLB-gZ9KmOnO0HgBdWHm6acD5XC5eWGR_bqQKE4-aumJ61TAzocZwbLFUwB0ijPLZBBnHP999EtyF8AdrYer61sLPZNmSRrybbIzCLzIL_Uwid66H5o-4eepy70dRptiH1Sn23dzKMXxrGM3td7MUjb2cyuWAD6vamM3qm3Q9fr72Yg51IZ8ow9lTQ11Kra6AltIsfOs1kqKZ7PHud6UbC0XJqx6LK4aJ789qKcECJ5zADuF5fdlSuCKfbRMJv6omU52y7m3tqRhMcxlP4)

_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee

name: Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson
subject: I Almost Gave Up!
body:
Yesterday, I shared a little about how I started my political journey from a tumultuous divorce. The divorce was a tough time in
my life, but it helped me become who I am today.

[https://email.email.talkswithliz.com/c/eJxskT-P1DAUxD9N3F30_N8pXCAgSEgnHQVC0Kze2k5izlmb2GwEnx4lBbpi26fRzO_NuEv09ue3fSjD5-HLR_3M31_h66f6g3hrwKBTJFiqQSgtjaQkrBjTpf0pwTpcC8b59uZ2mCk5oNFKKjYZ5KAU95QPmpPFDqiZFxMGA-FqxGRoAO2vSlM1cdBIomXABFAwQEEA76_IFPVsEIxNfPLYCTjT-obpte6xLSn-7V1eSbJLa6V2_F3Hxo6NteUN59DPOc8pYIn1kHVsXOtcb37r2Miz8B9w1_V5-f7r5YXfR9YOQfAROzYqORjppOFeCCopuMlLLlXoy20mKZ_NPbIga2hL9hZLJJv1ZY8pxap0J2A-2Q_cmn9vLtjzmadY70973l7DRpp1eb08HKTZ0C7_S2_2QHiU_y8AAP__B8mVhw]

> Hey Peter,
>
> Yesterday, I shared a little about how I started my political journey from a tumultuous divorce. The divorce was a tough time in
> my life, but it helped me become who I am today. I found out I was more than an insurance professional during that divorce. I
> realized that as a mom I had become an advocate for children, parents and the people for which my voice was, and remains,
> needed.
>
> When I worked in the insurance industry, I heard many heart-wrenching stories. I spoke with widowed wives whose husbands
> couldn't afford health insurance and didn't have life insurance, so they were left with medical bills while providing for their
> children on one income. I also remember the man who couldn't earn a livable wage to feed his family. One story that stayed in my
> heart was about the sweet grandmother who lived alone and feared so much for her safety that she had a gun in every room of her
> house. Stories that made me realize that American society needed a change. Many American citizens desperately need someone to be
> there for them. We need someone to be our voice where we seldom have a voice.
>
> After moving to Georgia, I started taking on more roles to help make a difference. I became an elected officer, appointed board
> member, and committee chair for organizations such as a Regional Library Board, C.A.S.A. Board (Court Appointed Special
> Advocates for Children), Lions Club, Habitat for Humanity, and a school board zoning taskforce. I took these roles very
> seriously.
>
> I then wanted to properly position myself to do more and inform voters about every local and state elected seat, their roles,
> and how, as voters, that it was our responsibility to ensure elected individuals at every level work for the residents. As a
> result, I became a political leader serving at the county, district, and state committee levels of the Democratic Party of
> Georgia for over 20 years. I also served as one of six Democratic National Committee members representing Georgia after being
> elected by my state committee peers. I enjoyed serving in these roles yet knew I had more to achieve for families like yours and
> mine.
>
> So, in 2014, twenty years after my Florida bid for the same office, I made a bid for Georgia Insurance Commissioner. This time
> raising more than enough to be on the ballot then becoming among few women and even fewer women of color to gain a major party
> nomination for a statewide executive office! That November, I received over 1 million votes statewide, giving me a
> well-recognized name in Georgia politics.
>
> People have asked me how I can do all of these things, well for me it’s a necessity if I intend to become part of the solutions.
> It’s making the decision early on that I knew it was time to go all the way! So, in 2020, with 84% of the Democratic Primary
> votes, I came close to winning the U.S. House of Representatives seat in Georgia's 12th Congressional District. However,
> quitting was not an option. So, in 2022, I again became the Democratic Nominee on the General Election ballot for the U.S. House
> of Representatives in Georgia's 12th district.
>
> Now, just in time for the 2024 Election Season, I am running once again to become The People’s Representative in The People’s
> House from Georgia’s 12th District!
>
> I would love to share a short video from my 2022 run of my campaign journey over the years. I hope it inspires you to keep
> moving forward until you’ve exceeded your greatest expectations. clean_body: Yesterday, I shared a little about how I started my political journey from a tumultuous divorce. The divorce was a tough time in my life, but it helped me become who I am today. [] Hey Peter, Yesterday, I shared a little about how I started my political journey from a tumultuous divorce. The divorce was a tough time in my life, but it helped me become who I am today. I found out I was more than an insurance professional during that divorce. I realized that as a mom I had become an advocate for children, parents and the people for which my voice was, and remains, needed. When I worked in the insurance industry, I heard many heart-wrenching stories. I spoke with widowed wives whose husbands couldn't afford health insurance and didn't have life insurance, so they were left with medical bills while providing for their children on one income. I also remember the man who couldn't earn a livable wage to feed his family. One story that stayed in my heart was about the sweet grandmother who lived alone and feared so much for her safety that she had a gun in every room of her house. Stories that made me realize that American society needed a change. Many American citizens desperately need someone to be there for them. We need someone to be our voice where we seldom have a voice. After moving to Georgia, I started taking on more roles to help make a difference. I became an elected officer, appointed board member, and committee chair for organizations such as a Regional Library Board, C.A.S.A. Board (Court Appointed Special Advocates for Children), Lions Club, Habitat for Humanity, and a school board zoning taskforce. I took these roles very seriously. I then wanted to properly position myself to do more and inform voters about every local and state elected seat, their roles, and how, as voters, that it was our responsibility to ensure elected individuals at every level work for the residents. As a result, I became a political leader serving at the county, district, and state committee levels of the Democratic Party of Georgia for over 20 years. I also served as one of six Democratic National Committee members representing Georgia after being elected by my state committee peers. I enjoyed serving in these roles yet knew I had more to achieve for families like yours and mine. So, in 2014, twenty years after my Florida bid for the same office, I made a bid for Georgia Insurance Commissioner. This time raising more than enough to be on the ballot then becoming among few women and even fewer women of color to gain a major party nomination for a statewide executive office! That November, I received over 1 million votes statewide, giving me a well-recognized name in Georgia politics. People have asked me how I can do all of these things, well for me it’s a necessity if I intend to become part of the solutions. It’s making the decision early on that I knew it was time to go all the way! So, in 2020, with 84% of the Democratic Primary votes, I came close to winning the U.S. House of Representatives seat in Georgia's 12th Congressional District. However, quitting was not an option. So, in 2022, I again became the Democratic Nominee on the General Election ballot for the U.S. House of Representatives in Georgia's 12th district. Now, just in time for the 2024 Election Season, I am running once again to become The People’s Representative in The People’s House from Georgia’s 12th District! I would love to share a short video from my 2022 run of my campaign journey over the years. I hope it inspires you to keep moving forward until you’ve exceeded your greatest expectations. CLICK HERE [] to watch. I will tell you more about my campaign for a seat at the table in Congress for The People in GA12th and America tomorrow. I look forward to sharing more with you then. I will also share how you can join our Team Liz Johnson Volunteer Taskforce and continue supporting our campaign with your generous contributions. I’ll also share what happened when it all changed. With much gratitude, Elizabeth "Liz" Johnson Lizjohnsonforus.com [] $25 [] $50 [] $100 [] $250 [] $300 [] Other [] YOUR VOICE, YOUR SUPPORT, AND OUR FUTURES MATTER! THANK YOU IN ADVANCE FOR YOUR EARLY SUPPORT! [] [] [] [] [] [] [] [ ] Liz Johnson for Us 2024 P.O. BOX 1404 Statesboro, GA 30459 United States Want to change how you receive these emails? You can update your preferences [] or unsubscribe from this list []. [] []

subject: We can’t let a celebrity Republican push Katie out of this race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
We need Katie’s voice in Congress to continue standing up against corporations and special interests.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=35974%2E3422442%2E0-47Kj)
Derek, _we just saw this headline:_
_[
](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240107-2?refcode=EMAP24_2_HDL_20240107_V1_F&refcode2=35974_3422442_0-47Kj&akid=35974%2E3422442%2E0-47Kj)_We can’t let a celebrity Republican push Katie out of this race and then Congress. We need her voice in Washington to continue standing up against corporations and special interests and fighting for working people.
We’ll never try to guilt trip you into donating, Derek. We’re going to tell you like it is. And here’s the truth: CA has some of the most expensive media markets in the country, **so every dollar counts in our effort to reach voters and win this race.**
It’s critical we have the resources to fully fund our media plan and reach the voters who will decide the primary election on March 5th. **[Can Katie count on you to contribute any amount that is meaningful to you?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240107-2?refcode=EMAP24_2_HDL_20240107_V1_F&refcode2=35974_3422442_0-47Kj&akid=35974%2E3422442%2E0-47Kj)**

Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAP24_2_HDL_20240107_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=35974_3422442_0-47Kj&akid=35974%2E3422442%2E0-47Kj)**

Hey friend – Harry Dunn here. Yesterday, 3 years ago, I was defending the Capitol, the Constitution, the Members of Congress who you and I both may not agree with, and my own life from MAGA insurrectionists. **[Now, I’m announcing my campaign to serve as the next Congressman Maryland’s 3rd District.](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJipoJRPVplkwOEXrULo8pGCnjBVkpFrkbbkM121BLU-3VMEoWAKkoQGia9kOrxH_gsPzyCAwSN3-H_kP6IuB9gzg9Wx_bvgwn3QVpb5DWnAYvRNya-lTXt1TuK2r8Pb5lQ3-F-k72QBd42DFiMzQ77cW9M72yofNU85QQy6IZLOMBMnbF3BdMwPmkaynpNLRzPiU1UhbSkV-OB5LaZAqbG-2T_HYnqK7PtCg-GsY6qhRSvIFV4UzXcCZIpJM1eyiN/42t/EHgwWQ45QiiOAGgYeJAoLA/h1/4wf1zet3b1nWOD6OD842zy0NNW2Kz-lv8a5u5dwQDmo)** On January 6, 2021, we were inches from watching democracy crumble right before our eyes. It’s not an exaggeration to say that democracy is on the brink of extinction. We’re one administration from it. And if we lose it, we’ll never get it back. I refuse to stand by and watch. I’m prepared to fight to protect our rights, our fragile democracy – and to be honest, I’m prepared to win. In Congress, I’ll be one of the loudest voices defending democracy – but I need your help to get there. [**I’m humbly asking you to make a donation to my campaign -- split with Ike McCorkle (Boebert Dem Challenger) -- to be the next Congressman from Maryland’s District 3.**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zCH8A_OPuuJrn1cmkQ7K4-rAuMd1WvJclQIMlBGGeO_jkxFstPw1Ob7RRz3YrqGoTHX--mwQ1lbVsSysVwmgf3jlz2DfwMuUf6u2ctNWQ-5gj8lNWUV7z036hTC1xHaupypSf9ZnRsTWJpjItmkma0ntm5PjQOTjI9YU8CmeDfJA9-vPWkb42e-79i4v2KbcUlAvRu7FsFtOsM2APS9mAZcOO_i04WhpWk88xy2YjSHPg9fkbhvZOQuOJAk4IYu3ZjBgTfBTC3cTj6JfPM1pBoQrE0w342blVco-YlCbKNCw/42t/EHgwWQ45QiiOAGgYeJAoLA/h2/ZZVUZH-JZoP7V0Gyf3BUlir-ZzX-JQbixJ4AolObf_I) [**[DONATE]**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJipoJRPVplkwOEXrULo8pGLq7yawEwcsCepl4MDmzKf2mzxj698-Wd0C2gX2Fh2ei_cMirJnh4y9VdwRNEE2ejBYaqWZu97NABGDQoelhUY1nSC65I4kIgb8XNSuEImgl_8w8b8r5_GRQHOeVHPTwf8CsJcihwbhyW4lWFUwx7HnWRSgGwq26v989EWyLP_Yhg8zrie6IT8dyiVg_up3PxlFkXuMxZk6S63AjbXOb_2U-hRJUIzomWpe_uYKM08-Q/42t/EHgwWQ45QiiOAGgYeJAoLA/h3/kFKjZ1Ky8nAuYm-FT0aPNtc6eVbQqHVhhHl8X2V0Ix4) Here’s the cold hard truth: All across our great nation, rights are being stripped-back one-by-one by Trump’s MAGA army who would rather oppress folks than treat them as human beings. They cry “freedom,” fight tooth-and-nail to dismantle our democracy to protect their power, and dictate the choices people are allowed to make. That’s where everyday Americans like you come in: $5 will help me have a vote to protect and expand voting and reproductive rights. $5 will be able to conduct investigations and hold folks accountable. $5 will help me fight for democracy through legislation. If you’re ready to get in Good Trouble and redeem the soul of America, as my hero, John Lewis, urged us all to do, I need you to join this movement today. [**I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $500,000 within the first 72 hours****and I need your help to reach it. clean_body: | | Hey friend – Harry Dunn here. Yesterday, 3 years ago, I was defending the Capitol, the Constitution, the Members of Congress who you and I both may not agree with, and my own life from MAGA insurrectionists. On January 6, 2021, we were inches from watching democracy crumble right before our eyes. It’s not an exaggeration to say that democracy is on the brink of extinction. We’re one administration from it. And if we lose it, we’ll never get it back. I refuse to stand by and watch. I’m prepared to fight to protect our rights, our fragile democracy – and to be honest, I’m prepared to win. In Congress, I’ll be one of the loudest voices defending democracy – but I need your help to get there. [[DONATE]]() Here’s the cold hard truth: All across our great nation, rights are being stripped-back one-by-one by Trump’s MAGA army who would rather oppress folks than treat them as human beings. They cry “freedom,” fight tooth-and-nail to dismantle our democracy to protect their power, and dictate the choices people are allowed to make. That’s where everyday Americans like you come in: $5 will help me have a vote to protect and expand voting and reproductive rights. $5 will be able to conduct investigations and hold folks accountable. $5 will help me fight for democracy through legislation. If you’re ready to get in Good Trouble and redeem the soul of America, as my hero, John Lewis, urged us all to do, I need you to join this movement today. [[DONATE]]() Thank you, Harry 💙 Our mailing address is: Ike McCorkle for Congress , | | Sent via . | | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. TrumpRe: 2023 -- a dark year for America
---
Dear Patriot,

---
With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in **just DAYS** , I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year – _one of the darkest years in American history_.
---
All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much _GREAT AGAIN!_
---
But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, _that_ is the ultimate crime.
---
**In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the _leading_ 2024 presidential candidate (_yours truly_) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the _“corporate death penalty”_ against me and my family. **
---
It might be hard to believe given what you’ve witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life...
---
_...Even the media said nice things about me!_
---
But then, I did something they couldn’t possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones.
---
I chose _**YOU**_**** – the _PEOPLE!_
---
I chose to put _AMERICA_ FIRST.
---
I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State.
---
And if I could go back and do it all over again, _I wouldn’t have it any other way!_
---
**Remember, they’re not really coming after me, Patriot, they’re coming after** _**YOU**_**. I’m just standing in their way – ****_and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way._**
---
Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of _**LEGAL**_****_**WARFARE**_ imaginable to try and stop us.
---
**But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will** _**NEVER**_**,**_**_EVER_**_****_**SURRENDER**_**our country to their tyranny!**
---
_And I know that patriots like YOU won’t either..._
---

clean_body: Sharing my 2023 reflections with you...| | | | | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. TrumpRe: 2023 -- a dark year for America Dear Patriot, With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in just DAYS , I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year – one of the darkest years in American history. All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much GREAT AGAIN! But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, that is the ultimate crime. In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the leading 2024 presidential candidate (yours truly) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the “corporate death penalty” against me and my family. It might be hard to believe given what you’ve witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life... ...Even the media said nice things about me! But then, I did something they couldn’t possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones. I chose YOU** – the PEOPLE! I chose to put AMERICA FIRST. I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State. And if I could go back and do it all over again, I wouldn’t have it any other way! Remember, they’re not really coming after me, Patriot, they’re coming after YOU. I’m just standing in their way – **and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way. Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of LEGAL**WARFARE imaginable to try and stop us. But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will NEVER,EVER_SURRENDERour country to their tyranny! And I know that patriots like YOU won’t either... | Come November 5, WE THE PEOPLE will PROVE that good and honest Americans had the courage to peacefully cast off the Radical Democrat regime that is destroying our country from within, and replace it with a government that serves and protects YOU. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump | | - | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

body:
[gif]
#
Peter — on the morning of January 6, 2021, Josh Hawley pumped his fist at rioters outside the U.S. Capitol. You know the moment:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42351?refcode=em20240107-4562&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4562%2E614464%2EimZ2kq)

**Then, when those same rioters stormed the building hours later, Hawley showed us who he really is** — just a fraud and a coward who runs from threats to our democracy.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42351?refcode=em20240107-4562&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4562%2E614464%2EimZ2kq)

Missourians can’t afford another six years of Hawley’s cowardice in the U.S. Senate. That’s why I’m running to replace him.
**I’m Lucas Kunce, the 13-year Marine veteran, antitrust advocate, and Democrat on a mission to defeat Josh Hawley and take back power for working people.** We’ve built a record-breaking grassroots movement without a cent from corporate PACs to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and put everyday Missourians in charge of our country.
The GOP insiders supporting Hawley know we can win. So they spent all last year spending BIG to tear me and our movement down. Now that it’s officially election year, there’s no telling what else they’ll do to keep their grip on this seat. So I’m asking:
**[Will you rush your first donation to my campaign today so we can defeat Josh Hawley? Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any GOP Senator running for re-election this year, and with multiple recent polls confirming this race is in a statistical tie, we have a real opportunity to flip this Senate seat in November.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42351?refcode=em20240107-4562&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4562%2E614464%2EimZ2kq)**

body:

Dear Friend,

I’m Sydney Nelson, Qasim for Congress’ Communications Director. I wanted
to take this opportunity to introduce myself and thank you for supporting
the campaign— whether that be through [ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5088?t=1002&akid=35141%2E120265%2E4ROD-- ]donations, sharing Qasim’s
content on social media, or telling friends and family about the primary
on March 19.

[ https://act.qasimforcongress.org/go/5088?t=1003&akid=35141%2E120265%2E4ROD-- ][IMG]

Growing up in Crystal Lake, a mid-sized town on the north side of
Illinois' 11th District, I always hoped that someone like Qasim would
represent me in Congress—someone who wants money out of politics,
champions universal healthcare, and tirelessly fights to protect
reproductive rights. Fast forward to 2024, and not only is it possible,
but it's also likely according to our latest polling.

I'm beyond grateful to be part of this campaign and to help achieve
Qasim's vision for an America where everyone lives with dignity. The fact
that I can contribute to this vision in my hometown makes it especially
rewarding.

Like Qasim, I believe winning this race requires listening to the people
of IL-11. So, if you want to support our campaign’s outreach, feel free to
contact me at [ mailto:sydney@qasimrashid.com ]sydney@qasimrashid.com. Between writing letters to the
editor, hosting meet and greets, or even posting about Qasim for Congress
on social media, there are plenty of ways to help us secure a victory on
March 19.

Thank you for being part of this movement!

All the best,

Sydney Nelson

Communications Director, Qasim for Congress

name: Robertson For Congress
subject: Let's Take Back Our Country!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robertson for Congress](https://r20
body:
| | | |
---
# We Must End Wasteful Government Spending
By Mark Robertson, Candidate for Nevada's First Congressional District
---
Each year, the Federal Government wastes billions of your tax dollars. This is money you paid and got nothing in return. We need to get rid of big spenders in Washington. Congress must take back its Constitutional duty of controlling the national purse.
Near the end of each year, Senator Rand Paul publishes a list of wasteful spending. His 2023 list contained $482 billion in waste, including:

* $118,000 to study whether Marvel movie villain Thanos would be able to snap his fingers while wearing the Infinity Gauntlet
* $2.7 million to study Russian cats walking on a treadmill
* $6 million for boosting Egyptian tourism
* $33 million for a research island of 3,000 monkeys
* $200 million given to "struggling" musicians
* $100+ billion of COVID relief funds given to ineligible people

This is a drop in the bucket compared to the $4 trillion the government added to the national debt in 2023. Interest on the debt doubled to $659 billion.
Forty percent of American households pay no federal income tax. For the 60% of American households who do pay taxes, the most common amount is about $5,000 per year. This means it took 24 American households paying $5,000 to study the Marvel Movie, 540 households to study Russian cats, 1,200 households to boost Egyptian tourism, 6,600 households to pay for an island of monkeys, 40,000 households to pay for "struggling" musicians, and more than 200,000 households to pay for inept government agencies who sent COVID money to ineligible people.
In total, it took the taxes paid by more than 20,000,000 American households to pay for just one year of interest and wasteful government spending.
Think about that! Your hard-earned money wasted by thoughtless bureaucrats. How does that make you feel? I hope you're fed up and ready to do something! We have got to get rid of these big spenders in Congress (from both parties).
Take a close look at the candidates running for Congress. Make sure you don't support any big spenders. Last year, I was outspent in the primary but won by nearly a two-to-one margin. I "walk the talk." I live within a budget in my personal life and in my campaign.
Here's how we fix the problem: As your representative, I will fight to return regular order to the budgeting process. I will do all I can to strip government agencies of their power to waste government funds and return the power of the purse to the people's representatives. Together, we can take back our country!
*******
---
Your Questions--Mark's Answers
Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently:
Q: Do you support the United States' efforts in sending money to Ukraine in their war efforts against Russia? -B.C. A. The United States should support the people of Ukraine in their fight for freedom. The amount of support we are providing is a small fraction of our defense budget. This is a bargain for the United States. By providing equipment, ammunition, and supplies to Ukraine, we are severely degrading the military capability of Russia (one of our top threats) without having to send our troops. That being said, we should carefully monitor the use of the aid we are sending to make sure it is not being used to enrich corrupt politicians. I served in Afghanistan and witnessed firsthand the waste, fraud, and abuse of the funds we sent there.
Q. In the event of another COVID outbreak, will you support efforts similar to what was in place before with the shutdowns, mask mandates, and pressure to accept vaccinations? -R.J. A. No. As I said during the COVID pandemic, the Government should give clear, accurate, and honest information and allow Americans to make their own decisions on what precautions they should take. Well-informed people can then make their own decisions on what is best for them and their families. The government should have never shut down our schools and the economy. Americans should have the freedom to decide these issues for themselves.
Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question.
---

Your hard-earned money wasted by thoughtless bureaucrats. How does that make you feel? I hope you're fed up and ready to do something! We have got to get rid of these big spenders in Congress (from both parties). Take a close look at the candidates running for Congress. Make sure you don't support any big spenders. Last year, I was outspent in the primary but won by nearly a two-to-one margin. I "walk the talk." I live within a budget in my personal life and in my campaign. Here's how we fix the problem: As your representative, I will fight to return regular order to the budgeting process. I will do all I can to strip government agencies of their power to waste government funds and return the power of the purse to the people's representatives. Together, we can take back our country! Your Questions--Mark's Answers Mark Robertson answers your questions with direct and honest answers. Here are two questions Mark was asked recently: Q: Do you support the United States' efforts in sending money to Ukraine in their war efforts against Russia? -B.C. A. The United States should support the people of Ukraine in their fight for freedom. The amount of support we are providing is a small fraction of our defense budget. This is a bargain for the United States. By providing equipment, ammunition, and supplies to Ukraine, we are severely degrading the military capability of Russia (one of our top threats) without having to send our troops. That being said, we should carefully monitor the use of the aid we are sending to make sure it is not being used to enrich corrupt politicians. I served in Afghanistan and witnessed firsthand the waste, fraud, and abuse of the funds we sent there. Q. In the event of another COVID outbreak, will you support efforts similar to what was in place before with the shutdowns, mask mandates, and pressure to accept vaccinations? -R.J. A. No. As I said during the COVID pandemic, the Government should give clear, accurate, and honest information and allow Americans to make their own decisions on what precautions they should take. Well-informed people can then make their own decisions on what is best for them and their families. The government should have never shut down our schools and the economy. Americans should have the freedom to decide these issues for themselves. Please share this message with friends and neighbors. Have questions for me? Simply reply to this email to ask me a question. | == | == | == Mark Robertson retired from the Army. Use of his rank does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Military.* | | | | | | | Robertson For Congress | PO Box 750433, Las Vegas, NV 89136 | | Sent by mailto:mark@robertsonforcongress.com

name: Maria Montero
subject: Reminder: Happy New Year: Campaign Updates January 6!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
ICYMI
| | | |
---
---
| Maria's Community Champions
---
|
---
| Earning the confidence and support of community members, leaders, and business people is what distinguishes Maria Montero--she reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District in Pennsylvania.
This week we would are pleased to share the first of our Pennsylvania U.S. Congressional delegation endorsements, U.S. Representative Dan Meuser, from Pennsylvania's 9th Congressional District. Representative Meuser was first elected in 2018 representing portions of Northeastern PA (which formerly included Carbon County, which is now in PA-7). Dan is a conservative business leader who brings his experience as a proven job creator to Congress. He knows what it takes to win and is working overtime to grow our Republican majority in the U.S. Congress. It is why Dan is endorsing Maria-- she is the only candidate who can beat Susan Wild.
Congressman Meuser and Maria served together on Governor Tom Corbett's leadership team. Dan, as the Secretary of Revenue, and Maria, as the Executive Director of the PA Commission for Women and thereafter as the Executive Director of the Latino Commission. They worked together to promote economic development polices and small business growth opportunities to these key constituencies.
Why PA-7 is a Battleground Seat
Pennsylvania has 17 U.S. Congressional seats. Nine (9) of those seats are held by Democrats and eight (8) of the seats are represented by Republicans.
Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District, out of all the 435 U.S. congressional districts in the United States, is the top battleground seat where it is predicted that the right candidate can beat Susan Wild.
PA-7 is an R+2 district (a Republican leaning seat) because nearly 20% of PA-7's voters are registered Independents and nearly 55,000 voters in the district are Spanish speakers whose values are conservative.
It makes sense, Maria can win PA-7: Maria reflects the people, values, and work ethic of the 7th Congressional District. Most importantly, her humble upbringing in Summit Hill and the barrios of Allentown, is a constant reminder for her to fight for our freedom, those who are suffering because of rising crime, the economic crisis, and crippling inflation which have left many destitute. Maria is the one we need in Washington D.C. to fight to restore the American Dream!
"Freedom is a fragile thing and is never more than one generation away from extinction. It is not ours by inheritance, it must be fought for and defended constantly by each generation, for it comes only once to a people. Those who have known freedom and then lost it have never known it again." -Ronald Reagan
---
---
| |
---
| Happy New Year and Many Blessings!
---
|
---
| |
---
| Around The District
---
|
---
| Thank you to the 912 Project Lehigh Valley for hosting an amazing candidate forum!

We will teach you the simple steps and process. Thank you for your generosity!

name: Jameson Ellis
subject: Can I resist the swamp?
body:
| | | |
---
**FELLOW PATRIOTS:**
How will I safeguard against the corruption in Washington, DC?
Accountability.
I aim to spend minimal time in Washington - just enough to vote and represent your interests effectively.
My focus is on being home with my constituents, staying grounded and connected to the people I represent.
You can [click here](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZmYi53YXRjaCUyRnByVW91THlzdTUlMkY=&sig=H2VRFGWyXwJLMoK2DXJCKLGbELD9nC3nrUDxAvpe6GKn&iat=1704732712&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=%2Bf0O1rt6xZM3R0AOPJBYNjlAdrowTf2IFuyAHnbpAdpD17xB%3AUnRyxJLSq6chzazZzHa9qnznepIWhfwe&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=220A247A1A1962) to watch and share on Facebook and/or watch below on YouTube.
[](https://jamesonellis.lt.acemlna.com/Prod/link-tracker?redirectUrl=aHR0cHMlM0ElMkYlMkZ5b3V0dS5iZSUyRl9raEJZWUdodWdR&sig=37mw7gzJLRH4Z72GXUNrrHw1tg6Hsv6kUE9i5BXyJLjp&iat=1704732712&a=%7C%7C611311006%7C%7C&account=jamesonellis%2Eactivehosted%2Ecom&email=%2Bf0O1rt6xZM3R0AOPJBYNjlAdrowTf2IFuyAHnbpAdpD17xB%3AUnRyxJLSq6chzazZzHa9qnznepIWhfwe&s=cabcbe31a720242486b887158a77876f&i=220A247A1A1963)

## Defense Secretary's 'Emergency' Roils D.C.
Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin was hospitalized last week and [out of touch for days](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLHOozAQBp_GdIvsNYmhoKChy5V3JTL2GvZk7Ag7QXn7U67-q--TphnNn8fysBw5bb_sQWMNebGu8psWBT1gt3SNHwMRkm5oVEZ2BnHQstlHJ4fe3FejnVuDNWpF1XuttHSD033QDY8osZNK9krebnhvCdfeDKtfnQ2GVBCdJM81n-3fzKnuFOInv-lsXT6aOO61PovQk8BZ4HxdV3uU9GUCZ0rwKgLnRNd3njlyZfe9dSeIMX882FepnCDYGPOrAhfYznxx2qDkg3IiKLCT9bDbAjXDmWMUONsTpkkdk_qdmnP0z4tj5HI3opPbYTn-t6s_pfoXAAD__1BObEA) without notifying the White House, the National Security Council, or the media that he was having emergency care. Austin's absence has spiraled into a Washington D.C. drama, as officials struggle to answer who knew about Austin's still-unexplained medical situation. It's unclear why no one at the Pentagon informed the White House. The Pentagon is facing [backlash from the media](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFSxCAUAL-GdGSAcBdSUNikO1vLzAMeyVMCNwEv3t87amu9ze6-3ZYbUKK8vsKOtsWygG_0wEVyw5VedBdsRFQ4dGjlKPSo1DSIbrMm6OEaxCU6J80Q3WBGiWCkmrwwZoKOrBJKCymMFJeLuvaonBknF5yHOKKMTAsM1MrRvxfKbcOYnuWBR-_L3iW7tXavbHhhamZqPs-zj-Ur41l_OFPzjoGAqfmOucFaMo_gKa_cgf9IUDce_8p4oOpTqcgreg6ftVGunFLKWCvf4Ngr9wcGcpSoPbvDhvtJKVG9jkyLdQdKv0rtvz_fAQAA__9P6WrA) as well. One veteran defense correspondent says he's _" NEVER heard of a top Pentagon leader disappearing"_ for an entire week.
## First Private Moon Launch Set for Today
The first-ever commercial moon mission was expected to launch early this morning at Cape Canaveral in Florida. _United Launch Alliance_ 's Peregrine moon lander is catching a ride into orbit on its _Vulcan Centaur_ rocket--its first ever launch. If the 2 AM launch went as planned, [video will be available here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj71uhSAYQJ8GNgx8oNw7MHRxu107Gn4-lQbBIGr69s3t3Pmc5OR8vaaXjSnm5dNuaNpcJutbvHAS7MFATYoGMyMCSopGaK40wFNyuhruwUk-9NJrEXSvg5QDd4NGMWspn5JGAxwUF_wheN_D0CG4h3664Lyd3xpRHENspXbfJea24px-yoW182Wjyayt7QeRHwRGAuN9392xW49vSmC8zuRtZh5zs2dlyZ7Zr2zHikuNGdlWSmbJ5oCV3ei8PRqtJux3TCkegyaKL5uN6S_W_jv_DQAA___MIFu5). The mission, the first of two commercial moon missions planned for this winter by private companies, will carry scientific payloads for NASA in preparation for the agency's manned Artemis moon landing later this decade. It will also carry some private payloads, including memorial burial capsules. These have drawn criticism from the Navajo Nation, which says delivery of human remains to the moon would [desecrate a sacred space](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7FuwyAUAL8GNizA2NgDQ5ds6drRejaPmAh4lqGx-vdVM3c76YbTfd2XO8QUy-MTMroWaIGtxRcuSkxCm8Vw7wKixp6jU1Yaq_XcS747Y9TYzziGQVobjDQGfVB28FZNq58nHp2W2kglJyWHQY8d6nWy8-rXDYJFFZiR6GOjs3tSLG3HkH7ohWe3UebJ7a0dlfUfTN-Yvl3X1dUDNvyzTN8KVBAn1oOKr6LAC54kCrRIRdD6xO1N-3eGIk7MEEsVmajw0_njiinFOlpm5CNDTO9i-2__NwAA___fzl34).
## NFL Games Claim 93 of Top 100 Network Shows
NFL football games completely dominated network TV this year, claiming 93 of the year's top 100-rated broadcasts. Five years ago, the NFL had only 61 of the top-watched shows, [as these charts show](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOtCAURp8GO8zlgqIFxd_Qzd9uaRAuM2xQjLBj9u03br319yXn5Hw8lodLOe3P_24j02JZnG_pTYvgE0e1qC6YSIQkOzJCg9KIs4TuZWBwWng_CRGnOFLEIGe5DjKqSTlA6pJBQAUCJgHDgGNPuE56XsPqXdQkIlNAIbVy9p8l7e1FMX-XN529L1uXzau1ozL5j6FlaK_r6utRzpZ8uQ8M7fpV0061MrQbheQY2pvI0O4x86PUVvkseYm8lYMLAN7efD2LC97dGwJKLlAqPQo9SIa2O004rpRzqqNmCp6bS_lXp_3V5icAAP__24Nivg). Outside the NFL, the rest of the top 100 included three college football games, the Oscars, the Macy's Thanksgiving parade, the State of the Union address, and the Super Bowl lead-out. For advertisers, the data shows that only sports can reliably deliver a mass audience. Monday Night Football [had its highest ratings in 17 years](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxsj7Fu7CAQRb8Gd1gwsItdULzG3b42pYXNzHoi1qwMwsnfR06d5jZXOkfn4zE_Aifen__DC32lPIe1csNZy0GCnW0XPSECmg69dso6gNGobvPajndatDUrDkBGxVFpR4YIKQwR1o49KLBKq0Gr2w3uPcIyuHGJyxrIoSZhFUau-eg_M-91Q0rfueHRr_nVJb_V-i7C_BMwCZjO8-zDF-dyvQKmiy1gUvoaJ2DaKcna5BEq788iEzeU2HCvRTbGE4-y8bs7fHyfnBKXuxNWPV-B06-v_hX_EwAA__-1ilsR), and the NFL's Thanksgiving Day games set an all-time viewership record. Notable for their absence on the Top 100 list are any regular network TV shows. The season premiere of CBS's "60 Minutes" was the highest-ranking non-sports program at No. 136.

clean_body: Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin was hospitalized last week and without notifying the White House, the National Security Council, or the media that he was having emergency care. | | | | | | MONDAY, JANUARY 8, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 1835, President Andrew Jackson paid off the U.S. national debt, the only time in history that America's debt was zero. () Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by . The 24-hour countdown has begun for The Texas Flyover 's launch, and blastoff is at 0600 tomorrow. If you want the first edition to land in your inbox, this is your last chance! (). | Defense Secretary's 'Emergency' Roils D.C. Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin was hospitalized last week and without notifying the White House, the National Security Council, or the media that he was having emergency care. Austin's absence has spiraled into a Washington D.C. drama, as officials struggle to answer who knew about Austin's still-unexplained medical situation. It's unclear why no one at the Pentagon informed the White House. The Pentagon is facing as well. One veteran defense correspondent says he's " NEVER heard of a top Pentagon leader disappearing" for an entire week. First Private Moon Launch Set for Today The first-ever commercial moon mission was expected to launch early this morning at Cape Canaveral in Florida. United Launch Alliance 's Peregrine moon lander is catching a ride into orbit on its Vulcan Centaur rocket--its first ever launch. If the 2 AM launch went as planned, . The mission, the first of two commercial moon missions planned for this winter by private companies, will carry scientific payloads for NASA in preparation for the agency's manned Artemis moon landing later this decade. It will also carry some private payloads, including memorial burial capsules. These have drawn criticism from the Navajo Nation, which says delivery of human remains to the moon would . NFL Games Claim 93 of Top 100 Network Shows NFL football games completely dominated network TV this year, claiming 93 of the year's top 100-rated broadcasts. Five years ago, the NFL had only 61 of the top-watched shows, . Outside the NFL, the rest of the top 100 included three college football games, the Oscars, the Macy's Thanksgiving parade, the State of the Union address, and the Super Bowl lead-out. For advertisers, the data shows that only sports can reliably deliver a mass audience. Monday Night Football , and the NFL's Thanksgiving Day games set an all-time viewership record. Notable for their absence on the Top 100 list are any regular network TV shows. The season premiere of CBS's "60 Minutes" was the highest-ranking non-sports program at No. 136. name: Kristan Hawkins, Students for Life Action
subject: NEW: Harvard Poll shows. . .
body:
Dear Pro-Life Friend,

[](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-siuydiy-duchtdja-y/)
This headline from _CatholicVote_ was like a splash of ice-cold water on my face.

After all, right now we’re seeing an unprecedented number of young people leave the pro-abortion camp to come into the folds of the Pro-Life Movement.

So, how did Harvard supposedly find that _“only 35% of those who consider themselves pro-life say they would definitely vote”_ against the pro-abortion agenda?

The truth is Pro-Life Friend, that’s what happens when Republicans are weak on abortion. . .

In fact, the _**NUMBER ONE_** reason that some pro-lifers don’t show up to the polls on election day, is when the “pro-life” Republican is actually LYING about being pro-life!

That’s why I need your support more now than ever in 2024, so we can send a clear and strong message to these weak-kneed Republicans: **They need to _STAND STRONG_ for Life if they want to be elected!**

**[If you agree, will you please click here to sign your _"Protection at Conception!"_ Petition right away](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-siuydiy-duchtdja-j/)**?

As you’ll see, this **_"Protection at Conception!"_ Petition** simply urges your U.S. Representative to co-sponsor and do everything in their power to PASS a National Life at Conception Act.

If passed, the _Life at Conception Act_ (H.R. 431) would end abortion-on-demand in America by recognizing the scientific FACT that life begins at the moment of conception, provide stiff penalties for abortionists, and save hundreds of thousands of precious preborn babies every year.

The truth is, this is the LAST bill Congress wants to take up – especially in a critical election year like 2024.

But election years are exactly when politicians (_fearing for their jobs_) listen to their constituents most.

So, if you and I can deliver a stack of signed **_"Protection at Conception!"_ Petitions** a mile high, they’ll have no choice but to bring this life-saving bill to the floor for a full vote.

Then, they’ll either vote the right way. . . or have to face the voters in November.

You and I, Pro-Life Friend. . . _we aren’t dumb._

We’ve seen the political games that Faux-Life Republicans play to try and get our vote.

All too often, they’ll claim to support pro-life policies, call out Democrats for being pro-abortion radicals and even label themselves as “unapologetically pro-life” – _I’m looking at you Nikki Haley._

But when it gets down to brass tacks, they end up either voting for pro-abortion legislation, selling out to the Abortion Lobby’s deep pockets, or straight up lying to their voters so they can get the pro-life vote!

And these phony Republicans’ favorite thing to champion is a do-nothing 15-week abortion prevention act.

Pro-lifers like you and me see through their façade – a _15-week law would be virtually ineffective!_

For it would allow **94%** of abortions to continue and is even weaker than France’s 14-week abortion law!

How can these Republicans call themselves pro-life if the most they want to do is only start protecting life past 15-weeks’ gestation?

That is what I call a sick joke, if you ask me _(which many Republicans have, and I tell them that too!)._

What pro-life voters **_REALLY**_ want – _and what this country desperately needs_ – are strong politicians with even stronger pro-life legislation, such as a _National Life at Conception Act._

Most pro-lifers, _especially young pro-lifers,_ are going to be completely disenfranchised or unenergetic to go vote for a weak politician who is under-promising or downright lying on their position on Life – _and then these same politicians have the gall to blame us for them losing elections on a weak platform!_

Republicans need to get it through their heads that the pro-life vote is __NOT__ to be taken for granted! We are not going to compromise with the lives of innocent little preborn boys and girls!

**_(I hope ALL the current Presidential candidates are taking notes on this!)_**

_Being strong and standing our ground in the face of the Abortion Lobby_ – _that’s how we’re going to win in 2024._

That is how we are going to abolish abortion in our lifetime for good!

We know how to win – we just need to hold Republicans accountable when they veer off the winning strategy.

It’s time for the Republican Party to keep up with the Pro-Life Movement, or, at the very least, stop lying to our faces when they tell us they’re “pro-life.”

You and I can’t rely on politicians to do the right thing all on their own.

It’s up to you and I to draw the line in the sand for them.

If you agree with me that life begins at conception, **[please sign your** _"Protection at Conception!"_ Petition** right away insisting your U.S. Representative grow a spine and protect life](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-siuydiy-duchtdja-i/)!**

**[After you sign your petition, please prayerfully consider making a contribution to _Students for Life Action_ as well.](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-siuydiy-duchtdja-d/)**

Your **[contribution of $250, $100, $50, or $35](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-siuydiy-duchtdja-h/)** will help me collect even more signed _**"Protection at Conception"_ Petitions** so we can really turn up the heat on Congress in 2024.

For Life,

Kristan Hawkins
President, _Students for Life Action_

**[Sign My Protection at Conception Petition >>](https://studentsforlifeofamerica.cmail20.com/t/j-l-siuydiy-duchtdja-k/)**

Students for Life Action is a non-profit, tax-exempt advocacy organization under section 501(c)(4) of the IRC. Sponsors of former U.N. Ambassador Nikki Haley’s nonprofit also
donated to her 2024 presidential campaign and affiliated political
action committees (PACs), according to a Daily Caller News Foundation
review of campaign finance and nonprofit records. Haley founded the
Original Six Foundation while governor of South Carolina in 2011 to
help provide opportunities to underprivileged communities through
after-school programs and literacy initiatives.

I’m the Democratic nominee in NY-03 to replace the expelled George Santos, and we have a special election coming up on February 13. Peter, the implications of this election in just a few weeks are huge. There’s so much at stake for Nassau, Queens, and the whole country. Everyone is watching to see if we can finally break through the partisan gridlock in Congress to get things done and solve the critical problems our country faces. With George Santos gone, we have a chance to do just that. **In short, Peter, we have to win. This special election will set the tone for all of 2024–including the general election in November.** [**So,**** **Peter** ,****I’m asking if you’ll split a contribution between Blue Amp Action and I so we can win NY-03, finally get to solving the problems our country faces, and start off 2024 with a big win?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02d8f8b6-63bb-4c53-ad6d-4cf51c598b65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: American Update
subject: Here’s The Legal Question That Could Determine The 2024 Election
body:
And Nikki Haley’s Nonprofit Is Closely Intertwined With Her Political World - American Action News

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689448%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v3oYDsSANF0cUp2wgv8GgA&sysid=1 Here’s The Legal Question That Could Determine The 2024 Election

The disqualification of former President Donald Trump from the ballot in several states may depend on whether the U.S. Supreme Court believes that the president of the United States is an “officer of the United States” according to Section 3 of the 14th Amendment to the U.S. Constitution.

Read more https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c689448%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=v3oYDsSANF0cUp2wgv8GgA&sysid=1

Sponsors of former U.N. Ambassador Nikki Haley’s nonprofit also donated to her 2024 presidential campaign and affiliated political action committees (PACs), according to a Daily Caller News Foundation review of campaign finance and nonprofit records. Haley founded the Original Six Foundation while governor of South Carolina in 2011 to help provide opportunities to underprivileged communities through after-school programs and literacy initiatives.

The Department of Defense’s (DOD) second-in-command did not learn that she had taken over her boss’s responsibilities because he had been hospitalized until nearly three days later, the Pentagon said.

name: Conservative Alerts
subject: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
[Unsubscribe]({{unsubscribeMessageTypeUrl}})
| | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62666149:sVW4YoiNJ:m:1:2532013465:3E2611A069F14B760775A282AA5DAFAC:r)
---
| | Hi , One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?
---
| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62666149:sVW4YoiNJ:m:1:2532013465:3E2611A069F14B760775A282AA5DAFAC:r)
---
| | In this **[25-page commentary](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62666149:sVW4YoiNJ:m:1:2532013465:3E2611A069F14B760775A282AA5DAFAC:r)** , "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome. With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

**[Please follow this link to get your free copy of"Created Equal" now.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/62666149:sVW4YoiNJ:m:1:2532013465:3E2611A069F14B760775A282AA5DAFAC:r)**
Thanks,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---

clean_body: {{unsubscribeMessageTypeUrl}} | | | | | Hi , One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes. They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict? | | | In this , "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome. With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality. Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.
