name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Friend, I'm asking you to make a choice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window.
https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3d26070aba225698bcf351b94f5a5d41cf5219610d2011e2728c53099a0787b9bbe86dfabd27bd903eb36b9af17eafcf5ad739a02b497162d2f0a3b43147ac4b6afa658ec57da2756da9991410992abb

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb117013827fd28db51112abce503825138f8eef1ea426ed80a3b780a76ee5bccad19e22b62d78184bba7c14c1f0fa8041897269b2b21dbaf34

Friend,

The Washington elites have already chosen who they want to be on the ballot in November 2024. The Left does not want me to be the nominee because they know I am a threat and that I am the ONLY candidate who can defeat Joe Biden and destroy the Washington D.C. swamp.

I’ve always stood up when it mattered most, going against the grain of public opinion time after time. It’s the exact reason why DC elites, the legacy media, and the political class of America want my campaign to fail. But that's not up to them; it's up to YOU.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb117013827fd28db51112abce503825138f8eef1ea426ed80a3b780a76ee5bccad19e22b62d78184bba7c14c1f0fa8041897269b2b21dbaf34
Support my campaign by donating here before the Iowa Caucus next week.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb15239cbd5a7806b1b64675d044b11dcdc1a8018a4cf8a42bb5b52845760467ee8de8ea9e990d83b9c5855b011297e5c5b7f66021bd526873e
PITCH IN $25

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb1bc2af30f37789054afa80a64bf5dd907b958d1ae4df923d58863a9c8787cb758800e10677a85ba815c16315b524724b75c4ac0bda4ae95b1
PITCH IN $47

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb14bd4cc8a62907b22acc47ccf5541459ca15795528d9cf11f3348559d5f736d1b90e1c153d29cadd7dd50978bea7e441bd2588348681370cd
PITCH IN $75

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb14833e7158965bfd7c0f42fa97e683291ad2e858cfe292d3c64c0fd51ec85d315b2bdbac41459e04afb986e1f46b4fecdf4d99960357f475e
PITCH IN $100

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb1488662275fc5a219898c64d044831ca1b2219fc6919379eee3437f55e62947415e7e440806784c6067c1dc7c8c019aaf213dc5291eaeec6c
PITCH IN $150

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb1b2851d1f9648875f60d0bcf62d28ce9fcc9f675268b40eb1192785a5b34501c68440b3a9fdf99f0733cb4e0925e909c35141db3759524ee8
PITCH IN $250

This is my promise to you, Friend.

- I will lead our Great American Comeback.
- I will restore freedom across our country.
- I will stand up to the radical Left’s indoctrination of your children, imposition of a social credit score, hostile takeover of our military, and neglect of our southern border.
- I will reverse every one of Biden’s policies that have caused average American families to suffer.
- I will fight tooth and nail to get our country back on track. I know the potential this country has. Your children deserve to see it.

Decline is a choice. Americans know that our country is headed in the wrong direction, and no one is better positioned than I am to upend Washington; that’s why the political elite put a giant target on my back.

There’s something you need to know: every time I’ve been underestimated, written off, or dismissed, I have proven my opposition wrong. From winning a historic re-election and turning Florida a deep red state during my time as Governor, to bucking the entrenched bureaucracy on COVID, I have fought back and WON every time.

I have never been the establishment's favorite, and I never will be, friend, but I’ve won because of that every time. American voters get to write the narrative in election years, and the time to act is NOW.

We have no time to waste. January 15th will put our campaign to the ultimate test. I am counting on your support before then.

If we're going to win, we can't leave anything on the table.
https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb12f84b50d5eec5cfd281b3759f9482a2d388553db5ea8b7fc1ceac093c99dff2df33a512fa34fc456e72cde06f414420f365397f1e689db9b
If you can, will you pitch in $20 today?

Yours in Freedom,

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb117013827fd28db51112abce503825138f8eef1ea426ed80a3b780a76ee5bccad19e22b62d78184bba7c14c1f0fa8041897269b2b21dbaf34

Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb117013827fd28db51112abce503825138f8eef1ea426ed80a3b780a76ee5bccad19e22b62d78184bba7c14c1f0fa8041897269b2b21dbaf34

🚨 ATTENTION 🚨

Heads up! We have pre-checked the monthly donor box on our fundraising page. Monthly donors make a HUGE difference for our team and help ups plan ahead.

If one donation was all it took to defeat Joe Biden next November then we wouldn't ask for your help more than we already have, but unfortunately it's going to take more than that to win.

Please keep this box checked so we that we can count on your support.

Volunteer!

We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb1b3f4636d7485175b9596dddea2c751de005a5310f5a01f27a20e87dd76f3bd9ac2228a64c2be775a314497295b6bd7d589ef3f360c4ef189
Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb117013827fd28db51112abce503825138f8eef1ea426ed80a3b780a76ee5bccad19e22b62d78184bba7c14c1f0fa8041897269b2b21dbaf34

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=3ee5ad9e3fbabeb117013827fd28db51112abce503825138f8eef1ea426ed80a3b780a76ee5bccad19e22b62d78184bba7c14c1f0fa8041897269b2b21dbaf34

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without “green cards”), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

- I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
- This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
- I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
- I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.
Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Your America
subject: Their rise and fall
body:
Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic?

This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38872%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rzAhmBPJo4vQYmyAJyIRfg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.” ** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38873%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1vMQrQZrHlDWCs1MoiWRIw&sysid=1) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38874%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2f1IvMkSBrY5dbkJNWwsJw&sysid=1)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,” **along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38885%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=BRNpELn5V%2fIqbFeliEVRCQ&sysid=1)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic” **and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c9799%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=zfEEmZ8sPF5qbqwJVnsgvQ&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38886%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JwIbhafkMD3w3IUJ5OwnyQ&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38887%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LMyE3oywBh%2bPlqvsoqRSHg&sysid=1)_

# An Urgent Call: Support Needed for a Better Future

As a candidate, I have heard officials’ urgent pleas for support on vital issues.
[**If you're able, I invite you to take just 90 seconds out of your day to watch this brief video**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=030d3670fe&e=a2a46ff12c)**:**
[](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=2fe7288cd7&e=a2a46ff12c)
Reinforcing my commitment to bridge divides, I promise to continue hearing your voices as we strive for meaningful progress together.
Your voices matter, and I’m here to ensure they’re heard.
[**If you agree that the best person to represent us, the hard-working folks of Texas 8, is one of us - then chip in $25 or more to help me bring the conversation back to the issues that truly matter.**](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=a87a441821&e=a2a46ff12c)
*If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
| [Chip in $50](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=9eea39bd13&e=a2a46ff12c)

---
| [Choose Amount](https://laura4tx.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=65529f44b849c16925ad85a66&id=8f69478088&e=a2a46ff12c)
---
I owe this grassroots movement to you and your support Peter - thank you!
\- Laura

What Has California’s War On Fossil Fuels Actually Accomplished?

California has gone after the fossil fuel industry with vigor, but
those efforts do not seem to have made much impact on climate change
while proving detrimental to the state’s economy.

---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2d80eff8-d1b0-4bed-8669-9cd5dfdab4f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
2023 was a year of shocking developments on many fronts. [From the surprise attack on Israel](https://substack.com/redirect/7f252970-43a2-4695-ab59-9fce68460a5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to the ongoing war in Ukraine and [an increasingly likely conflict in South America](https://substack.com/redirect/e9087f4f-43a9-4486-93e5-e371488c88e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the world felt like it was unraveling in front of our eyes. Banks failed, credit card debt ballooned, inflation dissipated, and central banks "paused" their regular rhythm of raising rates--all while American consumers couldn't get enough of [Taylor Swift](https://substack.com/redirect/73209391-1654-4a6b-bf76-d0c3cbcdce90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Barbie or Oppenheimer](https://substack.com/redirect/52ededca-fcd4-44db-ad29-6d87a0d67d8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And in a market with insufficient workers, [organized labor flexed its muscle in the freight, airline, automobile and other industries](https://substack.com/redirect/975473d6-c506-4437-bd47-0c4fa17ea160?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
There are many useful and comprehensive discussions of the year's events, and I won't try to outdo them here. Four specific developments this year, however, warrant special comment: surging financial markets, increasing worries around artificial intelligence, the beginning of the US presidential election cycle, and rapidly deteriorating geopolitical dynamics.
## [Vikram's New Book: Order Your Copy Now!](https://substack.com/redirect/f4793f1f-3234-4f80-94cb-6f29cd444712?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Jan 7
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f4793f1f-3234-4f80-94cb-6f29cd444712?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
["Take this incredibly fun ride through the life of modern day Renaissance man Vikram Mansharamani to appreciate a simple solution-open-minded, generalist thinking. This book is an enjoyable read that lays out a viable path to move beyond today's identity-driven, label-dominated world." - Christopher T. Sununu, Governor, State of New Hampshire](https://substack.com/redirect/f4793f1f-3234-4f80-94cb-6f29cd444712?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/f4793f1f-3234-4f80-94cb-6f29cd444712?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ORDER VIKRAM'S NEW BOOK](https://substack.com/redirect/c121794d-5ca9-462a-8cfa-216f61ec6e95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
After digesting the shock of unexpected failures of Silicon Valley Bank, First Republic, and Credit Suisse early in the year, [financial markets spent the remainder of the year cheering the rapidly normalizing rate of inflation](https://substack.com/redirect/9e2dc746-f51d-497e-a458-068ff8a8c4e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Expectations of forthcoming rate cuts drove the Dow Jones Industrial Average up 13%, the S&P 500 up 24%, and the Nasdaq up 43%. All of this transpired as [student debt approached $2 trillion](https://substack.com/redirect/d1873633-d062-483a-8410-aadabe0a4c73?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [credit card debt crossed $1 trillion](https://substack.com/redirect/566a119a-56f8-4e5a-b1ca-c5c8575b0c4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and [mortgage rates surged to levels not seen in decades](https://substack.com/redirect/5c790b78-c048-4b75-a93d-b3eb04bf031a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Technology continued to accelerate, raising alarm bells as artificial intelligence safety matters quickly dominated headlines and led more than 1000 tech industry executives to call for a pause](https://substack.com/redirect/d64207c9-4d2e-428f-991a-a790ec60e25f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Governance issues led to the temporary ouster of Sam Altman, the chief executive officer of OpenAI](https://substack.com/redirect/282ebbaf-d613-4715-88e0-b3af180224a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Almost every consultancy, think tank, government agency and corporate boardroom began to think seriously about the impact AI was going to have on the world.
A competitive GOP primary really began in earnest in February, when [Ambassador Nikki Haley](https://substack.com/redirect/8807a24d-e00d-430a-8cde-0ae7c8663dc3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) jumped into the race against former President Donald Trump. Over the course of the next few months, [entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy](https://substack.com/redirect/6bb05c49-96a4-4e4b-a409-3ea96f5dedf0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Miami mayor Francis Suarez](https://substack.com/redirect/e6583567-657e-4687-8e7d-3ce9fb611fad?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Governor Ron DeSantis](https://substack.com/redirect/70d7d4cf-72df-491e-b706-7922d9f9706c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Governor Chris Christie](https://substack.com/redirect/f62da92f-d412-4abc-b23f-d2a0d4a8baf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Governor Doug Burgum](https://substack.com/redirect/9bac388b-a9c5-41b6-a454-68605c7f9d62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and others joined her. By year end, several candidates had exited the race. (_**Full disclosure: I 've spent time with all of these candidates and am Co-Chair of Nikki Haley's New Hampshire effort**_). To read more about my support for Ambassador Haley, please see my piece "[Haley Will Make America Strong Again](https://substack.com/redirect/f878d0c4-1cb7-4122-a7ef-93ce9ae8660b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/f878d0c4-1cb7-4122-a7ef-93ce9ae8660b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)| | |
#### [Haley Will Make America Strong Again](https://substack.com/redirect/f878d0c4-1cb7-4122-a7ef-93ce9ae8660b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| December 6, 2023
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/f878d0c4-1cb7-4122-a7ef-93ce9ae8660b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
And 2023 was a year in which the world's fragile geopolitical balances seemed to be falling apart. The ongoing war in Ukraine was briefly out of the limelight as the world watched in horror as Hamas terrorists brutally attacked Israel. [In Latin America, Venezuela voted to claim sovereignty over 60% of its neighbor Guyana's lands and ownership of one of the world's largest oil fields](https://substack.com/redirect/e9087f4f-43a9-4486-93e5-e371488c88e5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Coups in Africa continued with militaries taking control of Gabon and Niger.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vtLYywCTo-q_VgzT-uGMcg9-i2NElY2mQvreYEKsdRY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=140323185)
In a year that was rocked by war, geopolitical chaos, economic concerns, political upheaval, and technological uncertainty, humorist Dave Berry reminds us not to forget the environmental disasters that are unfolding before our eyes:
> _"[On the environmental front, the northeastern United States is blanketed under a thick cloud of smoke caused by the spontaneous combustion of a Canadian moose herd. Environmental experts agree that because of global climate change this kind of thing will happen more and more often unless everyone buys a Tesla. And the situation only worsens in July as large areas of the U.S. experience high temperatures as a result of "summer," a meteorological phenomenon that environmental experts say is caused by global climate change and is going to occur more and more frequently, and we frankly might not be able to build Teslas fast enough to stop it](https://substack.com/redirect/7a0c123f-53ed-4604-961b-6d0c8031f220?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."_
As I've stressed before, **uncertainty and change are unavoidable realities of life.** Yet all of us are asked to make decisions in the face of these fluid dynamics. What's the best way to do so? Sadly, there is no one correct answer, but I believe we must look through the day-to-day noise to have any chance of identifying signals. Long-term trends that drive seemingly disconnected developments offer a compass to guide us through the numerous cross-currents that plague our lives; and as I've noted several times in the past, I believe this approach is at least marginally more useful than my **[Ouija board](https://substack.com/redirect/b8c426bc-8bee-47a3-9d0e-c86f73051df5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** or **[Magic 8 ball](https://substack.com/redirect/87bff817-d712-4d92-8659-9a3f3f435b8c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
[ORDER VIKRAM'S NEW BOOK](https://substack.com/redirect/c121794d-5ca9-462a-8cfa-216f61ec6e95?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Unlike many others who tend to make predictions on a one-year view, I opt for a 5 year look as I believe time allows signals to surface amidst the ubiquitous noise. I've been doing this since 2012 and have publicly posted my predictions since January 2015. (Links: **[2015](https://substack.com/redirect/5e27ef58-a6b1-4d7e-9996-18260d9e2b50?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , **[2016](https://substack.com/redirect/fd6c5e0f-f94e-450a-ad5c-14cf2c36427b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , **[2017](https://substack.com/redirect/a3b95950-cbba-4425-a47c-99878e64c33f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , **[2018](https://substack.com/redirect/4b0cd398-4b02-438d-9f52-65b08e6a2388?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , **[2019](https://substack.com/redirect/dc194277-146e-4d39-a002-5f1c3e830741?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , **[2020](https://substack.com/redirect/fd9954e6-b854-4a3c-aba1-340ba6809439?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , **[2021](https://substack.com/redirect/fe9c16af-a751-4fea-a3ac-448053eb491d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , **[2022](https://substack.com/redirect/c41e65c5-dd9e-48be-9b67-7953406a25fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) , [2023](https://substack.com/redirect/1c8c0cf7-2c0f-4823-894d-f1afb5c09b1e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))**. I'd encourage you to revisit any or all of them, not just to see how wrong (and sometimes right!) I can be, but perhaps also to notice how the mere act of considering alternatives can be constructive.
It's in the spirit of thinking differently and embracing uncertainty that I offer you this year's set of global developments to watch over the next five years.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b98cdfa6-9656-475a-ad17-ed13e73d84b9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
1. [SpaceX](https://substack.com/redirect/d3632d6e-d272-41f5-9dab-a1aed10bb909?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (or its Starlink subsidiary) goes public. The offering leads to an investor stampede into space assets, fueling what eventually turns into the largest investment opportunity of the 21st century. [A multi-trillion dollar commercial space economy emerges](https://substack.com/redirect/3f124036-c6da-42df-9118-1dee62d8f401?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
2. [Deepfakes are acknowledged as a major threat to society](https://substack.com/redirect/7ea6727b-83a9-4ac5-b450-9ea4b9e0f8dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as they compound the mental health crisis by removing all sense of objectivity. _[Mission: Impossible - Dead Reckoning Part One](https://substack.com/redirect/68fc9775-158b-4315-bb4a-04ba0b14d940?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) _proves prophetic as citizens everywhere question whether they know anything. Psychiatric wards overflow.
3. [Despite significant push-back from environmental groups, deep sea mining takes off as a mix of start-ups and national mining companies start to extract polymetallic nodules from the seabed](https://substack.com/redirect/a7564cc8-c033-4e4e-9962-9e84d41388c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The first underwater human colonies are established in the [Clarion Clipperton Zone](https://substack.com/redirect/21502127-e319-4520-ad69-7a5de6ad9c35?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as nations compete to secure [new supplies of critical commodities](https://substack.com/redirect/883fa909-7ca4-4224-bc44-dfbad6e30e75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7d1c9b0f-f52b-48d7-a9d2-b6f1381b9915?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: [https://www.scientificamerican.com/article/deep-sea-mining-could-begin-soon-regulated-or-not/](https://substack.com/redirect/a7564cc8-c033-4e4e-9962-9e84d41388c0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
4. After years of a [tight labor market](https://substack.com/redirect/f00a287d-ef96-4fb5-8a00-eb43650be75b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), automated manufacturing and artificial intelligence eliminate tens of millions of jobs. [Labor and management avoid major disruptions as union leaders accept less pay for more workers in an effort to preserve jobs (and union membership)](https://substack.com/redirect/f00a287d-ef96-4fb5-8a00-eb43650be75b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [The six hour workday](https://substack.com/redirect/507efbe8-9c1e-49be-83cb-f8f170948c8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) becomes increasingly common as does [the four day workweek](https://substack.com/redirect/7f7158f1-9986-43cc-a939-0387b37a76b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
5. [Quantum computing](https://substack.com/redirect/d5ad522a-bf8d-49ad-97b2-8d570fecde6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) finally demonstrates commercial and [military value](https://substack.com/redirect/a97c23cc-09c8-4ffa-ab4f-d99ec3beed89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), sparking global competition to unlock next generation innovation capacity. The promise of being able to address humanity's toughest challenges is delicately balanced against the perils of [the military power it might confer](https://substack.com/redirect/f9d9568a-5141-4066-b37e-0ae047ed6fe2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [The United States and China divert tens of billions of dollars from their defense budgets to support quantum research](https://substack.com/redirect/2d03d57d-d7c9-4f95-9157-8d80d98e2f98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Michio Kaku's book _[Quantum Supremacy](https://substack.com/redirect/252c58de-aaff-49b6-9e38-44c0d9b7f8a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ becomes required reading within the Pentagon.

Source: [https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2022-05-02/nutrien-boosts-outlook-for-potash-sales-as-fertilizer-surges](https://substack.com/redirect/617df02b-3ff2-4806-8c6f-446f675ab827?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
16. Corporate boardrooms around the world increasingly return to long-term profit maximization as their sole focus. "[The Social Responsibility of Business Is To Increase Its Profits" by Milton Friedman](https://substack.com/redirect/dd216d4a-9f36-4452-adfc-19f29da922da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) becomes required reading at many business schools. Corporate philanthropy plunges, but the drop is more than offset by charitable donations from individuals and foundations.
17. Recognizing that ongoing military support for wars against the China-Russia-Iran axis have reduced [Western ammunition stockpiles to dangerously low levels](https://substack.com/redirect/1d0dab15-e5e6-47be-9542-2e888a9a83d9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the Pentagon coordinates a global mobilization effort to restore the [Arsenal of Democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/aabf239d-c1e2-4cd8-8e6e-4d0ba26a695e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with specific attention on[ replenishing missile inventories](https://substack.com/redirect/4e1f10bc-d04f-4afd-85e9-d77529db66fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The process reveals uncomfortable [American military dependence on Chinese supply chains](https://substack.com/redirect/127344f7-138c-4cd0-8b14-a1c4152b55c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..vtLYywCTo-q_VgzT-uGMcg9-i2NElY2mQvreYEKsdRY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=140323185)
18. [Artificial intelligence compounds celebrity inequality as the famous become instantly available in all formats everywhere always](https://substack.com/redirect/33396241-6b3c-4415-a2d7-b982f9b775ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [Rather than undermine the power of the most popular people, artificial intelligence enhances it](https://substack.com/redirect/17d0e7f0-f69a-43ae-982b-ebd5a35ac79f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
19. Protection of [critical civilian infrastructure](https://substack.com/redirect/870030d7-38af-4f8e-9962-58b1646cdf18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (CCI) becomes a major political issue in the United States as increasingly frequent disruptions lead to popular attention on [vulnerabilities to the electricity grid](https://substack.com/redirect/7a509aab-d037-4a7a-950c-db5bf873575e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), water supply, and medical systems. [After a solar storm disrupts major portions of North America's grid, NASA begins lobbying intensely for a focus on improving planetary resilience](https://substack.com/redirect/13da09f7-1835-484d-a727-0f88f817ab31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[](https://substack.com/redirect/38504f35-37fd-401b-afde-8c30e9f16b18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
20. [Iran teeters on the edge of a regime-changing revolution](https://substack.com/redirect/5e64a6e1-1cf9-46ed-a2a4-20dda00dae4a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) but, with counsel from Beijing, Tehran quells freedom-seeking protestors in a violent military crackdown. The Azadi Square Massacre leaves tens of thousands of Iranian citizens dead but exposes [Tehran as weaker than believed](https://substack.com/redirect/4c69e307-8185-4054-91a1-f34a7ed464cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
21. [The United States finally adopts an "all of the above" energy policy that leads to lower inflation, a safer world, and a better environment](https://substack.com/redirect/213b0db7-7921-4f93-a90c-f2be57b9f03b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). [An American nuclear renaissance takes place](https://substack.com/redirect/7575b581-e37e-4512-ba91-579945788303?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Investors pour in billions to develop [practical fusion reactors](https://substack.com/redirect/808d8ea7-6c2d-4f46-b803-a11c59e47279?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

22. [Milan fashion house Prada](https://substack.com/redirect/49819222-7088-434e-b814-ec8a1e72502b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) invests billions into a joint-venture with Starbucks to roll out the [Starbucks Reserve](https://substack.com/redirect/2c772368-b161-4eec-8db8-0d19986fc2de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) concept globally. Dubai becomes home to the world's largest Prada Starbucks Reserve cafe.
23. [The military base that controls US surveillance satellites in Asia, Joint Defense Facility Pine Gap, located in the middle of Australia](https://substack.com/redirect/1cfcdb98-8bdd-40ff-bea5-8a5c002af3d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), suffers a debilitating attack from a barrage of hypersonic missiles believed to be launched from [Chinese fishing vessels near the Solomon Islands](https://substack.com/redirect/f3ffe536-d8a8-42cc-a55b-776aa3677607?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). As Washington prepares for war with China, evidence emerges that a rogue artificial intelligence in Chinese defense systems might have directed the attack.
24. The much heralded [high speed train between Las Vegas and Los Angeles ](https://substack.com/redirect/545bb613-47eb-4bd0-a8e0-26e8daf2d458?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)encounters numerous delay and cost-overruns but still manages to open in time for the [2028 Summer Olympics in Los Angeles](https://substack.com/redirect/c25b9584-e5ad-4c54-be8d-04c7b3fcc4d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Each year, I end my predictions with the prescient words of John Kenneth Galbraith, who eloquently captures the essence of forecasters. There are, he notes, two types: "those who don't know and those who don't know they don't know." Feel free to decide which you think I am, but I do hope that these 24 possibilities are **[useful in spurring your thoughts](https://substack.com/redirect/b26ff7ef-4d06-4a5e-9b67-f6429f3f63d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
Best wishes for a happy, healthy, and productive 2024!
#### _~ Vikram_

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of two books, _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/956be1f5-04be-4d0f-b5e4-02decb8041b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/377396fd-30d9-4194-8c5d-f1a8b16fdff6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.

My annual musings about possible developments that warrant consideration | | | Jan 8 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- 2023 was a year of shocking developments on many fronts. to the ongoing war in Ukraine and , the world felt like it was unraveling in front of our eyes. Banks failed, credit card debt ballooned, inflation dissipated, and central banks "paused" their regular rhythm of raising rates--all while American consumers couldn't get enough of , . And in a market with insufficient workers, . There are many useful and comprehensive discussions of the year's events, and I won't try to outdo them here. Four specific developments this year, however, warrant special comment: surging financial markets, increasing worries around artificial intelligence, the beginning of the US presidential election cycle, and rapidly deteriorating geopolitical dynamics. | | | | ---|---|--- | Jan 7 | After digesting the shock of unexpected failures of Silicon Valley Bank, First Republic, and Credit Suisse early in the year, . Expectations of forthcoming rate cuts drove the Dow Jones Industrial Average up 13%, the S&P 500 up 24%, and the Nasdaq up 43%. All of this transpired as , , and . . . Almost every consultancy, think tank, government agency and corporate boardroom began to think seriously about the impact AI was going to have on the world. A competitive GOP primary really began in earnest in February, when jumped into the race against former President Donald Trump. Over the course of the next few months, , , , , , and others joined her. By year end, several candidates had exited the race. (Full disclosure: I 've spent time with all of these candidates and am Co-Chair of Nikki Haley's New Hampshire effort). To read more about my support for Ambassador Haley, please see my piece "." | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | December 6, 2023 | And 2023 was a year in which the world's fragile geopolitical balances seemed to be falling apart. The ongoing war in Ukraine was briefly out of the limelight as the world watched in horror as Hamas terrorists brutally attacked Israel. . Coups in Africa continued with militaries taking control of Gabon and Niger. In a year that was rocked by war, geopolitical chaos, economic concerns, political upheaval, and technological uncertainty, humorist Dave Berry reminds us not to forget the environmental disasters that are unfolding before our eyes: "." As I've stressed before, uncertainty and change are unavoidable realities of life. Yet all of us are asked to make decisions in the face of these fluid dynamics. What's the best way to do so? Sadly, there is no one correct answer, but I believe we must look through the day-to-day noise to have any chance of identifying signals. Long-term trends that drive seemingly disconnected developments offer a compass to guide us through the numerous cross-currents that plague our lives; and as I've noted several times in the past, I believe this approach is at least marginally more useful than my or . Unlike many others who tend to make predictions on a one-year view, I opt for a 5 year look as I believe time allows signals to surface amidst the ubiquitous noise. I've been doing this since 2012 and have publicly posted my predictions since January 2015. (Links: , , , , , , , , ). I'd encourage you to revisit any or all of them, not just to see how wrong (and sometimes right!) I can be, but perhaps also to notice how the mere act of considering alternatives can be constructive. It's in the spirit of thinking differently and embracing uncertainty that I offer you this year's set of global developments to watch over the next five years. | | ---|---|--- 1. body:

---

**The election was over...**
**But then the Democrats stole it in the dead of night.**
_4am ballot drops._
_Illegal out-of-state ballots._
_Corrupted election files._
The Democrats were **NEVER** going to let Donald Trump win.
And they got **away with it** in 2020.
But this election year, I know I speak for every patriot when I say:
**WE WILL NEVER LET IT HAPPEN AGAIN.**

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Their rise and fall
body:
Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic?

This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z8g35t8ngdc52khcvpdfbeclkmeciir0rl8i5p38_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctj61or4chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9gd7fpo8cqncj4a5h80fusljspalao28nk5or48_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctj61or4chh2bs) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z67bnote438rlo10bl445mdpllrjkmr1tlqn0ci0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctj61or4chh2bs)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvc55vp29mih98nprpacp1kh6fbb84gfnjf56edo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctj61or4chh2bs)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Broad=20+=20Liberty=20Staff?=
subject: Broad + Liberty and PoliticsPA Announce New Strategic Partnership for 2024
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fe63d19d0fab/broad-liberty-and-politicspa-announce-new-strategic-partnership-for-2024?e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| | | |
---
|
# **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**Contact: ** **Olivia DeMarco, for Broad + Liberty
[odemarco@broadandliberty.com](mailto:odemarco@broadandliberty.com)**
---
|
# **Broad \+ Liberty and PoliticsPA Announce New Strategic Partnership for 2024**
---
| | | |
### _Two premiere Pennsylvania digital media outlets announce a partnership that will have a profound impact on Pennsylvania's media landscape in the critical 2024 election cycle._
---
| **Harrisburg, PA – January 8, 2024 –** Pennsylvania will be at the center of the political world in 2024, and today two PA-based digital news outlets announced a partnership that will keep readers close to every statewide twist and turn. Beginning today, Broad \+ Liberty and PoliticsPA will operate together in a strategic partnership. The relationship will expand Broad \+ Liberty’s growing impact in Harrisburg and statewide, and strengthen PoliticsPA’s capacity for nonpartisan campaign coverage. All staff from both outlets will continue in their current roles, including PoliticsPA Managing Editor Steve Ulrich and Broad + Liberty Chief Investigative Reporter Todd Shepherd. Working together with the current owners of PoliticsPA, Broad + Liberty’s current publisher and Chief Executive Officer, Terry Tracy, will oversee day-to-day operations. **[PoliticsPA](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=23baae06a5&e=b7b3eddce2) **is the longest-running website devoted to Pennsylvania political news. It launched in 2001 as a clearinghouse for Harrisburg gossip and made the transition to hard news in 2007 when it came under its current ownership. Throughout its existence, PoliticsPA kept its focus on topics that matter to political insiders.
**PoliticsPA Co-+owners Larry Ceisler, Jeff Jubelirer and David Urban:** **_“The three of us come from different parts of the political spectrum, but we all share a deep appreciation for great reporting. We are proud of PoliticsPA’s track record over the past seventeen years including thousands of scoops and stories about our fascinating Commonwealth. The collaborative effort we’re announcing today with Broad + Liberty will ensure that the longest-running political news website in Pennsylvania continues to deliver great journalism for years to come.”_ **

Founded in 2019,**[Broad + Liberty](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=28dc78dc7f&e=b7b3eddce2) **is known for its hard-hitting investigative journalism and coverage of the political landscape in southeastern PA. In 2023, it began to expand its coverage into Harrisburg and other key markets around the commonwealth of Pennsylvania.
**Broad + Liberty Chief Executive Officer Terry Tracy: ** _**“In four short years, Broad + Liberty has made a significant impact in southeastern Pennsylvania with fact-based news and divergent political commentary that readers cannot find anywhere else. Our partnership with PoliticsPA will enhance our presence in the state capitol and add a new dimension to our coverage of statewide journalism.” **_ Readers can expect both Broad \+ Liberty and PoliticsPA to maintain their respective identities. The partnership will result in more and better coverage by allowing both outlets access to more resources, including technological support, staff capacity and expertise.
**About Broad + Liberty ** Broad \+ Liberty is a nonprofit, 501c3 organization that provides a forum for thought-provoking, shareable ideas for free thinkers in Pennsylvania and beyond. Founded in 2019 and based in Philadelphia, it is a nonprofit built to promote innovative ideas, diverse and disruptive viewpoints, and positive policies that hit home for our readers, supporters and followers. For more information, visit [broadandliberty.com](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f03bef6a53&e=b7b3eddce2).
**About PoliticsPA** Launched in October 2001, PoliticsPA, LLC is the is the longest-running website devoted to Pennsylvania political news and the most comprehensive resource for observers of the Pennsylvania political scene. Its owners since 2007 are Larry Ceisler of Ceisler Media & Issue Advocacy; Jeff Jubelirer of Bellevue Communications; and David Urban of BGR Group. For more information, visit [politicspa.com](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=46417cc37e&e=b7b3eddce2). ####
---
| | | |
---
| _Copyright © 2024 Broad + Liberty, All rights reserved._
You're getting Broad + Liberty updates due to your interest in our site -- and stories for free thinkers in the Philly region and beyond.

**Our mailing address is:**
Broad + Liberty
323 West Front Street
Suite 200
Media, Pa 19063
[Add us to your address book](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8967bc46c9&e=b7b3eddce2)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a3b749423c&e=b7b3eddce2&c=c52f96ebe7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a3b749423c&e=b7b3eddce2&c=c52f96ebe7).
---

name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: January 6th, 2021
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Hey – my name is Harry Dunn and three years ago, I defended the U.S. Capitol and our nation’s leaders against a violent insurrection.
Since that day, I vowed to help ensure that never happens again.
That’s why I’m officially running for Congress in MD-03 to be the change I want to see for our country and our democracy. I’d be honored for you to join me and Seth Moulton in jump starting this campaign by chipping in a split donation of $25 or anything you can: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
For the last sixteen years, I was a police officer for the United States Capitol where I saw millions of people visit to exercise their rights and lobby their representatives.
And trust me, every political agenda you can think of walked through those doors.
It didn’t matter to me if you were there as a Democrat, Republican, or Independent though, because my job was the same - protect our elected officials and ensure everyone could safely participate in our democracy.
But three years ago, under the Capitol Rotunda that took my breath away each day, I was immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, death, fear, blood, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, bigotry, and heroism for what felt like endless hours alongside fellow officers.
It was unlike anything we had seen before. Sure, there were heated political moments over the years. But this was different.
It was pepper spray, bear spray, and even WD-40 to our faces as we fought back rioters in tactical gear using anything they could as a weapon. It was disorienting chaos as we tried to block every entrance while our elected leaders and capitol staff ran to safety. It was a direct attack on our democracy.
Many people have tried to deny what happened that day – including some of the same people who stood behind us as we protected them. They’ve diluted the story and muddied the facts to preserve their own political agenda.
So I’ve made it a personal mission to share my story, speak truth to power, and work to ensure this never happens again. That’s why a few weeks ago, I retired from the police force, and why I announced my campaign to run for Congress in Maryland’s Third Congressional District.
I’m running because Maryland deserves a Congressman who will put the country above their party, and put the constitution above themselves. This will be a competitive race, so I’ve set an ambitious goal to raise $500,000 within the first week of my campaign. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Seth Moulton to become a Founding Donor and help hit our goal before midnight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]
Thank you for reading,
Harry Dunn
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/m24-dunn]

name: Ohio Senate Alert (via UTS)
subject: With Sherrod Brown in a total dead heat with no real winner ahead, Republicans are anxious to pull out any trick they can to score a cheap point.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76686079/448166518/18334046?refcode=UTS_FR_90DC_240108_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxZjYwMmEwLTJlYWUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LYX722IOpDI8AMX_PX_V-QFVONxdvM6z74dzjIrWsMw=)
**NEW POLLS are in, and they're showing an incredibly close race for Senator Sherrod Brown in Ohio** — a pivotal battleground for maintaining our Senate majority!
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76686086/448166524/-126978672?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DC_240108_2_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIxZjYwMmEwLTJlYWUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=LYX722IOpDI8AMX_PX_V-QFVONxdvM6z74dzjIrWsMw=)
**Imagine this: a Senate controlled by a GOP majority.** It's a scenario we must prevent to uphold the values and progress we cherish. That's why supporting Democrats like Sherrod Brown is crucial, and the time is now.
With this race in a total dead heat with no real winner ahead, Republicans are anxious to pull out any trick they can to score a cheap point.

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Just a couple of months away
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Peter -
Our primary election here in Texas is just a couple of months away in March, and I need your help to be successful in this first step of my journey towards re-election.
[If you're willing to send even a small contribution](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mg0UwCrauVFBjWwwYjUeRpuheMKI_yhDbA32LbFBJfPZGnBZsqCWiRnweVHviH8HPQkyMcQhIkNPkMic_m1SLGiiaJ0qR8xAXy1OPGIQ4Uz_FlpudQOEGz0fsJVp1LacmPFYvl6_whtW8pQUnPbYGu9upd5DRaltSnvuozjxJnIf12z58cQxu037Dx6M3D_scdcvQC0WnndbZooqL1EIL6hrcOpDTXxvSNURNwxikbmIKCSuRA3Jv2Ux1sAF8wHtmDGkyU2USwJLdTiwApV_9D0mQt2oBhUkBSACR-yza0rXjJOn8mSSw2BYwZ5MVzAlEEHCLFmEyqhFlj3GhdJes9KWavxdSjUaRkI51tpFG9aD7LwkKrjr5Q==&c=cWFvUPKkVO59Yn8rX80IoW-7xWzmSospxZBBwNrJa5LPPAP-RNO7qQ==&ch=lnAEtXELGilRofFFQ_nFQk1pQXeB2h_ckZ7lQfsYQAi_zjrMzc3LWw==), it will go a long way to help ensure I am re-elected to Congress and continue to fight on the issues that matter most to you.
First, I want to explain to you why I am running for re-election.
Many are choosing not to, for understandable reasons. Congress has become a toxic place, with an incentive structure that makes it more rewarding to be a provocative performance artist than an actual legislator. This disappointing moment in our politics is causing many people to retire from Congress and choose not to seek re-election.
But, to me, that is all the more reason to stay in the fight.
At a time when it seems Congress is devoid of real, principled conservative leaders it's more important than ever that serious people remain in public service. And that's what I've tried to provide since being elected to Congress in 2018 - principled, conservative leadership and a focus on the hard but important work of policy making.
We've made a lot of progress together since then. I sit on the Energy and Commerce Committee, one of the most powerful committees in Congress, and fight every day to protect our vital oil and gas industry and restore American energy independence. As Chairman of the Task Force to Combat the Mexican Drug Cartels, I'm developing concrete solutions to destroy the people responsible for the tens of thousands of Americans who are killed every year with fentanyl poison. And I'm leading the effort in Congress to pass needed policy changes into law to secure our southern border.
I take my job as a lawmaker and representative for Texas's Second Congressional District seriously. It has been an honor to serve my state and country these past few years, and I am excited to continue that service even in the face of this challenging political environment.
But I cannot win re-election without resources. That's why I am asking committed patriots like you from across the country to please stand with me as I seek re-election and make a small donation to my campaign. You can do so at the link below.
---
| | | [SUPPORT MY 2024 RE-ELECTION CAMPAIGN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mg0UwCrauVFBjWwwYjUeRpuheMKI_yhDbA32LbFBJfPZGnBZsqCWiRnweVHviH8HPQkyMcQhIkNPkMic_m1SLGiiaJ0qR8xAXy1OPGIQ4Uz_FlpudQOEGz0fsJVp1LacmPFYvl6_whtW8pQUnPbYGu9upd5DRaltSnvuozjxJnIf12z58cQxu037Dx6M3D_scdcvQC0WnndbZooqL1EIL6hrcOpDTXxvSNURNwxikbmIKCSuRA3Jv2Ux1sAF8wHtmDGkyU2USwJLdTiwApV_9D0mQt2oBhUkBSACR-yza0rXjJOn8mSSw2BYwZ5MVzAlEEHCLFmEyqhFlj3GhdJes9KWavxdSjUaGiMGPcpfRIE=&c=cWFvUPKkVO59Yn8rX80IoW-7xWzmSospxZBBwNrJa5LPPAP-RNO7qQ==&ch=lnAEtXELGilRofFFQ_nFQk1pQXeB2h_ckZ7lQfsYQAi_zjrMzc3LWw==)
---
| Thank you for our continued support.
In Service,
---
|
---
| Dan Crenshaw
---
| |
---
| P.S. If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007
---

---

# **🚨 $2.1 Million - THANK YOU 🇺🇸**
**As we enter 2024, our campaign has more than $2.1 million cash on hand because of the generosity and support of YOU and all of TEAM CISCOMANI. Thank you!**

As Washington D.C. and other outside groups spend more than $1.2 million on deceitful television ads, billboards and more, it’s clear what kind of campaign the D.C.-Democrats will run this cycle.

**We are equipped with a war chest to defend AZ-06, push back on their lies, and continue fighting for our hometown in Congress.**

Laura and I are so grateful for all of the Arizonans who have invested in our race and in defending this seat. It is truly humbling to begin 2024 in this strong position. While we flipped this district in 2022, we must grow our majority in the House in 2024 and keep up the fight in Washington to take our country back.

**I stand humbled and ready to defend #AZ06 in 2024.**

name: Shift WA
subject: Thank you
body:
The entire team here at Shift WA would like to extend our heartfelt gratitude for your help in our end-of-year fundraising efforts! | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62667178:sZcyloipN:m:1:2610672541:BA63E2470736A3125084115185C42F07:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

The entire team here at Shift WA would like to extend our heartfelt gratitude for your help in our end-of-year fundraising efforts! Thanks to generous supporters like you, we will continue our mission of keeping people like you aware of key political developments by providing coverage on crucial stories that the mainstream media outlets simply ignore.

Now that 2023 is behind us, our focus is on the upcoming 2024 legislative session and the state-level campaigns which are already off and running, from the governor to state legislative contests. We are closely monitoring developments during session and on key races so we can keep our audience well-informed. With your continued support, we can shed light on the stories that you will not hear about anywhere else.

In the upcoming weeks, we need your help to reach more readers. We hope you will consider spreading the word about Shift WA and our work providing an important conservative media perspective.

If you agree it's time the Shift the political direction of Washington state, please share our organization with your friends and family!

Thank you once again,

The Shift WA Team
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62667179:sZcyloipN:m:1:2610672541:BA63E2470736A3125084115185C42F07:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14387789&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/osZcyloipN).
---

subject: Difficult times
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

There’s no denying it, Peter. These are difficult times.
But when faced with times like these, we can’t run. We can’t hide. We can’t give up.
We must rise to the challenge.
So we are asking you to join the fight.
The prospect of Donald Trump back in the White House or Kari Lake in the Senate is an existential threat to our democracy. If we lose our democracy, we lose everything.
That’s why we are working to elect Ruben. Because our best chance at keeping Trump out of the White House, our best chance at holding the Senate, our best chance at delivering on all of our priorities for working families and the middle class run through this campaign in Arizona.
To put it simply: If Ruben doesn’t win, we all lose.
And that is why we are asking you for your first contribution today. Some folks chip in what they can, as little as $3 at a time. Some chip in more. But the donation itself is what matters most.
[**So please: Make a donation of whatever you can afford to Ruben’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Arizona today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240107-2-45&t=1&akid=1658%2E734936%2EVtlFOr)

name: Lexi, Team DeSantis
subject: Calendar Reminder
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
Did you hear?! A very important date is approaching in 7 DAYS, Friend. Here's what you need to know.

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr0k91k5ilfc154jitob34mfbl9a000suuv4rlno_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctgm4oj2cph2bs)
---
Friend! Did you hear?! **WE ARE LESS THAN 7 DAYS AWAY FROM THE IOWA CAUCUS!** You need to see this ASAP! **We have 0 days to waste**. The _entire nation_ will be watching this caucus to see what happens... but we have just over a week to pour every effort into winning this critical Iowa nomination. If there's ever been a time to step up for a candidate,**this is it**. Nothing matters more than supporting the candidate this nation needs NOW. _**Can you help us?**_ **[>>> RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT TO HELP! <<<](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zq6p94fbibeek7tr0lnk2jlh4licl8kn9a9jo6o8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctgm4oj2cph2bs "RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT TO HELP!")** \- Lexi Team DeSantis \---------------------------Forwarded Message-------------------------
Hi Friend, We'll cut to the chase. We have just 7 days before we--
* Prove to the radical Left that we have what it takes to win.

* Shock every person who has bought into the fake narratives of the liberal media throughout this race.

* Take a giant leap forward toward winning for the American people.

With your support, we can make sure that January 15th, 2024 goes down as the most incredible day of our campaign yet. _But we only have 7 DAYS to do it._ We promise you, that we are putting in the work to win the Iowa Caucus. However, we're fighting against $40,000,000 that has been spent against Ron DeSantis. **This is where you come in.** What you can give today is what will drive our actions tomorrow and the final 6 days before ballots are cast.
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE NOW!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zip0arjs5gbqqi1sr706d5c1o9uukgrcqqs67itg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctgm4oj2cph2bs)
---
We've reached out for your support because WE ARE COUNTING ON YOU to help us take this fight to the finish line. Our 7-DAY SPRINT starts now. Any small amount helps, Friend. Please, **___[_give what you can_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zclpst0ok1cq8iar6r3m4tb7sf2jievuqv5i0k20_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctgm4oj2cph2bs)___** __ before we take on the caucus. Thank you for your support,
Team DeSantis

---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zv7slnqj7lku2a6bs9oabincoam8tefki6lfstug_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctgm4oj2cph2bs)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9nq938irgm866sf42e41dnvmrfmkjvsoo8rhah8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctgm4oj2cph2bs)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

WE ARE LESS THAN 7 DAYS AWAY FROM THE IOWA CAUCUS! You need to see this ASAP! We have 0 days to waste. The entire nation will be watching this caucus to see what happens... but we have just over a week to pour every effort into winning this critical Iowa nomination. If there's ever been a time to step up for a candidate,this is it. Nothing matters more than supporting the candidate this nation needs NOW. Can you help us? "RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT TO HELP!" \- Lexi Team DeSantis \---------------------------Forwarded Message------------------------- Hi Friend, We'll cut to the chase. We have just 7 days before we-- Prove to the radical Left that we have what it takes to win. Shock every person who has bought into the fake narratives of the liberal media throughout this race. Take a giant leap forward toward winning for the American people. With your support, we can make sure that January 15th, 2024 goes down as the most incredible day of our campaign yet. But we only have 7 DAYS to do it. We promise you, that we are putting in the work to win the Iowa Caucus. However, we're fighting against $40,000,000 that has been spent against Ron DeSantis. This is where you come in. What you can give today is what will drive our actions tomorrow and the final 6 days before ballots are cast. | | We've reached out for your support because WE ARE COUNTING ON YOU to help us take this fight to the finish line. Our 7-DAY SPRINT starts now. Any small amount helps, Friend. Please, _ before we take on the caucus. Thank you for your support, Team DeSantis | | | Get to Know Ron DeSantis | | | Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children. | On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. That's why he's running for President of the United States. name: Team Casey
subject: re: Your priorities for 2024
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We’d like to hear from you.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1622%2E552475%2EyLApdJ)
Hi Peter,
We wanted to reach out real quick to bump [**this important survey**](https://go.bobcasey.com/survey/jan-2024-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20230108-1&akid=1622%2E552475%2EyLApdJ) _—_ it’ll take 2 minutes of your time.
We’re hoping to hear from as many Pennsylvanians as possible as we kick off the election year and map out our 2024 priorities.
**What is the #1 reason to defend the Democratic Senate majority this year? Click this link to let us know your thoughts:**[**https://go.bobcasey.com/survey/jan-2024-priorities-survey**](https://go.bobcasey.com/survey/jan-2024-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20230108-1&akid=1622%2E552475%2EyLApdJ)
Thanks for your support,
Team Casey
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: BC4S
Date: Thurs. Jan 4th, 2024 at 5:00 PM_
Peter, 2024 is finally here, and we’re getting our campaign’s priorities in order. We’re building a team of supporters all across the Commonwealth, so we wanted to hear from you about the issues that are on your mind.
**Can you take a moment to answer this quick one-question survey?** Your opinion is important to the entire team.
[What is the #1 reason to defend our Democratic Senate Majority this year?](https://go.bobcasey.com/survey/jan-2024-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20230108-1&akid=1622%2E552475%2EyLApdJ) Select an issue: Protecting Democracy Supporting our seniors Stopping cuts to Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid Fighting for workers' rights Ensuring our veterans have access to the care they need Preventing a national abortion ban Strengthening gun safety laws Creating good-paying jobs Lowering costs for working families [Take the Survey ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/survey/jan-2024-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20230108-1&akid=1622%2E552475%2EyLApdJ)
---
Bob is running for re-election because there is still work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results that make hardworking Pennsylvanians' lives a little bit easier.
He’s not done fighting for us in the Senate, but in order to reflect your priorities in our campaign, he needs to hear from you. That’s why we put together a short survey to hear your thoughts.
[**Take our one-question survey today about defending Senate control in 2024. We want to make sure we hear from everyone on our team.**](https://go.bobcasey.com/survey/jan-2024-priorities-survey/?refcode=em20230108-1&akid=1622%2E552475%2EyLApdJ)
Thank you for sharing your thoughts,
Team Casey

* * *
To receive texts from Team Casey text TEAM to 51041. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1622%2E552475%2EyLApdJ)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1622%2E552475%2EyLApdJ)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

clean_body: Now we know where Soros’ MILLIONS went...| | | | | Patriot, Before the 2024 cycle even began, shadowy billionaire George Soros snuck $50 million into this election to try and stop our movement and help Crooked Joe BUY the White House. And as if that weren’t enough, a Soros-linked PAC poured on $70 million more. Now, we know where the Soros money has been going... ...to fund Crooked Joe and his accomplices’ Third World scheme to REMOVE my name from the 2024 ballot and ERASE your sacred right to vote! These Soros-funded Democrats will stop at nothing until every last “Trump ballot” in the country is NULLIFIED. But I also never quit. I will never stop fighting for YOU ! And now, the U.S. SUPREME COURT has agreed to take up our case to remain on the 2024 ballot! But to win this Supreme Court showdown against the Soros-funded Left, I will be the first to humbly admit that we’ll need the backing of grassroots donors likeYOU. | | - Thank you, Donald J.
