name: Joe Kent
subject: Did you see me on Fox News?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund
body:
Dear Peter,
I was on Jesse Watters Primetime to discuss the Biden Administration's efforts to distract the American people from his radical agenda.
Democrats talk about January 6 to divert from their policy failures.
Marie Perez and Biden are not focused on the issues that matter to the American people. Rampant inflation, open borders, and rising crime are all the results of Democrat policies.
You can watch my interview here: [https://joekentforcongress.com/fox-news-joe-kent-discusses-biden-and-jan-6/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/LYrXQNlvGu6DcRwA2dp5gg/asPIanI8nyRI6REBs0ANIw)
Joe Biden is calling his opponents "tyrants" while weaponizing the DOJ and FBI against parents who protest at school board meetings. The Democrats are desperately trying to distract from their unconstitutional record, but the American people are experiencing the consequences of their policies daily.
While parent's rights are under attack, lethal drugs are pouring over our border, and inflation is skyrocketing, Democrats like Biden and my opponent are focused on dividing Americans.
Please donate to ensure I defeat my radical opponent at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/1Xub892OJCDQZ84wH4KP9XJQ/asPIanI8nyRI6REBs0ANIw). You can also opt to make it a recurring contribution by clicking the "Make this Monthly" button.
We need leaders who will address inflation and secure our southern border. The Democrats are focused on demonizing their political opponents instead of helping the American people.
Please watch my interview here: [https://joekentforcongress.com/fox-news-joe-kent-discusses-biden-and-jan-6/](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/LYrXQNlvGu6DcRwA2dp5gg/asPIanI8nyRI6REBs0ANIw)
Respectfully,
Joe Kent
Paid for by the Joe Kent Victory Fund

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: My life changed forever 13 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Our lives can change so quickly. Mine did 13 years ago today when I was holding a meeting with constituents at a local Safeway in Tucson and a shooter opened fire.
I was shot in the head, and then the shooter turned on my staff and constituents. Eighteen people were shot, and six innocent lives were lost in the attack:
Christina-Taylor Green.
Phyllis Schneck.
Gabe Zimmerman.
Dorwan Stoddard.
Dorothy Morris.
Judge John Roll.
I will carry their memories with me forever, and I will always hold a special place in my heart for the survivors whose lives changed so drastically—just like mine.
The anniversary of this shooting is a painful one, but it also serves as a reminder of the way that the Tucson community came together in the wake of tragedy. I learned how to walk, talk, and become a stronger Gabby—a healing journey that I continue on to this day.
Then, two years after I was shot, another life-altering shooting occurred—this time at Sandy Hook Elementary in Newtown, where 20 children and six adults were murdered.
I knew in that moment I had to do something, and so I founded GIFFORDS with the mission to end gun violence and create a safer future for our nation’s communities.
Over the past 11 years, we’ve reinvigorated the movement to save lives and take on the gun lobby. But there’s still a lot of work to be done. Just like my recovery, progress happens step by step. I know that together, we can continue to save lives and make a difference in the fight to end gun violence.
Thank you for continuing to stand by my side in this crucial fight.
All my best,
Gabby
* * *

**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws. A contribution to GIFFORDS PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**
**[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan24.i9S2EM&refcode=em240108-1-60&t=1&akid=7323%2E3935704%2E0uW3J4)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=7323%2E3935704%2E0uW3J4) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

But it’s not just the FBI, it’s the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney’s offices in Brooklyn, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. clean_body: Should the NRA be allowed to keep its tax-exempt status? | = DID YOU KNOW? The IRS forbids tax-exempt organizations from influencing legislation as their primary purpose,yet the NRA exists to influence politicians to stop any common-sense gun reform! = | Should the NRA be allowed to keep its tax-exempt status? | = = FIRST: The National Rifle Association was founded as a tax-exempt organization with the mission of promoting sports shooting and gun safety. THEN: The NRA shifted away from their mission and now exists to influence legislation that makes both gun manufacturers and GOP politicians very rich — all at the expense of our public safety. NOW: Their influence over GOP lawmakers has led to a refusal to act on common-sense gun reforms — and has cost America hundreds of thousands of lives to gun violence. The NRA has compromised our freedoms and safety, and WE, the American people, are subsidizing it! = Should the NRA be allowed to keep its tax-exempt status? | = = Thank you for your participation. -Defeat Republicans ****Defeat Republicans**** | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: Three years ago, I defended the U.S. Capitol from violent insurrectionists. Now, I'm the Democrat running for Congress in MD-03 and I hope you’ll become a Founding Donor of my campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T84f15b7b-dead-4ccd-9646-6259073017a7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8ccb4ad3-7386-44f9-8501-604c36b1215e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Hi Peter, it's Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee. I've got an important announcement: I'm hoping to make my return to DC – but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional district in the U.S. House. [I’m counting on your support to get there. Can you rush $10 or more to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7313f7f9-5f86-4190-9265-e4928ceabc0f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $10 >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1f2ebd54-0847-4cae-9654-69c695f10b71/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Here’s the thing Peter, I never thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!) But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself. So when I put on my Capitol police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol, it felt right. But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol. I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists. I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn. [Please, can you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action of $10 or $25 to become a Founding Donor? I seriously appreciate any help you can give today >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf5dd4755-314a-4dce-8811-0a7355ca4760/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T861958ec-ec62-4675-b288-8cd1bec1ad49/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Let's do it, Harry Dunn
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter) | [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---

PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208

name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie=20Clark?=
subject: Come See Your Next Congresswoman!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
Upcoming tour: Coming to a location near you | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6867714802ac/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12671929?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=6fbb072689&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Peter,

**I’m proud to announce to you that in just one week, on __Jan. 15th__ , I will be bringing my campaign on a 2-week speaking tour across our great district!** As I work my way from San Antonio to El Paso, speaking at _**11-stops**_ along the way, I would like to personally invite you to come out and see me at an event in your area _**and hear my plan for the future of Texas.**_

**In this race,_our very future is at stake..._** For too long we have stood by while leaders like Tony Gonzales replace our values with their own, prioritizing personal gain over the prosperity of our people. Well, we deserve better, and **while Gonzales fights for _himself, his future, and his interests_** , **I am here to fight for _us, our future, our interests, and a better life for our people._**

**I will be the leader who will stand for what is right;_for the values, ideals, and principles that once brought us prosperity_** _._ Along this tour, you will hear my plan to restore that prosperity, by returning our district to the tried and true success of those values we hold dear.
_**Peter, I am coming your way, to show our people that a leader is here who will always fight for us._Will you come out and join me?_**_
---
| [RSVP HERE!](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=2538b06f77&e=c982eb7ad4 "RSVP HERE!")
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=582ba57393&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
|
---
|
For Our People,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23

subject: #1 Enemy of Liberal Billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Iowans For Zach Nunn
body:
I never thought this would happen

| | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680593%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=HIa4ye6lO9zl2m8o9etWug&sysid=1)
---
People look at me and don’t think that I’m the #1 enemy of liberal billionaires in the nation.
**I’m a father of 6, a Congressman, and an Air Force Reserve Lt. Colonel.**
My favorite thing to do is take my kids to football and dance practice then church on Sundays.
I love my country so much - my life is dedicated to the service of my family and Iowan community - the last thing on my mind are shady far-left donors.
But after a recent survey found that my race will be one of the closest in the nation in 2024, I called for action.
The numbers say that I’m behind by just a fraction of a percent right now - and with just the right push I’ll be able to retake the lead again.
[**Could I count on your contribution today to get my numbers back on track?**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680594%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=urUkoc%2fDvg9eeR4Umk2WOA&sysid=1)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: MIGOP E-Newsletter January 8, 2024
body:
We have a lot to update you on. | | | |
---
| [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/d88ce0f5d1c2/migop-newsletter-november-13-12671279?e=a2af77507c)
---
|
## Welcome to the MIGOP Newsletter!
Each Monday, the Michigan Republican Party sends important information about what is happening within the party, state, and nation and how you can get involved.
---
|
---
| | | Hello:

First, to paraphrase Mark Twain, **_reports of my removal as Chairwoman of the Michigan Republican Party are greatly exaggerated_**. I am still here, still fighting for our party, state, and country. Nothing has changed in terms of my commitment to my America First agenda, most especially election security. What _has_ changed, however, is that I have a greater understanding of who is sabotaging those very things from within our ranks.

Second, Malinda Pego is perpetrating a fraud. She is indeed playing a part, but it is in no way as “acting” MIGOP Chairwoman.

Finally, my administration is taking the appropriate action to hold her and the other co-conspirators accountable for the illegal actions taken at their gathering. They will be dealt with swiftly and accordingly based on the rules of the MIGOP bylaws.

In Liberty,
Kristina Karamo
Chairwoman
Michigan Republican Party

[Press Release 1/5/24](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=1f10bd590b&e=a2af77507c)
[Press Release 1/6/24](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=7238235c7b&e=a2af77507c)
[Email to Precinct Delegates 1/6/24](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=dfb107db0f&e=a2af77507c)
[MIGOP General Counsel Dan Hartman Provides Clarity to Recent Coup Attempts](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=dfc1709b77&e=a2af77507c)
---
|
---
|
---
Join fellow Republicans at special events around the state, such [Questions, Answers & Facts](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=2a5322fac9&e=a2af77507c)— _**specifically for Precinct Delegates**_ —with MIGOP Chairwoman Kristina Karamo. This week, she will be in Districts 10 (Monday, Jan 8), 6 (Tuesday, Jan 9), and 12 and 13 (Thursday, Jan 11). If you are a Precinct Delegate in one of these districts, please attend!

For more information about upcoming events, visit the [MIGOP events page](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=1af1c9d12b&e=a2af77507c).
|
---
|
---
Check out Chairwoman Karamo’s interviews with [Real](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=3f820bc117&e=a2af77507c)[ America’s Voice](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=35f1f23095&e=a2af77507c) (starting at 1:10), Fox 2’s [Let it Rip](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=8e1f45e226&e=a2af77507c), and [Worldview Report](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=97cda4e782&e=a2af77507c).

Also, the January 5 edition of _[Friday Lunch with Chair Karamo](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=4cc71ba447&e=a2af77507c)_ is available on the MIGOP website. By Noon each Friday, a new interview with the Chairwoman will be posted. All previous interviews are also available.
|
---
|
---
**SPECIAL ANNOUNCEMENT**

The MIGOP and [Check My Vote](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=033ba07db9&e=a2af77507c) have partnered together to make a pledge to Michigan voters to protect our elections. Please read their joint resolution [“Calling on All Candidates and Elected Officials to: Help Clean Up the Voter Rolls (QVF) for the 2024 Elections.”](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=6397beb543&e=a2af77507c)
|
---
| [ ](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=4d8f936334&e=a2af77507c)
---
From Chairwoman Karamo’s interview on [Real Ameri](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=1c7a68f75a&e=a2af77507c)[ca’](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=9f302a576a&e=a2af77507c)[s Voice](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=80210e7ad9&e=a2af77507c) about the importance of the Good Neighbor Program:

**_If we don’t have secure elections, we don’t have a republic. . . . We are really focused on our ground game, and we’ve developed a program called the Good Neighbor Program, where we are working to train as many Michiganders as humanly possible about how our government works and how to engage our government, which includes our election system. Our election system has been overly complicated, and most citizens don’t know how it works._** To learn more about the Good Neighbor Program, visit the **[webpage](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=66c6bb0bfe&e=a2af77507c)** or contact coordinators Ken Beyer (District 4 Chair) at **kenbeyer@protonmail.com** and Ann Clark (Wayne County Republican Committee Chair) at **annpatriot@protonmail.com**.
|
---
|
---
From _RealClearInvestigations_ by the intrepid Julie Kelly: [“The FBI-Tainted Whitmer ‘Kidnap Plot’ You’ve Heard Next to Nothing About”](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f8bf3ecd91&e=a2af77507c)

From Joe Hoft: [“Bad Actors Connected to Democrat Governor Whitmer Instill Chaos in Michigan GOP – Killing Election Integrity Efforts”](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=05a611469c&e=a2af77507c)
|
---
|
---
From The Conservative Treehouse: [“True the Vote Wins Northern Georgia District Court Case on Voter Integrity –vs– Stacy Abrams, Marc Elias and the DOJ”](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=5a2f7eeba3&e=a2af77507c)
|
---
|
---
Get involved with the Michigan Republican Party! Learn more about your county, district, and state party leadership at [migop.org](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=940d45ed0c&e=a2af77507c)[/about](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f307ab7ec9&e=a2af77507c).

Stay connected with the MIGOP on [X](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=f37e5ae691&e=a2af77507c) (Twitter), [Truth Social](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=75d18c463b&e=a2af77507c), [Telegram](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=4c01bb9589&e=a2af77507c), [Facebook](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=fa3be19d10&e=a2af77507c), and [Instagram](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=46416fe977&e=a2af77507c).
|
---
|
---
| [DONATE](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=4fe9396d1f&e=a2af77507c "DONATE")

name: 2024 Senate Majority
subject: Where we stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter,
When we first contacted you, we had one goal: **to take back our Republican Senate majority in 2024.**

Right now, we have that same goal, but **things are getting more dire**.

Josh Hawley has one of the _most important must-win Senate seats in America_ , and he needs your help.

Josh is one of the only leaders we have who isn’t afraid to stand up to Joe Biden and the radical Left.
---
* He’s stood up to the mainstream media and the Chinese Communist Party.
* He defended our daughters against biological men taking their place on the playing field.
* He’s demanded we stop sending billions to foreign wars and start solving our problems right here in America.

---
**[Josh needs our help immediately to ensure that he can hold onto his seat and fight in our NEW Republican Senate majority. Can you pitch in now?](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=d9916f8ff3c9493cb450dd0c39203d4a&_e=SbNlg2h9TFiHZl9_fmFNOmiP4SVisHQOk5izz_C450LT_UwiygMMNtKZ-preJok5XZAeLqOK5Whj1JbUOqZclGRxUWEfwNFXDx3DPTe49IAAxfFsYBbkbAZTa_BK-AJz0iibqFUENcgmMfrc17pHlCY93cDYznyGn0ESm98DDlGzMPojZiEoofMg7dopPoYsm4948Qra7cMMMmXdrJZ7QCAKkmKlARgALyn0yOKiwu5QX1cY-7PeY5D6wd9tmfAqflRFREvPbBh69P6KmJuln1v5Kk2gGxVeJgFk_loGnwIBT-dvcd0ICZzfzOBWKuQkBUBcLT28f-1jPBB82niXea0hwdKSG6tRZHDN3ZokX5g%3D)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, When we first contacted you, we had one goal: to take back our Republican Senate majority in 2024. Right now, we have that same goal, but things are getting more dire. Josh Hawley has one of the most important must-win Senate seats in America , and he needs your help. Josh is one of the only leaders we have who isn’t afraid to stand up to Joe Biden and the radical Left. He’s stood up to the mainstream media and the Chinese Communist Party. He defended our daughters against biological men taking their place on the playing field. He’s demanded we stop sending billions to foreign wars and start solving our problems right here in America. I know there are a lot of races around the country, but if we lose Josh, we’ll lose one of the most dependable conservative voices in America. ** Thank you Team Hawley | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Stop AIPAC via Our Revolution
subject: This is an unavoidable story for 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1011?refcode=email-20240108&akid=5154%2E5885482%2EBGef_d ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, we know
this is going to be a major part of our work in 2024:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13383?t=1052&akid=5154%2E5885482%2EBGef_d ][IMG]

AIPAC, a right-wing special interest group that supports insurrectionists
and corporate Democrats, is ready to spend $100 million this election year
against Progressives who criticized Israel’s relentless bombing campaigns
against the Palestinian people in Gaza.

We’ve seen this before,
Peter Willis. Groups aligned with AIPAC,
like DMFI, spent millions to stop Bernie Sanders in the 2020 Democratic
presidential primary. These groups spent millions more to support
corporate Democrats against Progressives in the 2022 primaries — but we
overcame it to elect 9 new Progressives to Congress that year!

And all this money is spent against Bernie and other Progressives because
of their support for Palestinian human rights, conditioning aid to Israel,
and calls for peace in Gaza.

Progressive champions like Barbara Lee, Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman,
Ilhan Omar, and others have bravely spoken out against Israeli war crimes
in Gaza. Now, AIPAC is readying their $100 million against them and the
races are already heating up — early voting will start in a few short
weeks for Barbara Lee’s race against corporate Dems for the U.S. Senate
seat in California!

They’ve got money, but we’ve got people. Our Revolution is a major part of
this fight to support Progressive champions against the massive amount of
anti-peace, anti-progressive money in 2024. Are you with us?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1048?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240108&akid=5154%2E5885482%2EBGef_d ]Chip in now to directly support our work to defend and expand the
Progressive caucus against $100,000,000 of AIPAC spending. As the largest
grassroots-funded progressive political organization in the country, we’re
counting on your support in this critical election year.

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1035?express_lane=true&amount=12&refcode=email-20240108&akid=5154%2E5885482%2EBGef_d ]CHIP IN $12 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1036?express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20240108&akid=5154%2E5885482%2EBGef_d ]CHIP IN $27
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1037?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=email-20240108&akid=5154%2E5885482%2EBGef_d ]CHIP IN $35 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1038?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=email-20240108&akid=5154%2E5885482%2EBGef_d ]CHIP IN $50
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1039?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email-20240108&akid=5154%2E5885482%2EBGef_d ]CHIP IN $100 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13124?t=1040?&amount=12&refcode=email-20240108&akid=5154%2E5885482%2EBGef_d ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

We must never become comfortable with an American campaign finance system
where the slightest advocacy for peace or criticism of a bombing campaign
killing tens of thousands of civilians leads to $100 million lined up
against Peace candidates. That’s not democracy, it’s big money trying to
silence the voices of peace in Congress.

We can’t allow a repeat of what happened to Bernie in 2020 when big money
and the party machine coalesced to stop him. We can’t lose our Progressive
advocates for peace in Congress as AIPAC looks to target Bowman, Tlaib,
and others. And we must elect one of our strongest Peace candidates,

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, we know this is going to be a major part of our work in 2024: [ ][IMG] AIPAC, a right-wing special interest group that supports insurrectionists and corporate Democrats, is ready to spend $100 million this election year against Progressives who criticized Israel’s relentless bombing campaigns against the Palestinian people in Gaza. We’ve seen this before, Peter Willis. Groups aligned with AIPAC, like DMFI, spent millions to stop Bernie Sanders in the 2020 Democratic presidential primary. These groups spent millions more to support corporate Democrats against Progressives in the 2022 primaries — but we overcame it to elect 9 new Progressives to Congress that year! And all this money is spent against Bernie and other Progressives because of their support for Palestinian human rights, conditioning aid to Israel, and calls for peace in Gaza. Progressive champions like Barbara Lee, Rashida Tlaib, Jamaal Bowman, Ilhan Omar, and others have bravely spoken out against Israeli war crimes in Gaza. Now, AIPAC is readying their $100 million against them and the races are already heating up — early voting will start in a few short weeks for Barbara Lee’s race against corporate Dems for the U.S. Senate seat in California! They’ve got money, but we’ve got people. Our Revolution is a major part of this fight to support Progressive champions against the massive amount of anti-peace, anti-progressive money in 2024. Are you with us? [ ]Chip in now to directly support our work to defend and expand the Progressive caucus against $100,000,000 of AIPAC spending. As the largest grassroots-funded progressive political organization in the country, we’re counting on your support in this critical election year. We can’t allow a repeat of what happened to Bernie in 2020 when big money and the party machine coalesced to stop him. | | Wishing you a Happy New Year! We're kicking off the year at full speed. In January, we're in the process of forming our advisory group, and we're incredibly thankful to those who've generously devoted their time and expertise to steer us toward the future. We look forward to the moment when we can introduce them to you. Our primary focus remains on the pro-Democratic messaging campaign, and we're delighted with the deeply satisfying results thus far. Stay tuned for more updates as we continue to share information about the transformative impact the messaging campaign is making on Central Washington.

| | What keeps me going: For those unfamiliar, my father, a retired plumber from the Plumbers & Steamfitters Local 598 in Hanford, instilled in me invaluable lessons from his years of experience. Among the numerous teachings, he emphasized three fundamental principles:
1. Hate is the heaviest burden a person can carry.
2. Shit runs downhill.
3. Water finds its level.

I added a fourth, equally crucial tenet:
4. Listen to what people say; it is important to listen. However, also watch what they do because, more often than not, therein lies the truth.

When questioned about how I maintain my optimism and tenacity, I consistently refer to these four straightforward statements. This is why I firmly believe that Rural America holds the key to saving American Democracy.
The weight of hate becomes painfully evident within the Republican Party, especially as party members align closer with MAGA, resulting in heightened chaos. Trump finds himself deeply entangled in legal battles, and the Republican House members are engaging in internal conflicts. The intricate web of lies, deceit, and corrupt conduct has reached such completeness that they are swiftly disavowing their own, throwing each other under the bus at an alarming rate. This all-encompassing hate becomes a paralyzing force, diverting attention away from essential tasks such as effectively governing a country. Currently, the count stands at five Republican members of Congress leaving. Despite its simplicity, the enduring truth remains: goodness will ultimately triumph, as hate proves to be unsustainable.
---
| | |
---

body:
Our only vote for president is in 30 days. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3f9df165283f/re-hey-9339749?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| | Friends,

Val Stiles from St. Croix here.

**_Exactly one month from today all of us will be going to the polls to vote for president in the third-overall 2024 Republican primary or caucus._**

The Virgin Islands going third after Iowa and New Hampshire is _H-U-G-E_.

Already, our islands are seeing more attention from the three leading candidates. Governor Ron DeSantis, Ambassador Nikki Haley and former President Donald J. Trump are making concerted efforts to earn our votes.

With 30 days to go, I’m stepping forward to make the Virgin Islands caucus a success. Will you join me?
**
Here are three things you can do right now:

1) [Pre-register](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=9c782a6db4&e=d30db4cde8) your intent to participate in the caucus by [going to this website](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=a9992e7d4a&e=d30db4cde8).

2) Bring a friend or family member with you to the polls on February 8.

3) Make plans to attend the Election Night Party at the Morningstar hotel in Frenchman’s Reef on St. Thomas. Tickets are free. Doors open at 6:30 p.m. on February 8.**

As a reminder, the voting locations on February 8 are:
* _St. Croix_ \- 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. at La Reine Chicken Shack, Christiansted.
* _St. John_ \- 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. at Lovango Rum Bar, Cruz Bay.
* _St. Thomas_ \- 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. at Bluebeard's Castle, Estate Taarneberg, Charlotte Amalie.

If you have any questions, please don’t hesitate to contact me. If I can’t answer the question, I’ll get you to the person who can.

Friends, let’s come together and make our voices heard on February 8.

This is our one and only chance to vote for president in 2024. Let’s make that vote count.

Your friend,

Val Stiles

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
www.republicanpartyinthevirginislands.com_**

You can [update your preferences](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=69a3e29837) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=69a3e29837).

Hi Friend,
In ten minutes, I step onto the debate stage just two weeks before the first Primary in the Nation. It is an honor to fight to represent this country. I recognize that each one of you looks to the government not to create more problems but to help solve them.
This debate is a pivotal moment, an opportunity to engage in meaningful discussions about the solutions to the challenges we collectively face – from affordability and immigration to education and healthcare.
Before I take the stage, I have a request: invest $24 in this movement. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dean24-email?refcode=1.8.2024.debate&amount=24] This movement is dedicated to fighting for each other and continuing to protect this democracy at all costs.
The road ahead may be challenging, but rest assured, when I am on that stage tonight, I will be representing the best in each of you. I stand for people who are eager to witness the next generation soar in government and are ready to unite in the fight for real solutions.
Want to watch live? Check out the live stream here [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TzPLyrjatho] .

In the final week leading up to the FIRST VOTE of the 2024 election, there’s nothing I’d rather be doing than spending every one of those days on the campaign trail speaking directly with voters like YOU. But sadly, Crooked Joe and the Radical Democrats have turned our once Free Republic into a Third World Marxist Dictatorship where ELECTION INTERFERENCE is a now-daily occurrence. TWICE in this final week, I will reportedly be forced off the campaign trail and into courtrooms for phony witch hunts in both New York and Washington, D.C. – the belly of the beast! But, with patriots like YOU standing by my side, we will continue to prevail against these never-ending witch hunts and PROVE that every single act of election interference from the Democrats has BACKFIRED beautifully. So, in this final week before 2024 voting is officially underway, I’ve instructed my team to ship ANY patriot who contributes $47 or more to peacefully DEFEND our movement their very own Official Trump 2024 Calendar for FREE! And every step of the way – from the very first vote on January 15, to my first sham trial of 2024 on January 16, and all the way up through Crooked Joe’s defeat on November 5 – YOU will be able to mark each and every one of the Left’s FAILED witch hunts and OUR VICTORIES in your very own Trump 2024 Calendar. | | Thank you, | Donald J. | |
---
What a week it has been! In case you missed it, on Tuesday, we won our lawsuit against Stacey Abrams, Marc Elias, Fair Fight, and the DOJ. This lawsuit had been ongoing since 2020. The main issue was whether citizens have the right to lawfully petition their government in support of election integrity without facing persecution or prosecution. In a resounding victory, we successfully defended our actions from December 2020, where we assisted Georgia citizens in filing challenges to electors based on data that revealed over 364,000 ineligible records in the voter rolls. [Here's a quick recap of the situation. ](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HbGw_pIZaLN4CoU4iViYrA-BMLyS0_1iVKL_QX-YL2EaCiARWyPRSyavUlfBMHGTrEj_fhTp_fSQVEwRABPd0IKonSZzA5Db7PDeWZZVJcZpFJMiBO7xuWauuiHZ0PcXYZ02-IbDnmXSN8wKTfdG0W6js7VImQPEcW6Hj24Miq7TFkxskgo08LBYjCxhJaZ2I3EET1Ba515eap1bqfrRd95A7wvZgN6GD5Fav0yqt5OUpSQI11NsMVO3727-9TAZgCo9WQiUt7RXj34HS24TbJJGgvQA_A0YU4JvJDQF7CbP3Z-y5i4cvZwFdR2Zk3r1DeBWKo0EBlpvmpoYjufR6LjfAWoy1dy9BI73mRxNC7foZKCUBWUSmz7oHm1jtwE7PQ/42t/-0NcTFyVQNSgydGzDj9RvQ/h4/MscX2mIGtQ0JvEEwbEfJbOhqq83jOc87xEHgz0A4Z0c)Thank you for your ongoing support in this fight that has spanned multiple years!
**The federal court’s ruling sent a clear message to those who would attempt to control the course of our nation through lawfare and intimidation. American citizens will not be silenced**.
| [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/1A5_Z39fk90fowLbTa71p2oOGAlqq8ZSgwZKXPLrfefrSplaN922dYxQWZ33nkUFH5WYFWx-SRRii7M2n0mbcjAxaKMPYQqKvw-HJ40bhMyEwuNDQSl03PUzMyO7Qt3EB89ludkkTq6CaoDHrD6vnXwvsa4IAAu2DNuo2NohHFxaXGUuiGSzzttalYh2vgWjvhGB-QrWWvLqmM_qxgZulsjedN8lbPLyBqAPf7bajcwJYsBaCRrOJntqOiHrGEoCOG46zReRSXRh0gqD2ur8dg/42t/-0NcTFyVQNSgydGzDj9RvQ/h5/twfv8fpR-XqgJwLTnOyxOXl06s0ul8FeL9Owsxnm0s0)

| | So what comes next? First things first, clean voter rolls are a non-negotiable. We have a plan, a platform, and a process.
---
Monday night, January 8th, at 7p et, I’ll be back on air with the Onward podcast, where we’ll talk about the implications of our landmark win - and how you can get involved in cleaning up your voter rolls. It’s one step of many we need to take between now and November. [Please join us if you can.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/1A5_Z39fk90fowLbTa71p2oOGAlqq8ZSgwZKXPLrfeen33gy_HDtfuiZd4CaN9WRFgtnMksUG0h0IzThrWPfVwU1fb8xxO7okXPO9YtF1nZJ665zZz_212o_RpVMABMBRpGNF40aLZtOXo4VxWdFJ-l_taON8-AP3fIBBd2Yc1PjlPztmNWLFuVCf5BC36GMNkeFXwobOsmmgsv42gTKqCz1IDpmfXrxDypy8OoHHihQHN7lUYQ5SV7gywHEfuS2wkmrHkZuJ9mRteIEL0n0cg/42t/-0NcTFyVQNSgydGzDj9RvQ/h6/lcQPCGYT_g3i1MviiOxlQTAXU7bpuMChFH1lQkSFhTk)

I know you understand what is at stake in 2024. It’s not enough to say this is a big election. This is for something more than a candidate, more than names on a ballot. This is for the soul of our country. Just voting will not be enough.
[And, if you are in a position to help us financially, we need all the support we can muster.](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HfjZt-BPNqgA3ijwg_5Jj_OlHnCTnA95yf3sUe8HbeyMcSJ-6s4zE6j7cXPO7LStuMPWP9ysirak2NstXCAaOEeFCApHadEg3osZTOLgU4YSXhRVCqjc_JZJGg70xe-4fFGbIlPWnjLpgeflnc2qKaVUCcF17-6O_FtgfzGE2uczqQ9lqLuYRoo6s6Vmxruuhg/42t/-0NcTFyVQNSgydGzDj9RvQ/h8/kLdokwqKgp0JMC9esrI8p63WbwrOHMIz-Qwmixn0jaY) Our plans include large scale projects, open source support, continuing to fight for justice in the courts, and working with teams across the country to lay critical groundwork for trustworthy elections.
| | | [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/qOpxPyqH3iJyXA2JSR62HfjZt-BPNqgA3ijwg_5Jj_OlHnCTnA95yf3sUe8HbeyMcSJ-6s4zE6j7cXPO7LStuMPWP9ysirak2NstXCAaOEeFCApHadEg3osZTOLgU4YSXhRVCqjc_JZJGg70xe-4fFGbIlPWnjLpgeflnc2qKaVUCcF17-6O_FtgfzGE2uczqQ9lqLuYRoo6s6Vmxruuhg/42t/-0NcTFyVQNSgydGzDj9RvQ/h9/3aOBypgGX8NhJG-pI7IPkM4wjdX9ibcRb2yr7sqfxhs)

Ever onward-

So, every time you bite into this
fruit...

Your immune system starts
attacking even HEALTHY tissue and organs...

name: Veronica Escobar
subject: 57 Days to My Next Election
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
The Countdown to March
There are less than two months to my primary election, and we're working hard, thanks to your help!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vero24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vero24]
Hi Friend,
My team and I are back on the campaign trail, and we're less than 2 months to my next election. I wanted to highlight a few wins from 2023 that I was able to secure thanks to your vote and your support.
The Dignity Act
After working for months with my Republican colleague, Maria Salazar, my bipartisan immigration reform bill, The Dignity Act [https://immigrationforum.org/article/the-dignity-act-bill-summary/] , was introduced earlier this year. With pathways to citizenship, solutions for border communities, and a bipartisan approach to legislation, this bill will address what Congress has failed to change for decades.
$212 million in federal dollars
Locally, I'm proud to have secured more than $200 million in federal dollars for El Paso projects and priorities last year. Federal funding will assist great organizations in our community like the food bank, UMC, Fort Bliss, City transit, City of Anthony Police Department, and more.
Castner Range National Monument
Following years of advocacy, our beautiful Castner Range is finally protected, and in the coming years, will be available for public enjoyment!
In addition, with 235 bills sponsored or cosponsored , I continue to work to help pass legislation to lower costs for families, expand healthcare access, and improve the lives of El Pasoans.
Chip in $20.24 to help me win my March election. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vero24]
It's been the honor of a lifetime to serve in Congress. And as my team and I focus on winning my election in March, I want to thank you for your support.
Your funds, time, and vote all help send me back to Congress where I will continue to fight for you.
Please considering chipping in today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vero24] so I have the resources needed for yard signs, mailers, campaign staff , and a primary election victory!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vero24 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vero24]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Veronica Escobar for Congress
P. O. Box 3961
El Paso, TX 79923
United States

name: Katie Porter for California
subject: A look at the cost of our advertising plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36123%2E3422442%2EKkJ5Mk)
Derek, our team has drafted an advertising plan that will reach key voters all across California. But the topline number is daunting. And frankly, our fundraising needs to ramp up if we’re going to execute this whole plan.
So we’ve broken it down and assigned different supporters to different media markets. If everyone reading this email is able to sponsor their assigned area, we can run all of the TV + digital ads in our draft plan. **[Can you help us in the greater Fresno media market?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19737?market=Fresno&t=2&akid=36123%2E3422442%2EKkJ5Mk)**
You've been assigned to the greater Fresno media market. Running a single TV advertisement there costs us an estimated $180,000. So based on our typical donation, we need about 7,579 people to help us run ads in this area. Are you able to sponsor the Fresno media market to help Katie win? [⇢ Yes, I can help reach voters in the Fresno market by donating $25 to reach about 71 voters.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19736?market=Fresno&voters=71&t=15&akid=36123%2E3422442%2EKkJ5Mk) [⇢ Yes, I can give $50 to reach 143 voters.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19735?market=Fresno&voters=143&t=16&akid=36123%2E3422442%2EKkJ5Mk) [⇢ Yes, I can give $100 to reach 286 voters.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19734?market=Fresno&voters=286&t=17&akid=36123%2E3422442%2EKkJ5Mk) [⇢ No, but I can give another amount.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19737?market=Fresno&t=18&akid=36123%2E3422442%2EKkJ5Mk) [Contribute Now »](https://act.katieporter.com/go/19737?market=Fresno&t=19&akid=36123%2E3422442%2EKkJ5Mk)
---
We have to make spending decisions REALLY soon, so we are very appreciative of you stepping up and making a donation today.
Thanks a ton,
Team Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. name: Col. Mike Waltz (Ret.)
subject: What are your core values?
body:
It’s a question that every person should ask themselves. | | | _**What are your core values?**_ It’s a question that every person should ask themselves as we begin this new year.

In Congress, too many politicians are driven by greed and power.

_But that will never be me._

I served our country as a Green Beret, and _the same values I held every day fighting for our freedom abroad I still hold in Washington D.C. every day._

I’m going tell your about which values are most important to me, and I hope you’ll take a moment to reflect on the values YOU bring to the ballot box when you vote.

**So, let’s start with one of the most important virtues you need in leadership:_sacrifice_. **

Serving as a Green Beret, I had to put my own needs and impulses to the side for the good of our country.

I spent many birthdays, holidays, and celebrations away from my family on the other side of the world.

_It was tough, but I wouldn’t trade it for anything._

Too many politicians today have never sacrificed anything.

They’re motivated by self interest, not the interests of our country.

**Let me be clear: I will always put service to my country and my constituents over my own personal gain.**

**[I’m on a mission to bring more leaders to Washington who put service over self, but I need your help. Can you pitch in now and help us win for real leaders?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=56c77fc185fa40ff9ac5dd921b002371&_e=31kPqJsomhem51RKR8Jh7mQJ9b-SMCfkpQqn4Y5Rx4zBxOTZ_5tn02c5QX0Lv2AJrbTUrM641XM945UAla9i8c0Y7jW5jWpKULmmQqAo6a3sWsbOUzR7rp40i-4xJZJxOymsTA_sVYF148vDqwxH8NygVgjQFtHb6FlZRPlzC4wKQaxvB3-AuVGX1uJg7UZ71OTozrG1cLG6Xl7qNxT01r8A4uW9Q9vSDq8HNwOH3rl6GBpdsr960Cr5BzLQkWDmzZbTUgOPmVxV5Z_ZrCr1WRrEyASygyBtSSBojXAN4ZryLX121lr2-kjACD5UngW6l7fz0TUquDnjDMkRJaWanMd_rvvvgATzBAEmf5gdRrRoQ538iNsTaRm7uLmEsVCe)**

name: Marsha
subject: I hate to come to you with this news
body:
It's a new year, but I unfortunately have some bad news.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

It's a new year, but I unfortunately have some bad news.

I truly hate to come to you with this on today of all days.

body:
# [](https://act.hillharper.com/go/130?refcode=em20240108&t=1&akid=805%2E62735%2ENncs7o)
Did you see this important email from Hill?
Hill is setting a goal to raise 1,000 founding donations by January 10, because we urgently need to ramp up our grassroots support for the competitive election year ahead.
Use this link to become a 2024 founding donor: **[https://act.hillharper.com/go/2024foundingdonor](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240108?amount=5&refcode=em20240108-805&refcode2=805_62735_Nncs7o&akid=805%2E62735%2ENncs7o)**
The stakes couldn’t be higher in Michigan this year, so we’re grateful to every donor who recognizes the impact of chipping in what they can, when they can.
— Hill Harper HQ
_—--Forwarded Message—---_
_Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com_
_From: Hill Harper_
_Subject: [I am respectfully asking]_
Peter,
Senate control — and the future of our country — will come down to Michigan this year.
But it’s not enough to keep this critical Senate seat blue. With cost of living soaring, millions without access to health care, an out-of-control climate crisis, and escalating war abroad, **Michigan needs a true representative of the people as their next Senator.**
I am not in this race for personal gain, or to do the bidding of corporate lobbyists and ultra-wealthy donors. (I proved that when a mega-donor offered me $20 million to drop out and run against a progressive House incumbent, and I said no.)
I am running for Senate to stand up for the working people of Michigan — and I need your help to win.
[**I’m respectfully asking you to become one of the first 2024 Founding Donors to our Senate campaign. We are 100% grassroots funded, so this is the only way we stand a fighting chance to take on the Washington establishment.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240108?amount=5&refcode=em20240108-805&refcode2=805_62735_Nncs7o&akid=805%2E62735%2ENncs7o)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240108?amount=5&refcode=em20240108-805&refcode2=805_62735_Nncs7o&akid=805%2E62735%2ENncs7o)**
It’s contributions like yours that power this campaign from one day to the next. We won’t be able to take our people-powered movement to Washington without your support.
**Please join our 2024 Founding Donors today:****[https://act.hillharper.com/go/2024foundingdonor](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240108?amount=5&refcode=em20240108-805&refcode2=805_62735_Nncs7o&akid=805%2E62735%2ENncs7o)**
Thank you,
Hill Harper
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-footer?refcode=em20240108&t=2&refcode2=805_62735_Nncs7o&akid=805%2E62735%2ENncs7o)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=805%2E62735%2ENncs7o)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.hillharper.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.hillharper.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=805%2E62735%2ENncs7o)

To give by check:
Hill Harper for Michigan
PO Box 13195
Lansing, MI 48901
Email us: [info@hillharper.com](mailto:info@hillharper.com)

name: Dr. Prasanth Reddy
subject: Sharice Davids had years to do something
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY REDDY FOR KANSAS
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/6ae399013f692a963947229f28c3afba/b9d9ae5732ee9bddc3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
| | One of the main reasons I decided to run for Congress was simple: If Sharice Davids was going to make a difference, wouldn’t she have done so by now? **I’ve spent my life taking action. She’s spent her time in Congress following her party’s script.** Case in point: the border crisis. Joe Biden took office nearly three years ago. Within weeks, it was clear he’d created a problem at the border. The problem became a crisis, and now it’s a country-threatening emergency. _**Sharice Davids has been in office this entire time. She has not put forward *one solution* to the border crisis.**_ **Yet she has the audacity to post nonsense like this on social media:**
---
|
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/6ae399013f692a963947229f28c3afba/1cd889e2e70ded31c3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
|
---
**If you ask me why I think Sharice Davids talks a good game but never delivers, I’ve got a couple of thoughts:** **— >** She doesn’t believe in strong immigration laws. After all, she’s called for defunding ICE. (I’m a legal immigrant, and I’m telling you, this is out of touch.) **— >** She’s terrified of upsetting the party bosses in DC. After all, they’re the source of her campaign’s fundraising. ^This is why she votes the party line on every issue that counts. **Folks, we can do better than this. Frankly, we don’t have a choice anymore.** Fentanyl is invading our communities, cartels are getting richer, and our infrastructure is being stretched thin by record numbers of illegal border crossings. I’m a legal immigrant. This is a personal issue for me. And as a physician and military officer, I also know a secure border is a matter of public health and basic common sense. **Which brings me back to why I’m running for Congress. Sharice Davids has sold this district up the river for her own political self-interest. ** **It’s time for a change, and I’m the candidate who can bring that change.** My life story is proof of the American Dream, and if you send me to Congress, I’ll fight like hell to preserve it for future generations. **[My hope is that you’ll help us flip this seat and secure our border by chipping in for the first time — or for the first time in 2024 — here.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/6ae399013f692a963947229f28c3afba/7f973559d90c4a5ec3d6b838967d376c/43823)**
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/6ae399013f692a963947229f28c3afba/3abd52cf14a0f574c3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
This is a lengthy email, but you deserve honest thoughts about the issues that matter, and why a first-time candidate is asking for your investment and trust. **On top of that, if we do what we need to do now, this could be the race that decides the House majority in November.** And that will go a long way towards deciding if we secure our border, or if we begin 2025 where we began 2024. **[Let’s change direction before it’s too late.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/6ae399013f692a963947229f28c3afba/2c3f098d7585d519c3d6b838967d376c/43823)**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/6ae399013f692a963947229f28c3afba/aafad93b62fc85b4c3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
Dr. Prasanth Reddy
---
[**DONATE NOW**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/6ae399013f692a963947229f28c3afba/a960e7fa4a4fadf2c3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/6ae399013f692a963947229f28c3afba/4ee0ba9e5b01ac9fc3d6b838967d376c/43823)
---
__**Keep reading for a personal note from Dr. Reddy:**__ I’m no politician. I’m a businessman, military officer, and physician. I’m taking action because extreme ideas have taken hold in Washington. And to save America, we must act now. It starts here, in Kansas’ 3rd District. This race could decide who controls the House, and my opponent has a $400,000 advantage, thanks to special interests and liberal donors. I don’t take asking for money lightly. In fact, I don’t like doing it at all. **[But if you can, I hope you’ll chip in right now.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/6ae399013f692a963947229f28c3afba/d57b3263dfb0618ec3d6b838967d376c/43823) ** It’s time for a new direction, and I’m ready. I hope you are too.
---
[**DONATE HERE**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/6dcc10b8ddad76db322761119fed00b9/43823/6ae399013f692a963947229f28c3afba/338d8db5bc0be48cc3d6b838967d376c/43823)

name: Freedom First Project
subject: The Moral Case for Capitalism
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Dear Friend,Capitalism has become an easy target in recent years—especially among young people and the media. They often argue that it creates significant inequality and doesn’t do enough to help the poor.While capitalism has imperfections, there is a very compelling case to be made that it is a much more humane system than socialism.
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | You can receive an analysis of both systems today when **[you get a free copy of the Hoover Institution’s eBook, _Personal Freedom and the Moral Case for Capitalism._](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** This eBook consists of two papers from Hoover Institution Fellows Russell Roberts and Ayaan Hirsi Ali.As an economist, Roberts takes an in-depth look at the humane side of capitalism with a humble and practical approach. And Ali shares her own personal experience growing up in socialist Somalia.

I think you’ll be fascinated by both of their perspectives and gain a deeper understanding of each of these economic systems. You can get your free copy using this secure link:
**[https://resources.hoover.org/personal-freedom-and-the-moral-case-for-capitalism/.](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)** And you are more than welcome to share it with your family and friends. With more people embracing socialist ideas around the country, it’s important for them to read honest insights of both capitalism and socialism.**[You can use this link to get access to your free copy of _Personal Freedom and the Moral Case for Capitalism now._](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**
Thank you,Greg Stamps Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._
---
Freedom First Project P.O. Box 523692 Springfield, VA 22152 If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjI0MDA4LTU2MWNlZDc4NzRkYTRkNDRhYzU5MDljNzE0MjczYjhmIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/q_QIhZ4TL2KS-i89RACzZA) to unsubscribe.
---

clean_body: If we don’t make up the difference right away, we’ll start off the first quarter of this election year with a serious fundraising disadvantage. | | | | We knew this was coming. My main opponent, multi-millionaire political insider Tammy Murphy, just announced she raised more money than us from her vast networks. This isn't a surprise because the most powerful political family in my state has been rushing to raise millions to try and beat me because I'm leading in all the polls. I don't want to spread doom and gloom, but that's a genuine problem as we will see negative ads blanketing the airwaves. And if we don't make up the difference right away, we'll start off the first quarter of this election year with a serious fundraising disadvantage. The good news is that we weren't outraised by too much, so I am extremely confident we can close this gap. Look: I'm running a different kind of campaign because that's what the people of New Jersey want right now. Our campaign is about bringing in regular New Jerseyans and regular Americans, engaging with them about what's on their minds, and earning their support. People are tired of corrupt politics as usual that only benefit the well-off and well-connected. I decided to step up to bring change, and I can see that the people of New Jersey are with me in this fight. I can win this as I'm leading in every poll , but I need your help to catch up on fundraising so the big money doesn't drown out our people's campaign. = = Thank you, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . | | | Republican representative and Trump fanatic Elise Stefanik referred to the people who are being sentenced to prison for attacking our Capitol on Jan 6, 2021 as "hostages." _Are you kidding me?!_ The deadly insurrection at the Capitol was one of the darkest days in our nation's history and a direct attack on our democracy. The violent mob that stormed the gates, attacked police officers, destroyed and vandalized property and threatened members of Congress are rightfully being held accountable now. Over 1,200 insurrectionists have been criminally [charged](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf7574b2e-f299-4913-9c12-ef241c0b5275/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) for their actions on Jan 6, 890 of them have been found guilty of federal crimes, and more than half of those have been sentenced to prison time. We're talking about criminals, not "hostages." Their actions should not be minimized or sugar-coated. They attacked the Capitol and now they're paying for it. Elise Stefanik needs a reality check. [**Sign your name now: Tell Elise Stefanik the Jan 6th criminals are not "hostages" >>**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2d867dd8-884a-4305-b9a7-a6fd64c5ea22/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: You can learn from Rome’s history
body:
Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic?

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=964e488ce6b141abb1342b0711b14fdb&_e=1SJ7MAo_8UFloZ12Qmu3-GndZdvx1pQ4CXOo646OnwiKr9T5AO3X5DD9dsfNaNSauidWtfb5UAwxFDweCC8myNX4byaIcRzwlEKtEVw0RwzNZxIyOzrrVO1BheaJRtm2eJuP1M4uva4UiS_ezn6wUM8CM8G3FVHMZ5sOPRWlsG3PrsmFb6fEg-M_L6zqaeCpdhujD7wvhX-RSMz0bIpU1BrpPSkAvWjsT_1F4G-j3l053DCu5ehutQhIcNKrgw5NZy_I0w2ybrLecDKumB9v-CAL9qGunkWynCiuT3UV8sVDW4AUeaCAUDkHi3rjUqakjsUIZ-fFAHziTh7oHNFTIm6d4R6zJukqsC6_w9KmdHtYrR7RyrzGxTlhbUWorsFs6wWTmieC2by-unI2VZW2SWNnw2Zb5Rs4WQ_AuLK2N6k%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic." ** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=964e488ce6b141abb1342b0711b14fdb&_e=1SJ7MAo_8UFloZ12Qmu3-GndZdvx1pQ4CXOo646OnwiKr9T5AO3X5DD9dsfNaNSauidWtfb5UAwxFDweCC8myNX4byaIcRzwlEKtEVw0RwzNZxIyOzrrVO1BheaJRtm2eJuP1M4uva4UiS_ezn6wUM8CM8G3FVHMZ5sOPRWlsG3PrsmFb6fEg-M_L6zqaeCpdhujD7wvhX-RSMz0bIpU1BrpPSkAvWjsT_1F4G-j3l053DCu5ehutQhIcNKrgw5NoX9IRBzmkOBL6YVAdWAeLVziDgWEhtqOLnczyjScgdMyqfOWD9AhKeZWA2QHL83FLo5B9uohe6xZ9zOYzgOmK-nBB48JT5fxyU8z2clh3Ow4hXfTQezzQsnPnYLHBHvl43ZrxLugymNTuRRCe_X33vkHpsZght0WyNucmScjIIU%3D) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=964e488ce6b141abb1342b0711b14fdb&_e=1SJ7MAo_8UFloZ12Qmu3-GndZdvx1pQ4CXOo646OnwiKr9T5AO3X5DD9dsfNaNSauidWtfb5UAwxFDweCC8myNX4byaIcRzwlEKtEVw0RwzNZxIyOzrrVO1BheaJRtm2eJuP1M4uva4UiS_ezn6wUM8CM8G3FVHMZ5sOPRWlsG3PrsmFb6fEg-M_L6zqaeCpdhujD7wvhX-RSMz0bIpU1BrpPSkAvWjsT_1F4G-j3l053DCu5ehutQhIcNKrgw5NixVuCq6Dt9kwuPv1zZWaOVjtmAJNe5pFpjYkVCJjWVBdcwUQbNW0Bfn42Al-DabBqd808JElNuAtht8jEN0ttjvBv1zmJrNj76UUnSxZ-oUp0cghb9q0Sy5xWd8ETk_dPr-oPd2vYK-BP5NLosUnJbGUOBNir1q1fHBHm3_UVYc%3D)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=964e488ce6b141abb1342b0711b14fdb&_e=1SJ7MAo_8UFloZ12Qmu3-GndZdvx1pQ4CXOo646OnwiKr9T5AO3X5DD9dsfNaNSauidWtfb5UAwxFDweCC8myNX4byaIcRzwlEKtEVw0RwzNZxIyOzrrVO1BheaJRtm2eJuP1M4uva4UiS_ezn6wUM8CM8G3FVHMZ5sOPRWlsG3PrsmFb6fEg-M_L6zqaeCpdhujD7wvhX-RSMz0bIpU1BrpPSkAvWjsT_1F4G-j3l053DCu5ehutQhIcNKrgw5NbY8k6A7UMc1xS60Hmrn6zKge3-nOjy-YQ9qwv7tZXcJ4byPYFKwjPzO-4fAbe8KtLiVjJW-Zj4gSnXlR760rlrS0HZetMAUaqO1cDCkPFIMHg_iEUNR_04-X3S8myb-xqAnlZCuvuPmTvRYpZgp3mvNz4iuJyCfFBeZpDKxG6-s%3D)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" **and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2faef60620ba41da81fa777f166b1398&_e=ZfQlH3pXmdH6aBba4lvrkZ4EwSnpN2plpPGG_BYgP6SziH6Ewh2lBMH1mq-aKlqjEqaMKsrN5IGlcthGP1-xSoQDJko_INBxDH7ZLQ8n_d-N7PHygPwEYIMoXkYnuJ9w98ZB4_C4TWcUva57JJXWOaaMVBO2ApBg7j2BFx1S4eey-Z2C62euoGtqK7v5z_SfiIsvoNbDQKen7Fh2hAR41krEFLjeBligATJuG8c6f0PGhyoIe2mHjuHfFcGUmccDw790PjsBwaCU_g5foGN6irLJJopVPoQucTFJbt4xtD39ugcNuITxkPm1jAWPxYeGAUarkl3Nz8K6bSmknyb8hzK1FcX73Sx15-jMgOTcUY1kUu6FhdTAqmEr8h9AqDZiQj1_9FN0oVQvvkCnBK5oRrbHWn5gZNhuRekzm3H9xTs%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, ["Ancient Christianity,"](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2faef60620ba41da81fa777f166b1398&_e=ZfQlH3pXmdH6aBba4lvrkZ4EwSnpN2plpPGG_BYgP6SziH6Ewh2lBMH1mq-aKlqjEqaMKsrN5IGlcthGP1-xSoQDJko_INBxDH7ZLQ8n_d-N7PHygPwEYIMoXkYnuJ9w98ZB4_C4TWcUva57JJXWOaaMVBO2ApBg7j2BFx1S4eey-Z2C62euoGtqK7v5z_SfiIsvoNbDQKen7Fh2hAR41krEFLjeBligATJuG8c6f0PGhyoIe2mHjuHfFcGUmccDw790PjsBwaCU_g5foGN6ipXrAgYvzIE5TiXZ8L9Y9S5Eh4epSx40ZT1cv9idHh8HKGhBfL6TmjZQUhuM3a8HCmtiQGU3E74xZLapcxT-w3qcfosq8IP4iXEXXsSaCe3JoL3zc42MWRQ24V2Iap9S2GUW2OOasNQYtuECHH6oQr0%3D) now available on DVD.
---
| | In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more. **Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD.**
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2faef60620ba41da81fa777f166b1398&_e=ZfQlH3pXmdH6aBba4lvrkZ4EwSnpN2plpPGG_BYgP6SziH6Ewh2lBMH1mq-aKlqjEqaMKsrN5IGlcthGP1-xSoQDJko_INBxDH7ZLQ8n_d-N7PHygPwEYIMoXkYnuJ9w98ZB4_C4TWcUva57JJXWOaaMVBO2ApBg7j2BFx1S4eey-Z2C62euoGtqK7v5z_SfiIsvoNbDQKen7Fh2hAR41krEFLjeBligATJuG8c6f0PGhyoIe2mHjuHfFcGUmccDw790PjsBwaCU_g5foGN6igkBbE2Sp760zpUvUUqjII329rFpWQ-Czl4uCGWwMtw_9AABg4jW6uHFRr3cXRbgHLAi4wEo8Lw1AVFmQNXTdfO5Ugjr4ebBy1Age9klkkL7CiZohRV1NalJATE32-XI0dTch6_w-PzrkHCGv7_qP-s%3D)
---
| | [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2faef60620ba41da81fa777f166b1398&_e=ZfQlH3pXmdH6aBba4lvrkZ4EwSnpN2plpPGG_BYgP6SziH6Ewh2lBMH1mq-aKlqjEqaMKsrN5IGlcthGP1-xSoQDJko_INBxDH7ZLQ8n_d-N7PHygPwEYIMoXkYnuJ9w98ZB4_C4TWcUva57JJXWOaaMVBO2ApBg7j2BFx1S4eey-Z2C62euoGtqK7v5z_SfiIsvoNbDQKen7Fh2hAR41krEFLjeBligATJuG8c6f0PGhyoIe2mHjuHfFcGUmccDw790PjsBwaCU_g5foGN6ij9RCRfEXQOocEYhEQ6zufjl7b1n__UhUXlUqsETpntt_FNxB57E4I89z1wX_CN4Vdb0aRClXotSnjyytyNuTmRT0E2069XlDsRHHYtAcRIh-ziwJI7n_kgqEnuL5sgfYSkTbLeQNxlHJJr57LVDFTM%3D)

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

Patriot,

name: Team Slotkin
subject: AI & the 2024 election
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1004%2E135344%2E92Cjgs)

Hey there,
Last year, we shared an example of how campaigns can use artificial intelligence (AI) in their campaigns by having AI platforms write ad copy or emails like this one (you can read the email written by AI below). Given Elissa’s national security background, we have been thinking a lot about how this type of technology can be used to mislead voters and influence the 2024 elections.
We are already seeing this phenomenon play out in real time – last month, the National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC), launched an ad campaign that featured misleading AI-generated images to enforce their narrative about immigration. We can bet that more organizations, super PACs, and possibly even individual candidates will be using this as a tool to promote certain candidates and drive potentially misleading narratives in their elections.
Ads that use fake footage generated by AI pose a serious threat to our election: Deepfake videos, for example, can misrepresent a person’s statements or actions – or even put words that they never said directly in their AI-generated mouths.
**Here in Michigan, our Democratic majorities have worked to address this issue in the hopes of circumventing the impact AI could have on our election**. In November, Governor Whitmer signed legislation that will require campaigns to clearly say which political advertisements airing in Michigan were created using AI. It would prohibit use of AI-generated deepfakes within 90 days of an election without a separate disclosure identifying the media as manipulated. These are important steps forward and puts Michigan ahead of others, as the FEC continues to debate how to navigate these ads.
Besides deepfake videos, there's also a serious risk of spreading disinformation through AI-generated robocalls, texts, and social media posts that spread even more quickly than today’s factual news information. For example, fake news accounts that appear real could share falsified stories that are then amplified by other fake accounts – before, ultimately, finding their way into the newsfeeds of everyday people. It can take a lot of effort to reverse this disinformation once it’s in the ecosystem. Some of this disinformation could certainly be aimed at dampening voter turnout, or fake reporting of results.
Look, Elissa is old school (she still hand writes her notes on emails like this one – in mechanical pencil!), but our campaign is always looking to understand how the latest technology will impact us – and to understand how we can navigate the changing landscape of campaigns. We will have to adjust our digital efforts to combat disinformation both in ads and on social media and make sure we’re taking the truth about Elissa and what she stands for to voters wherever they get their information online.
[**We’ll continue to keep you in the loop on how this develops. In the meantime if you want to help Elissa run an honest, transparent, and human-run campaign – chip in below!](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240108-1-3D&t=2&akid=1004%2E135344%2E92Cjgs)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-jan24.OTW_eo&amount=3&refcode=em240108-1-3D&t=21&akid=1004%2E135344%2E92Cjgs)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-jan24.78xAF-&refcode=em240108-1-3D&t=22&akid=1004%2E135344%2E92Cjgs)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-jan24.hMhQIv&refcode=em240108-1-3D&t=23&akid=1004%2E135344%2E92Cjgs)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-jan24.mji4rh&refcode=em240108-1-3D&t=24&akid=1004%2E135344%2E92Cjgs)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-jan24.xeo9Lh&refcode=em240108-1-3D&t=25&akid=1004%2E135344%2E92Cjgs)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-jan24.OTW_eo&refcode=em240108-1-3D&t=26&akid=1004%2E135344%2E92Cjgs)**
---
****
Team Slotkin
* * *
As a refresher, here is the AI email we sent last year, which we had written by AI (really!) to showcase how advanced this technology has become:
_“We find ourselves in the midst of an AI election, a new era that's not distant or abstract, but very much here and now. Artificial Intelligence is already influencing the 2024 elections, helping campaigns to identify donors and voters more efficiently. But the potential for misuse is alarming. The creation of 'deepfake' videos, images, and messages that can mislead and deceive voters is a stark reality of this new landscape._
_This point was highlighted in a recent Axios article. The report detailed an AI-generated video released by the Republican National Committee, which depicted fictitious scenes to paint a dystopian image of America under a second Biden term. The clear intention was to twist our political discourse, to sow discord and mistrust through manipulation._
_Elissa is deeply concerned about the potential misuse of AI in our elections. In her view, democracy is about truth, transparency, and the will of the people, not about who can create the most convincing deepfake or disinformation campaign._
_Before we continue, we think it's important to share something with you. This very email, up to this point, was drafted by an AI. Yes, that's right. AI is already so advanced that it can write a coherent, persuasive email like this one.”_

PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=27&akid=1004%2E135344%2E92Cjgs).

[ Sign up here to receive fewer emails.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/signup/users-fewer-emails/?t=28&akid=1004%2E135344%2E92Cjgs)

Elissa Slotkin served in the Central Intelligence Agency and the Department of Defense. Use of her job titles and photographs during service do not imply endorsement by the Central Intelligence Agency OR the Department of Defense.

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Could you do me a huge favor?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
It’ll only take a few minutes...| | | Peter, Two things:
---
1. THANK YOU for always being a loyal supporter of my father and the America First movement. We truly appreciate your support.
2. | WEEKLY NEWSLETTERJanuary 5th, 2024
---
|
---
| | **A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret)** Happy New Year! We have a lot to look forward to this year and I am starting the year off by making my candidacy official. I’m excited to announce that I am the first Republican to file my candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Virginia this week! We have a lot of work to do, but it’s time to unseat Tim Kaine in November 2024. Before we begin talking about all the exciting things to come in 2024, I want to take a moment to remind people about the events that happened over the holidays that many of you may not have heard about. Last week, Joe Biden bypassed Congress once again by selling weapons to Israel, adding to the list of unconstitutional moves by his administration. December was also a month marked by uncontrolled illegal immigration again, where migrant encounters at the southern border hit a record 302K. We cannot allow this to continue, and this year we have the opportunity to put an end to this. With your continued support, 2024 will be the year we take back our country and take back the Senate! \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret)
---
|
---
_**In Case You Missed It**_
---
**[Hung Joined FOX Across America](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=29d0398c80ca4c3684465fbedaeb515d&_e=gf0gXtK2yEG5IacQzapOOWDTq5RjhkoFINGyKC24Ri_V1Dgj9nKw0vnygWiRUcu-z-q7Cexr8mVnuUlkTQP9UY9iyxg0J46CeG8qnOAJxXXW5Wug9kVR3J1qc1UUezs-2agQ5VpBoIhKw7BFxi-2XNgFyAQaysgIoRlmdflTV959j2SA5iOcSjIVIC8dYVE8TqjI7M6BIN9LKdtVauQY1ivwO_tWM-5HUgbpZOgKCkiTc0H37hdP3yC8tW4rEvRSo9mB24EdO75G8xQmGZfUo_c5bBvS_QRfkujPPm7L_Cd8iRKu-llF-uXt1nik4O68smtKsKzlv1w6vgfrF3io6qqqc-XFn07SGg5x26JdOkCXqlXBR7AjHUwgMRJmxOOuCwzGN4HW0jSYGmjVt7a4jkAI-rDRBYIl5Q483GYVSt3XVKmtKzzaLbrI5p12gRTlZOtDm1j3M65OaoAW_CkueHxpbTrImYYc8LmM1HFhwZmkB5NfVyEmboMmqy6_Y12-yCc8g4eT49tA_MU6V-aXdw%3D%3D)**

Last week, Hung joined FOX Across America on FOX News Radio the day after Christmas to discuss the latest in Israel, the need for border security, and his race for U.S. Senate. During his radio appearance, Cao reminded listeners what was occurring on Christmas day while others in America were enjoying the holiday with family and friends:_ _ _"Don't forget that on Christmas Day, three U.S. service members were injured, one critically by Iranian drones. And so this is in Erbil, Iraq, where this really should be the model city for all cities in Iraq. But when Joe Biden was the Vice President of the United States, he was supposed to negotiate this Status of Forces agreement, and he failed to do so. We had to pull out. I was there. We had to pull out in the middle of the night. And ISIS came about."_
