clean_body: | | | | | | WEEKLY NEWSLETTERJanuary 5th, 2024 | | | A Note from CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) Happy New Year! We have a lot to look forward to this year and I am starting the year off by making my candidacy official. I’m excited to announce that I am the first Republican to file my candidacy for the U.S. Senate in Virginia this week! We have a lot of work to do, but it’s time to unseat Tim Kaine in November 2024. Before we begin talking about all the exciting things to come in 2024, I want to take a moment to remind people about the events that happened over the holidays that many of you may not have heard about. Last week, Joe Biden bypassed Congress once again by selling weapons to Israel, adding to the list of unconstitutional moves by his administration. December was also a month marked by uncontrolled illegal immigration again, where migrant encounters at the southern border hit a record 302K. We cannot allow this to continue, and this year we have the opportunity to put an end to this. With your continued support, 2024 will be the year we take back our country and take back the Senate! \- CAPT Hung Cao USN (Ret) | In Case You Missed It Last week, Hung joined FOX Across America on FOX News Radio the day after Christmas to discuss the latest in Israel, the need for border security, and his race for U.S. Senate. During his radio appearance, Cao reminded listeners what was occurring on Christmas day while others in America were enjoying the holiday with family and friends: "Don't forget that on Christmas Day, three U.S. service members were injured, one critically by Iranian drones. And so this is in Erbil, Iraq, where this really should be the model city for all cities in Iraq. But when Joe Biden was the Vice President of the United States, he was supposed to negotiate this Status of Forces agreement, and he failed to do so. We had to pull out. I was there. We had to pull out in the middle of the night. And ISIS came about." | | | Store If you haven't picked up your Hung Cao gear yet, check out our online store! | Social Media to Share Here are a few of our top posts from social media this week. Be sure to like and share, and when you tweet at Hung remember to use #TeamCao! | | | | | | That's it for this week, thank you for reading and see you on the campaign trail! Be sure to follow Hung Cao on social media! | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Hung Cao for Virginia PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: You can learn from Rome’s history
body:
Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic?

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18cdef960c59466b8122d36da884097f&_e=O_EzAocgLwAZrGLDWUndZw8ggC-byiU2BJTkxVXz8bn8kBupbDG_8OdJhVOgSWzB2V-iA_AVJs4mn7Lveg4eneyqMOIPJkqzopimQIuzhvSfT1BMjXKgl8tgdrolpBrR0_A_CiUB2JcG9k78nXXlThiYwSpphMm4MNJYqNZNUEhtWEkJKn-kQgxwRQUd5Vt5oHQvNM89myAADSpUHB-pXBk0tcHvx7VLamnC2aaOGtd5zfuBnPDwHnE_f4ipomU0LYbzmsgHK-K9uYcAPNSZXwJQwTdQhs9c2J15BKSn-LhzQAb6uceB_Rj86JR8xnc--3HgUXe2EIS4s-k1WzlXHZ1JriwbApElXXh3GsURILeF1WDNhh6geZ-7FCA2NvuqVNEUupuFtXE5PVFcw44CeogQNLr8sfjDJcQEWVH09NE%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic." ** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of"The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic"](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18cdef960c59466b8122d36da884097f&_e=O_EzAocgLwAZrGLDWUndZw8ggC-byiU2BJTkxVXz8bn8kBupbDG_8OdJhVOgSWzB2V-iA_AVJs4mn7Lveg4eneyqMOIPJkqzopimQIuzhvSfT1BMjXKgl8tgdrolpBrR0_A_CiUB2JcG9k78nXXlThiYwSpphMm4MNJYqNZNUEhtWEkJKn-kQgxwRQUd5Vt5oHQvNM89myAADSpUHB-pXBk0tcHvx7VLamnC2aaOGtd5zfuBnPDwHnE_f4ipomU0usDOKRCJuilVgTi9Nspiqqv8QpxxXj4NMmmR2CFCWf519lYMmiYRs9yH3aBflb13eR5Rjj-YAHPB6PYp1PNVWpRNEge07aXxBSXUs4J4noC3wgYKcobzxgHkuDhDeXAcVwbspeyJWFBkBK2b7501o9dvYkyjvhuia7sZ8NwngOo%3D) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18cdef960c59466b8122d36da884097f&_e=O_EzAocgLwAZrGLDWUndZw8ggC-byiU2BJTkxVXz8bn8kBupbDG_8OdJhVOgSWzB2V-iA_AVJs4mn7Lveg4eneyqMOIPJkqzopimQIuzhvSfT1BMjXKgl8tgdrolpBrR0_A_CiUB2JcG9k78nXXlThiYwSpphMm4MNJYqNZNUEhtWEkJKn-kQgxwRQUd5Vt5oHQvNM89myAADSpUHB-pXBk0tcHvx7VLamnC2aaOGtd5zfuBnPDwHnE_f4ipomU02AdPCL_0CiZJAfPRhFhIqf9RZzUvMOQhiDmfxfhBOVHwGCR_AzijBu-0azhUeB1fVLzCTCM4rwShfHFzyrLrO-18RqHLXfLAYcxr7dPnhbvh41IQz2-WAHm8NBbR8C5TZCI-5Oz-ZvPqCEZ19afOARcAzaPSxQvlIryFJZLooMo%3D)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we'll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," **along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=18cdef960c59466b8122d36da884097f&_e=O_EzAocgLwAZrGLDWUndZw8ggC-byiU2BJTkxVXz8bn8kBupbDG_8OdJhVOgSWzB2V-iA_AVJs4mn7Lveg4eneyqMOIPJkqzopimQIuzhvSfT1BMjXKgl8tgdrolpBrR0_A_CiUB2JcG9k78nXXlThiYwSpphMm4MNJYqNZNUEhtWEkJKn-kQgxwRQUd5Vt5oHQvNM89myAADSpUHB-pXBk0tcHvx7VLamnC2aaOGtd5zfuBnPDwHnE_f4ipomU0Pq1OOBc1FD1KLQdVbRYaLdS3aFbjJk0tPDu2qax00NdHqyCBhjy5Ln0AliAZVrI19Y-H4TbNCLnTAiszgI1x02WS77IkcvigC1NQG9UGrXVRdnmb97ZOZSE9i8olCr6y8QmMLe729IDmod0oJ_f7j5kXlwH8QU-WrUatxWBWeXc%3D)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That's why we produced **" The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic" **and why I hope you'll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

Friend, I just got back from my visit to Eagle Pass, TX, and I couldn't wait to tell you what I saw. I, along with over 60 of my House Republican colleagues, visited the border to see Biden's Border Crisis firsthand.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cb8e3eb779c644fbbde4ef8ddb784c5d&_e=Se5vDU_Jztk0rEznJau2amIOP6WZ5lLfNw8dOeZ7OXCb6eahs1pLcIVZuJKP4jDYbD-6Lhi7NAv6ZkuYU-lrLu-KxugbsqqQiLIvJnXnPv1Q5tft51Qd5gWvfZqGUszrWEL7wRC2FQN6tZAniwDNphTd2brK2cwPpgjcN_-BhwXQO45KuhiotPQyACpFnxe0SrKt9Yeu-xPRs5SMyw7vL_NWkedBLG602JuU0QkZDYEN3NTpjYYlo44IW3wX23W-lPCW55xK7KUx8xZYpRnf4dzUUm_ykec3Vb0x0fdZckwVDHSfnpjhMcR_8YG6Da9ccdaOiurvWwj7WW3x2uk2RmN4eZJ6PWktd9CNS_MRon_YkdzMGXyR-qFWe_83Mp3AXehxbmArWYHPVj4m8D3GuJVTHF7wgRqX_Z5NKxtbGLfqbpgUAkx88kx-aDfV1tR_)

[**CHIP IN TO END THE BIDEN BORDER CRISIS**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cb8e3eb779c644fbbde4ef8ddb784c5d&_e=Se5vDU_Jztk0rEznJau2amIOP6WZ5lLfNw8dOeZ7OXCb6eahs1pLcIVZuJKP4jDYbD-6Lhi7NAv6ZkuYU-lrLu-KxugbsqqQiLIvJnXnPv1Q5tft51Qd5gWvfZqGUszrWEL7wRC2FQN6tZAniwDNphTd2brK2cwPpgjcN_-BhwXQO45KuhiotPQyACpFnxe0SrKt9Yeu-xPRs5SMyw7vL_NWkedBLG602JuU0QkZDYEN3NTpjYYlo44IW3wX23W-lPCW55xK7KUx8xZYpRnf4dzUUm_ykec3Vb0x0fdZckxphK51qi3gMnmggVtSq7ZeHFd91X6CQXofz16ZCwAgm6fhp9XM6i0hJA_-v7V5_0fCcPiXcgLUbCgH-U-XEMNKnh89PhFAejeaHzEb8Q_BrttU-nljCFZE43NL4RfLZziVkcP-thM0G7vbbyeTEzga)
---
If you don't live in a border state, or have never watched illegal immigrants cross the border, Biden's Border Crisis is worse than you could ever imagine. I stood there and witnessed firsthand, migrants crossing the border, totally unfettered. You've seen the numbers on the news. More than 6.2 MILLION illegal immigrants crossed the border since Joe Biden took office. That's more than the populations of Utah, Connecticut, Iowa, and Nevada. This isn't an immigration problem. This is an INVASION problem. **[Either Joe Biden is utterly incompetent or he doesn't have the will to solve this issue. There is no in between.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=cb8e3eb779c644fbbde4ef8ddb784c5d&_e=Se5vDU_Jztk0rEznJau2amIOP6WZ5lLfNw8dOeZ7OXCb6eahs1pLcIVZuJKP4jDYbD-6Lhi7NAv6ZkuYU-lrLu-KxugbsqqQiLIvJnXnPv1Q5tft51Qd5gWvfZqGUszrWEL7wRC2FQN6tZAniwDNphTd2brK2cwPpgjcN_-BhwXQO45KuhiotPQyACpFnxe0SrKt9Yeu-xPRs5SMyw7vL_NWkedBLG602JuU0QkZDYEN3NTpjYYlo44IW3wX23W-lPCW55xK7KUx8xZYpRnf4dzUUm_ykec3Vb0x0fdZckws5HJfYKg69aMMfgu4yW4tVTjTNpl7fy01gJzO3iyqWLoPJHw3TWRsvfzuJl8jpMMffLGjnpccmJo-F0DyKrrA33ej7SF8-2tWStEMgtSughDrLsYH96wSgxo4Nx92xcml28vaQXp_CJq9sMdR3XTp)** Here's the fact of the matter. During the Trump Administration, we built and repaired huge portions of the border wall, enforced the Remain in Mexico policy, and slowed illegal immigration to a crawl. But Joe Biden reversed President Trump's policies, and now REFUSES to do what's right. **_That 's why, this November, Joe Biden and the open-border Democrats are in for a rude awakening._** With your help, we'll **EXPAND** our majority in the Congress. **[To make sure that happens, I need your support right now. name: Conservatives Give
subject: Uncover the Fascinating History of Christianity
body:
I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4941e6fe6aa64c10974156050d7a22f9&_e=m3OaIjI5XRa9ew3NZznbpADRmB-n0r4568abscEm4571aHsR1eHydGQJspL3LtP_L8YM48zPH_e9Xr6w2I2XHRl1YJd_Fg1znoEKL9C4nI8I7d-HceV-Ek7r5TiK3AmeBvnv_lKcA0kX4JkuB2AWeA9uAJ3qNPv_mVcUSbtqk8qHPnuX0onqPQ05OOlAjUjTuKKwSXAuW3HJBISETOo06pBfA82NrMsLFHLcSFplxFOLXjLDNSKIC6etgwCaHRBhWTqv4BGd4ALLnJjvfbZLvpHgno_Kp4NQS_Pr-ktK4Qt7QGFyC7hj9l5NtJ07t6ie0AY9_Dt_GpKfOi4wSgwb_a440dTPYqPLwPlud-hLAlIgPB1MhH5hUEKD3FzuRW-aVPrPOrusnoq4DNmhX9kqABvtmvVh_MkJoqe4SJe_HXw%3D)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

I've always been fascinated by the story of the earliest Christians.

I wanted to learn more about how they worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it was daunting to figure out how to proceed. I always got lost in foreign names and locations and the complicated history of Imperial Rome. The result was a large gap in my understanding of how the Christian faith took shape and spread from the apostles through the age of Constantine.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, ["Ancient Christianity,"](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4941e6fe6aa64c10974156050d7a22f9&_e=m3OaIjI5XRa9ew3NZznbpADRmB-n0r4568abscEm4571aHsR1eHydGQJspL3LtP_L8YM48zPH_e9Xr6w2I2XHRl1YJd_Fg1znoEKL9C4nI8I7d-HceV-Ek7r5TiK3AmeBvnv_lKcA0kX4JkuB2AWeA9uAJ3qNPv_mVcUSbtqk8qHPnuX0onqPQ05OOlAjUjTuKKwSXAuW3HJBISETOo06pBfA82NrMsLFHLcSFplxFOLXjLDNSKIC6etgwCaHRBhWTqv4BGd4ALLnJjvfbZLvm5TnUYHuKM1u38YMevjY1mo3DYUHyXb-oqfRHDe1474Bvji7IeEFNc5jPB8qCT-yq20GkKXzEHFBDU8Y-yvRzL_k0K9MB3-uZr1oFYitrGc4nWEanau6opgreajPD69rYWtp5Wp2lntK27ymNewsN8%3D) now available on DVD.
---
| | In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world. Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more. **Click the link below to help support this course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD.**
---

name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38800%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q%2brzv3Q3PKN6eP1Jvqkynw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38801%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=aAuPE0MvvyeS9aucLrAqaw&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38802%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cSwkTzGvb8UNXO599aPc3w&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38803%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hw5mTuxl6if2O73uydVCtw&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America News

body:

Reports all over the country show that Obama is hellbent on stopping our 2024 campaign.

_He’s_** _RETALIATING_** _because I’m the President who ripped his disastrous “legacy” to shreds._
---
**“How Trump is rolling back Obama’s legacy”** _Source: Washington Post_
**“Trump Discards Obama Legacy, One Rule at a Time”** _Source: New York Times_
**“Obama’s Legacy Has Already Been Destroyed”** _Source: NY Mag_

Come January 20, 2025, we will FINISH the job and remove the last remnants of Obama’s legacy _AND_ cast Biden’s legacy to the ash heap of history along with it.
---
_But to do so, we must counter Obama’s final-hour plot to try and sabotage the GOP primary and win the Iowa Caucus exactly 1 week from today._

clean_body: I’m counting on you. | Peter — Here’s the deal: Marsha Blackburn, the GOP, and special interests plan to buy this Senate seat, and they’re ready to invest megabucks into doing it. The only solution is to work even harder and raise the kind of grassroots support that can overcome them. = | = Look, I’ll always be clear-eyed about the state of our race. Marsha Blackburn has a lot going for her — like the support of corporate PACs and radical politicians. She’s also very unpopular. If we don’t take this opportunity to buy her a one-way ticket out of Washington, we might not get another chance. I’m ready to put in the work to defeat her. I’m counting on you to help me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. name: James Comer
subject: 40 FBI Informants
body:
In the Biden Family Alternate Subject Line: It’s worse than I could ever imagine

|
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk9k2rcpb9995uls5vpu9gj2pci6jdst68ae5m3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim2o72cdh2bs)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It’s a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden’s desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden’s to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it’s not just the FBI, it’s the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney’s offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I’ve been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don’t have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con·spir·a·cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in “conspiracy theories” like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [**DEFEND COMER**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztfkiunpn8e0ur2gm7p79svk92ov11lss1s3mplo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim2o72cdh2bs)
---
It’s because they are complicit in the cover-up. I’ve said it before, and it’s more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I’ll be honest, it is brutal... but I’m a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what’s right, and who certainly doesn’t back down from a fight.**
| [**DEFEND COMER**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf0pqbphvhhn9n6135n1qdati58gk7hm5f05msf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim2o72cdh2bs)
---
I’ve only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I’m once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said “Nothing worth having is easy” and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it’s the promise of America to all of her citizens.**
[**If you’re with me, I’d be honored to have your support.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zaes8boaav4jesngkst3ebj0v1onradh1r4k5no8_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim2o72cdh2bs)
| [**DEFEND COMER**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb478ski1pd4c616j297kpja86k8hctj2bi6tg18_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim2o72cdh2bs)
---
_With Courage,_ James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z951dp1u5po9fj6cl3tqer6r96kth6vve0d71bkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim2o72cdh2bs)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1l2b62ifdi84oi6etcl24g34o8bfgdr5kjhilj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim2o72cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c9h66o33chh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6n8ufor6vpqjgud1a5vkec4bph2nnh0qhol4a40_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim2o72cdh2bs)_

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znq07htb8fhp1atabkaes2f1kqgmbobug6grlm30_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim2o72cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c56fed3cde2241cfb530e5d88b505cfe&_e=2TRr_kcp--W8IXrOCJlSuxtKabnjTHroTgovdtgLOartR_IgzcBYoHGohl17BkM5cZ-6IaS-E9zeSPMU7y9IXDwrtJOROq8g3LndLXFDh7zjqXSwH3iN1Fuey1qV2ST1RgEYCSe8uu5X-1M1fugiGFC7-36K6_J5r_YysYoE7IjVyloQuwcJF53rRyBYSLd66LGJU-OmvPWiwaNyVsakSXCbxh8WFrgF60J3VvjnRJjf8evwIRibESXO_sG2ANFLDCeC0FgdfEHx5qIjOVGMjNBOGr8nsLnDQKPaoPJt0t4vEjaZiFglo49tSknt7MvOnlv7f6WX1sumzZv4gyhiVO0kKeQjlOOkopSodczAaqYSYNbftyEnrBYHE9f-bGneXEjLfUbXuXowq9GvqMFK44uQujk5i8wWKX2rj60Ho_0%3D)

Fellow American! Did you hear?! **WE ARE LESS THAN 7 DAYS AWAY FROM THE IOWA CAUCUS!** You need to see this ASAP! **We have 0 days to waste**. The _entire nation_ will be watching this caucus to see what happens... but we have just over a week to pour every effort into winning this critical Iowa nomination. If there's ever been a time to step up for a candidate,**this is it**. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

| [](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=c56fed3cde2241cfb530e5d88b505cfe&_e=2TRr_kcp--W8IXrOCJlSuxtKabnjTHroTgovdtgLOartR_IgzcBYoHGohl17BkM5cZ-6IaS-E9zeSPMU7y9IXDwrtJOROq8g3LndLXFDh7zjqXSwH3iN1Fuey1qV2ST1RgEYCSe8uu5X-1M1fugiGFC7-36K6_J5r_YysYoE7IjVyloQuwcJF53rRyBYSLd66LGJU-OmvPWiwaNyVsakSXCbxh8WFrgF60J3VvjnRJjf8evwIRibESXO_sG2ANFLDCeC0FgdfEHx5qIjOVGMjMkb14vS8_gSHdR0MbxpBr8KLZnvVFBzNT-TIZhSgBCo2Ps_OC2N0ZAh8s1tsOEQCw0kxgsVdy2_4ajsMTuvDZbh-KvB4PIxlk9J5e8lPHz1jIxzq5BuN5bzPlt86oUK8F94HYv11jnjXjh3KxHk0-s%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

clean_body: Because grassroots donations like yours will power us to victory. | = Hey there, it’s Greg. Thanks to the support of this grassroots team, we defied the odds and made history as the only House Democratic campaign to defeat a multiterm Republican incumbent in 2022. Your support means the world, and we wouldn’t be here without you. But we’re less than 11 months away from Election Day, and extremist Washington Republicans have already started working to take back this seat. We can’t let that happen. That’s why today I’m asking for $1.Yes, actually just $1. = | = = I ran for Congress to deliver for children and families across Southwest Ohio – and I’m proud of the work we’ve done together over the past year.But I’m just getting started. Everything is at stake in this election. During the holiday season, Chris and Team Deluzio reaffirmed a strong commitment to union solidarity. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76714828/448241813/-1807168276?refcode=240108_hq_decrecap_img2&ms=240108_hq_decrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiMjk2YS01MWFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r7MwK_PN7GywjN62OfnSlEeL8O7r7-tndHG4MYQjed4=)** Chris also attended a holiday party with the Pittsburgh Federation of Teachers Union (PFT400) alongside teachers, union organizers, and elected leaders. Chris stands beside unions in the fight for fair contracts, good pay, and hard-earned benefits. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76714829/448241814/-1807168276?refcode=240108_hq_decrecap_img3&ms=240108_hq_decrecap&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2RiMjk2YS01MWFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r7MwK_PN7GywjN62OfnSlEeL8O7r7-tndHG4MYQjed4=)** Chris joined the Penn Hills Democrats for a holiday party alongside Democratic voters, organizers, and elected officials. It was inspiring to see so many Democrats in Western PA ready to continue the fight for a Democratic House majority in 2024. body:
I believe that the American people want a fighter—not a corrupt creature of Washington. Am I right or wrong?

**This is my promise to you, Peter****.**
* **I will lead our Great American Comeback. **

* **I will restore freedom across our country. **

* **I will stand up to the radical Left 's indoctrination of your children, imposition of a social credit score, hostile takeover of our military, and neglect of our southern border.**

* **I will reverse every one of Biden 's policies that have caused average American families to suffer.**

* **I will fight tooth and nail to get our country back on track. I know the potential this country has. Your children deserve to see it. **

**Decline is a choice.** Americans know that our country is headed in the wrong direction, and no one is better positioned than I am to upend Washington; **that 's why the political elite put a giant target on my back.** **_There 's something you need to know_**: every time I've been underestimated, written off, or dismissed, I have proven my opposition wrong. From winning a historic re-election and turning Florida a deep red state during my time as Governor, to bucking the entrenched bureaucracy on COVID, I have fought back and **WON every time.** I have never been the establishment's favorite, and I never will be, Peter, but I've won because of that every time. American voters get to write the narrative in election years, and the time to act is NOW. _We have no time to waste. January 15th will put our campaign to the ultimate test. I am counting on your support before then._ **If we're going to win, we can't leave anything on the table._**_**_**_[**_If you can, will you pitch in $20 today?_**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f2ab73d0e6644cfb9a1409b9fd45eebe&_e=0eAu22l8xvdqs1Yaq1tpTkR-KcdbI9jJFJQd0VCemu7vzKosWTdVfuf3ma5mW2OsrOYuFw_Op22jia_42vmXqAyZJXUtmqtpGrdyShWv_FdMTNALnlm-UWhbXa_FoeytChmHq5WXWvpiYDq5w8ZDOKeySrOvS4pzfREh8e0EHh_QA4PuPxoUBnOQW8Yl4iOhgUGUZP1llLAVEn_FxW0JyAfq1b5_1r32ZQTKsxwOuOcMtWYTqU2E1MfrOIg9i4vivUKe-OMgWo-OxyXLsCeyq2TZtBBNpoGMM3eQ6m42oc9u2srvPVghJ5bcb1jObNLmoiJLIH6ZjfSVTcni4zZp_v8hfnPy9_GMgu-pjW27sP6GXoJVfUjL5kGB6RvfOBXU4otNJ9SLscjvMPE9Xp_cV5Y51_vEEJyK9Mwjee1hCUIVvRY88uuXS2kZ_xSmW7Au)_**_**_**_** Yours in Freedom,

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f2ab73d0e6644cfb9a1409b9fd45eebe&_e=0eAu22l8xvdqs1Yaq1tpTkR-KcdbI9jJFJQd0VCemu7vzKosWTdVfuf3ma5mW2OsrOYuFw_Op22jia_42vmXqAyZJXUtmqtpGrdyShWv_FdMTNALnlm-UWhbXa_FoeytChmHq5WXWvpiYDq5w8ZDOKeySrOvS4pzfREh8e0EHh_QA4PuPxoUBnOQW8Yl4iOhgUGUZP1llLAVEn_FxW0JyAfq1b5_1r32ZQTKsxwOuOcMtWYTqU2E1MfrOIg9i4vivUKe-OMgWo-OxyXLsCeyq2TZtBBNpoGMM3eQ6m42oc8DRcPkvGy_j7oNpMHYgzRT1H95qaYm0VoZgFfPFK9jL295-CfWSyZ8qAW0J0qaYLq64N1QmtZbUxOMarC5mGn-VWqta8-dQ7JYTKIrYzR-1-nLSVqfKj7OA819rrtXoRVxTKxqRhQk7KdOp_rteM5R)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=f2ab73d0e6644cfb9a1409b9fd45eebe&_e=0eAu22l8xvdqs1Yaq1tpTkR-KcdbI9jJFJQd0VCemu7vzKosWTdVfuf3ma5mW2OsrOYuFw_Op22jia_42vmXqAyZJXUtmqtpGrdyShWv_FdMTNALnlm-UWhbXa_FoeytChmHq5WXWvpiYDq5w8ZDOKeySrOvS4pzfREh8e0EHh_QA4PuPxoUBnOQW8Yl4iOhgUGUZP1llLAVEn_FxW0JyAfq1b5_1r32ZQTKsxwOuOcMtWYTqU2E1MfrOIg9i4vivUKe-OMgWo-OxyXLsCeyq2TZtBBNpoGMM3eQ6m42oc9_BH6qZq2tHBnY0gVWAsgD-IS7rbU9A2EAwfpjDpvUhzsPDCunU90NHcJa9mk0bjkPJMM7WVYdfFkecgOt1qjJg7XvzF_TzzoQ4zzgf-hiDDIBrfk4eqe8xV0PMYmQe1glQ3NCMySPMOawyJplIyg6)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

subject: ⏸️ Don't Be Fooled! Learn the Truth Behind Media Manipulation
body:
New episode for dpwillis67@gmail.com - No Doubt About It Returns! | | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d989e773ba&e=567664f14c)

Happy New Year! We hope your holidays were filled with joy. We're thrilled to kick off the year with [a brand new episode of the No Doubt About It Podcast](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=61523bae22&e=567664f14c) featuring Mark and Krysty Ronchetti.

[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2a408244c0&e=567664f14c)
In this episode, Mark shares a hilarious tale of receiving a promising email from Nigeria offering him 3 million dollars. Despite his newfound "riches," Mark jokes that he'll keep doing the podcast – talk about commitment!
| [STREAM NEW EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=159f8a9590&e=567664f14c)
---
The conversation takes a serious turn as we delve into the impact of bias and incompetence on the media's role as a watchdog. Discover how these factors have affected democratic leaders' accountability, allowing them to ignore the people and do as they please.

But it's not all serious talk – we also discuss the surprising turnaround of one of the most incompetent senators in Washington, who's now making a whole lot of sense.
| [STREAM NEW EPISODE NOW](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=1c1d2cefb8&e=567664f14c)
---
Lastly, we explore the current state of the oil and gas industry in the US. Despite challenges, it's playing a crucial role in providing clean, affordable energy to working families, even in the face of the Biden administration's efforts to curb them.

We invite you to listen, enjoy, and share your thoughts on this dynamic episode. Please don't forget to like and subscribe to our podcast, and for more exclusive content, subscribe to our YouTube channel. Explore our merchandise and support the podcast at [nodoubtaboutitpodcast.com](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=cb7793a740&e=567664f14c).
| | | | | | | | | [](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=fed9686975&e=567664f14c)
---

---

---
Best regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti

Despite challenges, it's playing a crucial role in providing clean, affordable energy to working families, even in the face of the Biden administration's efforts to curb them. We invite you to listen, enjoy, and share your thoughts on this dynamic episode. Please don't forget to like and subscribe to our podcast, and for more exclusive content, subscribe to our YouTube channel. Explore our merchandise and support the podcast at . | | | | | | | | | | | Best regards,Mark and Krysty Ronchetti | | | | | © 2024 Choose Adventure Media. All rights reserved.

subject: This is HUGE!

body:
#
Did you see this?
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240108-1-t23&t=1&akid=5134%2E196590%2EO1r_fp)
This is HUGE.
After years of the GOP abusing its power to silence the voice of Wisconsinites, the Wisconsin Supreme Court has finally thrown out the GOP’s heavily gerrymandered maps!
Not only does that mean that competitive and fair elections are returning to Wisconsin, but that Democrats finally have a real chance at flipping the state legislature blue!
So as we begin 2024, it is crucial that we have the resources to make that happen and undo the damage Republicans have caused across Wisconsin.
[**Can you contribute $3 to our special fund dedicated to flipping the legislative majority in Wisconsin? Your contribution will help us turn Wisconsin blue up and down the ballot.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-jan24.Ibl7yb&refcode=em240108-1-t23&t=2&akid=5134%2E196590%2EO1r_fp)

clean_body: I never thought this would happen | | | People look at me and don't think that I'm the #1 enemy of liberal billionaires in the nation. I 'm a father of 6, a Congressman, and an Air Force Reserve Lt. Colonel. My favorite thing to do is take my kids to football and dance practice then church on Sundays. I love my country so much - my life is dedicated to the service of my family and Iowan community - the last thing on my mind are shady far-left donors. But after a recent survey found that my race will be one of the closest in the nation in 2024, I called for action. The numbers say that I'm behind by just a fraction of a percent right now - and with just the right push I'll be able to retake the lead again. | Thank you and God Bless, Zach Nunn | Paid for by Iowans For Zach Nunn | PO Box 11 Bondurant, IA 50035 % Zach Nunn is a member of the US Air Force Reserved. Today marked our first legislative session of the new year and like me, my Democratic colleagues are ready to get back to work on behalf of Arizonans. The margins couldn’t be any closer, friend. In both chambers, Democrats are only ONE seat down and TWO seats away from building a majority that keeps hardworking Arizonans at the center of the work. name: Tom Barrett for Congress
subject: My opponent wore another man’s uniform
body:
He never served but he pretended he did | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659c3f89c3188e0e3eedc7bb&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftombarrettforcongress.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D659c178e5501682ea35b229a%26ss_email_id%3D659c3f89c3188e0e3eedc7bb%26ss_campaign_name%3DMy%2Bopponent%2Bwore%2Banother%2Bman%25E2%2580%2599s%2Buniform%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2024-01-08T18%253A32%253A36Z&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_659c178e5501682ea35b229a&l=en-US&s=qmA9kloewbcNL8l4zuEy1FKKeDM%3D)
---
| Peter Willis, this weekend, I was invited on Fox News and asked about my opponent’s decision to wear another man’s uniform and pretend to be an Army veteran. You can watch the interview [here](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659c3f89c3188e0e3eedc7bb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FHv2qbaPcNWg&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_659c178e5501682ea35b229a&l=en-US&s=c8sUAxUu68SAv-hbWCD70ZL5ot4%3D).
---
| [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659c3f89c3188e0e3eedc7bb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fyoutu.be%2FHv2qbaPcNWg&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_659c178e5501682ea35b229a&l=en-US&s=c8sUAxUu68SAv-hbWCD70ZL5ot4%3D)
---
| **Click image to watch Tom on Fox & Friends**
---
I spent 22 years in the U.S. Army and I’m proud of that service. The uniform means something to me and the other men and women who’ve risked their lives to protect our freedoms.To see a career politician like my opponent, _who didn’t serve_ , don the uniform of another man, on Veterans Day no less, is an insult to all who have made the sacrifices required to have that honor.Not only does he not deserve to wear that uniform, he doesn’t deserve to be in Congress.
---
[_ _ DONATE _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659c3f89c3188e0e3eedc7bb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fff-donate&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_659c178e5501682ea35b229a&l=en-US&s=s8ng6nHlGsHphsO7LNQ2zH5dF7U%3D)
---
Will you help me make sure he never sets foot in the United States Congress with a donation of [$10, $25, $50, $100, or even $250](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659c3f89c3188e0e3eedc7bb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fff-donate&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_659c178e5501682ea35b229a&l=en-US&s=s8ng6nHlGsHphsO7LNQ2zH5dF7U%3D)?I promise you that I will never pretend to be something I’m not. I’m a father, a husband, and someone who loves our country and our state. That’s what will guide me in Congress.
---
|
---
[_ _ Donate _ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=659c3f89c3188e0e3eedc7bb&u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Ftom-barrett-for-congress%2Fff-donate&w=618846223a022e7ecb41d30c&c=b_659c178e5501682ea35b229a&l=en-US&s=s8ng6nHlGsHphsO7LNQ2zH5dF7U%3D)
---

Prescription drug prices are out of control.
Big Pharma is making record profits on many drugs that you, the taxpayer, helped pay to research and develop. They gouge Americans while charging other nations with humane health systems lower prices.
**Now, President Joe Biden is taking action, proposing new guidelines allowing the federal government to exercise its "march-in rights."**
If a pharma company refuses to lower its prices to a reasonable level, the federal government can license the drug to another manufacturer.
**[The Department of Commerce is holding an official comment period on these new rules, and we need your voice. Here in Pennsylvania, the 2024 race for Attorney General is going to be one of the most important in our lifetime.
After all, if we elect an anti-choice, anti-democracy extremist as our next Attorney General, there will be _nothing_ to stop the far-right from enacting their destructive agenda across our commonwealth.
They would roll back abortion rights, gut voting rights, roll back health care access, and peddle Donald Trump’s dangerous conspiracies and authoritarian policies.
We need to win this race, folks. I promise I’ll be the frontline defense against anyone who wants to roll back your rights. But this won’t be an easy race to win; we have to prepare now.

clean_body: Folks, in an election year like 2024, we can’t take anything for granted. As Pennsylvania's former Auditor General, I’ve been through campaigns before. So I know misleading attacks and endless negative ads are coming our way – and we have to be prepared to face them head on. That’s why I’m reaching out to you right now to ensure we have the resources to fight back. = | | = Here in Pennsylvania, the 2024 race for Attorney General is going to be one of the most important in our lifetime. After all, if we elect an anti-choice, anti-democracy extremist as our next Attorney General, there will be nothing to stop the far-right from enacting their destructive agenda across our commonwealth. They would roll back abortion rights, gut voting rights, roll back health care access, and peddle Donald Trump’s dangerous conspiracies and authoritarian policies. We need to win this race, folks. I promise I’ll be the frontline defense against anyone who wants to roll back your rights. subject: ** AMERICAN SECURITY SURVEY **

body:

Peter,
I’ve been raising the alarm over the last several months. I’ve never been more concerned.
_Our great nation, and our ally Israel, are locked in a battle of good vs. evil, as we fight back against both these barbaric terrorists intent on the destruction of civilized society AND the extreme woke-left radicals who want to destroy us from within._
Here at home, we are at a breaking point – with $34 trillion in debt (and growing), all-time record-high illegal immigration, and our nation’s standing on the world stage in freefall.
**We must stand united with Israel to prevail against Hamas and its allies, and we need to RAMP UP OUR FIGHT FOR REPUBLICAN VICTORY to get America back on track.**
Today, we want to get your opinion. Please take our **[American Security Survey](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/b2b0ec8339832f893947229f28c3afba/50cc8deb6b48d106c3d6b838967d376c/33013)** now:
_Do you feel safer now than four years ago?_
_Do you believe Joe Biden and the Democrats have done enough to keep you safe?_
_Do you have any additional thoughts to share on this issue?_

clean_body: With all eyes on us, we can’t waste a single opportunity to reach as many voters as possible. | | | This is important, Peter.The 2024 presidential primary season is HERE, and we’re launching NEW TV ads in the key states to kick things off. With all eyes on us, we can’t waste a single opportunity to reach as many voters as possible. Your contribution -- today \-- couldn’t be more impactful. MAGA Republicans and outside spending groups are flooding this race with millions, and they’re doing everything they can to tarnish Joe and Kamala’s record of fighting for working people. To counter their attacks, it’s critical we show a massive wave of grassroots momentum right out the gate -- and reaching thousands of voters with our new TV ads is one of the best ways to do that. But Peter, these ads are expensive, and we need YOUR help to keep them on the air. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you for all that you do. JoeBiden.com

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Personal Letter for You

body:
This message is an opportunity to introduce myself.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_lnlybxACtlVzgTcqWZJ8w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfvJyP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9qb2luLXdob2lzbWlrZS1wYS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWhhLWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDEwNV9lMDAwMDE2LW1qX2pvaW4td2hvaXNtaWtlX3BhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXBhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDgmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PVcDc3BjQgplmF5DnGXtfLjFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
**_“Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson.”_** When I heard that aloud for the first time it was truly a surreal experience. Even now, as I write it down I’m both humbled and thrilled. I am honored beyond imagination and completely understand how great of a responsibility it is to lead the House of Representatives on behalf of patriotic Americans like you. This message is an opportunity to introduce myself, and I’m truly grateful that you’re reading this right now – but before I tell you my story, I have a request: **_Firstly, would you pray for me?_** I’ve always believed in the power of prayer. That’s why I’m asking that you pray on my behalf that God would guide my hand and my gavel through my tenure as Speaker of the House. **_Secondly,[would you join Team Johnson?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_lnlybxACtlVzgTcqWZJ8w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfvJyP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9qb2luLXdob2lzbWlrZS1wYS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWhhLWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDEwNV9lMDAwMDE2LW1qX2pvaW4td2hvaXNtaWtlX3BhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXBhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDgmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PVcDc3BjQgplmF5DnGXtfLjFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) [](Friend)_**The House Republican Majority will soon be down to just a razor-thin margin and America is at a true crossroads. Will we submit and allow Democrats to take back the House in 2024, or will we fight back and expand our majority? **[To stand strong and fight back, we truly need your support.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_lnlybxACtlVzgTcqWZJ8w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfvJyP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9qb2luLXdob2lzbWlrZS1wYS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWhhLWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDEwNV9lMDAwMDE2LW1qX2pvaW4td2hvaXNtaWtlX3BhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXBhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDgmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PVcDc3BjQgplmF5DnGXtfLjFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** **[Even $1 could be the difference between Republican and Democrat Control.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_lnlybxACtlVzgTcqWZJ8w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfvJyP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9qb2luLXdob2lzbWlrZS1wYS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWhhLWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDEwNV9lMDAwMDE2LW1qX2pvaW4td2hvaXNtaWtlX3BhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXBhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDgmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PVcDc3BjQgplmF5DnGXtfLjFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)** Growing up, my dad was a fireman. To me, he was Superman, and I wanted to be just like him. For the longest time I was set on serving my community as a firefighter — but after my father was severely injured while on the job, he discouraged me from following in his footsteps. So I turned to my other passion of service: The Law. I was the first member of my family to earn a Bachelor’s degree. And just a few years later, I graduated from law school. I would go on to specialize in Constitutional Law and dedicate my career to defending religious liberty. I also founded a non-profit law firm to defend Christians against religious persecution. In 2016 I ran to become a member of the House of Representatives and WON. Since then, I’ve spent every day working to defend freedom for generations to come. I’ve spent the last 20 years on the front lines of the fight to defend our constitution, our country, and our faith. As long as there is breath in my lungs, I won’t stop fighting. Friend, I know you might have heard of me for the first time ever on the news just a few months ago. That’s why I wanted you to hear my story from me, directly, with no media talking heads between us. **[Now that you know a little more about me and what I stand for, I hope that you’ll join Team Johnson.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_lnlybxACtlVzgTcqWZJ8w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfvJyP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9qb2luLXdob2lzbWlrZS1wYS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWhhLWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDEwNV9lMDAwMDE2LW1qX2pvaW4td2hvaXNtaWtlX3BhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXBhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDgmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PVcDc3BjQgplmF5DnGXtfLjFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**
---
[**JOIN TEAM JOHNSON TODAY**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_lnlybxACtlVzgTcqWZJ8w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfvJyP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9qb2luLXdob2lzbWlrZS1wYS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWhhLWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDEwNV9lMDAwMDE2LW1qX2pvaW4td2hvaXNtaWtlX3BhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXBhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDgmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PVcDc3BjQgplmF5DnGXtfLjFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
Thank you so much for your time and support, Friend. Sincerely,
---
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_lnlybxACtlVzgTcqWZJ8w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfvJyP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9qb2luLXdob2lzbWlrZS1wYS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWhhLWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDEwNV9lMDAwMDE2LW1qX2pvaW4td2hvaXNtaWtlX3BhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXBhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDgmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PVcDc3BjQgplmF5DnGXtfLjFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)
---
Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson P.S. I love this country and I’m deeply grateful for the opportunity to serve. But Team Johnson can’t save America from the radical left and turn things around without the help of patriots like you. That’s why I hope and pray that we can count on your support. **[Would you consider joining Team Johnson today?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_lnlybxACtlVzgTcqWZJ8w~~/AARclAA~/RgRnfvJyP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS9taWtlam9obnNvbi9qb2luLXdob2lzbWlrZS1wYS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWhhLWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI0MDEwNV9lMDAwMDE2LW1qX2pvaW4td2hvaXNtaWtlX3BhJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PXBhJnV0bV90Yz1ST04tMjAyNDAxMDgmcmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PVcDc3BjQgplmF5DnGXtfLjFUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)**

That’s why I'm reaching out: [I can’t build a winning coalition without your input. subject: Which initiative do voters care about most?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Rank each initiative, 1 thru 6, to tell us and to tell state legislators in Olympia which ones they should pass into law right now.

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Jon Hamm
subject: A note about Josh Hawley and January 6th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
I’m not willing to sit on the sidelines in this election.
#
Hi Peter, it’s Jon Hamm.
I’m a born-and-raised Missourian who watched with horror when Josh Hawley raised his fist at insurrectionists outside the U.S. Capitol on January 6th, then ran out the back door when they stormed the building later that day.
I’ve seen communities across my home state torn apart because of cowardly politicians like him — and I’m not willing to sit on the sidelines in this election.
So before I ask you to **[add a donation of $10 or whatever you can to my friend Lucas Kunce’s campaign to replace Josh Hawley,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42393?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa) please let me tell you why:**
**[SUPPORT LUCAS KUNCE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42393?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa)**
Most of my family is from a town in Missouri called Ste. Genevieve, about 60 miles south of St. Louis. I’ve watched their community go downhill for years.
While corrupt politicians shipped jobs overseas and voted to give handouts to Wall Street and their corporate allies, everyday people just trying to survive in the place they call home ran out of money and opportunities.
**Our leaders abandoned them — and Josh Hawley is the perfect example.**
Instead of fighting for what would make the communities in my home state stronger, Josh Hawley has been busy engaging in the out-of-touch culture wars that only divide us — all so he can get more and more power for himself.
That’s what we saw on January 6th, 2021. Hawley raised his fist at rioters outside the Capitol because he thought it would make himself look strong. But when sh*t got real, he ran out the back door like a coward — away from the same people he was claiming to support just hours earlier.
What’s even more ridiculous? Since that day, Hawley has desperately tried to convince all of us that he’s the authority on what it means to be a man in this country. He even published a whole book about it earlier this year:
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42393?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa)
Well... when I think about manhood, I think about courage. And that’s not something you can write a book about.
Missouri is the Show Me State. Courage is something you have to show us.
**That’s why I’m supporting Lucas Kunce for Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.** As a born-and-raised Missourian who joined the Marines to serve the community that took care of him growing up, Lucas has already shown us that he knows the true meaning of courage.
Lucas knows courage is about standing up to the powerful and working to rebuild our state. And he knows real leaders fight to empower everyday people and secure our future for generations to come — not for their own power or profit.
**So Peter, if you want to be told about manhood, some guy wrote a book about it.[But if you want someone to show you real courage, please join me in supporting Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate by adding a donation of $10 to his campaign today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42393?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42394?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42394?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42394?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42394?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42394?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42394?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42393?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa)
---
**Lucas worked hard over the last year to put Missouri’s Senate race on the map.** From calling out Josh Hawley’s blatant corruption to building a coalition of working people, pro-democracy organizations like End Citizens United, and local leaders across Missouri — he is Democrats’ best chance to defeat a GOP incumbent and flip a U.S. Senate seat this election cycle.
He’s building a truly grassroots campaign, without a cent from corporate PACs, to defeat Hawley and take back power for everyday working Missourians — just like my friends and family in Ste. Genevieve.
**It has never been more important to elect a warrior for working people like Lucas Kunce to the U.S. Senate.[So Peter, will you join me in supporting Lucas Kunce by adding a donation of $10 to his grassroots campaign today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42393?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa)**
**[SUPPORT LUCAS KUNCE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42393?refcode=em20240108-4567&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa)**
Thanks for standing with me,
Jon Hamm

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240108-4567-footer&t=14&refcode2=4567_614464_kB4pSa&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=4567%2E614464%2EkB4pSa). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Zach Nunn
subject: #1 Enemy of Liberal Billionaires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Iowans For Zach Nunn

I never thought this would happen

People look at me and don't think that I'm the #1 enemy of liberal billionaires in the nation.
**I 'm a father of 6, a Congressman, and an Air Force Reserve Lt. Colonel. **
My favorite thing to do is take my kids to football and dance practice then church on Sundays.
I love my country so much - my life is dedicated to the service of my family and Iowan community - the last thing on my mind are shady far-left donors.
But after a recent survey found that my race will be one of the closest in the nation in 2024, I called for action.
The numbers say that I'm behind by just a fraction of a percent right now - and with just the right push I'll be able to retake the lead again.
[**Could I count on your contribution today to get my numbers back on track?**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8cd2ed2125c3494fa6c0cb7e70993cd6&_e=z4QguL6x9zM7dbxy4eBxvzP5INGxiFP5L6jiLZkwW3iXejvdSURcuENo2BH0cLezqemAMi9A_oTZ6rtKtONJ38JxF8JeVvh4ElBUjVklADgyn_VzqMR4Ip1ydxqHi46i_HsfR9AydaoJapobQOts-Q54HI1RFg6FnIYMr3-sf6jgTvVV7MwSKsceXwWOTVWPygMQKNhMMn5Oz7IvQ2y0vy87kCbgjCrfGyqOQbi_eAsxVRPKUQj1QhdM2_d6BVH09sY2b8drLw1UbILYuQaSeF5ffSv-m-GlE_2UtIb3U0hEckA8hHK8zrCPe9PXDRSdYq6QGcBXJYYAmoU_bMN4Ce9JrpE5n-Bm3IQTa2eZbCHrKUwsTdsB_bCua46SUtifwojZhTwo1CjKctaQPgSZtO0PMG1yQm2sgsYAkpXNidncpe3I5Nwi9U9Nu_4jXWQUnsulzFMKa_rgSsh8fBAWLdsvZtx4a8RntYZpXoy6oRg%3D)

Peter, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It’s a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden’s desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden’s to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it’s not just the FBI, it’s the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney’s offices in Brooklyn, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I’ve been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don’t have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con·spir·a·cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in “conspiracy theories” like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=107630a1d96742ab8efd865aced33d4b&_e=dwVTYMz8ypq2gDck9DhEGJ7d_KPMGFyT7hFGsWWKsW37acslmiXdHxvyy9Qf5kUd_NxntJ7q9zrFxcKwIaZvqw9XwrHRaG_5kxencch8MbvAeI5AaV58-OK4DCg_sYTkAccv58cqa7qrNkDPrKlSgip7p_tgEfmEXk8x5nQAEx0ZC0Tik4mgkm1wPoS6H79bBNJKcExI1s4uTA7Mgu0XMtnNJKSoUOcUiu8SnlzjSGYPF-L1DFEemxwDQU2IJN0tTtY3LUoMcCnkcgg0z8DmTo6gTHeVr6mUu3amkeJFIXoSwMS5H3dzzj6MV415FmeuP9vHV8KHaX0qcWm6yvKS76TJ-CFhCB8eci8akpBJ7c795KsvjN9KaASZDTeiLroA)
---
It’s because they are complicit in the cover-up. I’ve said it before, and it’s more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I’ll be honest, it is brutal... but I’m a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what’s right, and who certainly doesn’t back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=107630a1d96742ab8efd865aced33d4b&_e=dwVTYMz8ypq2gDck9DhEGJ7d_KPMGFyT7hFGsWWKsW37acslmiXdHxvyy9Qf5kUd_NxntJ7q9zrFxcKwIaZvqw9XwrHRaG_5kxencch8MbvAeI5AaV58-OK4DCg_sYTkAccv58cqa7qrNkDPrKlSgip7p_tgEfmEXk8x5nQAEx0ZC0Tik4mgkm1wPoS6H79bBNJKcExI1s4uTA7Mgu0XMtnNJKSoUOcUiu8SnlzjSGZTpJJ4rXGPfEseUFwbkloZX7I9qkVyHEWciUCIH8ttyaUf0CPJYUSbZAD0F9Xp1_3rqcZph4KGxfQCgfVksbIWVizJEjhytRi0SQc1bhqjhYw77ycZGS6M9s62F6yohCm4QmsA5qkCZDpOFa7qYghk)
---
I’ve only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I’m once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said “Nothing worth having is easy” and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it’s the promise of America to all of her citizens.**
[**If you’re with me, I’d be honored to have your support.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=107630a1d96742ab8efd865aced33d4b&_e=dwVTYMz8ypq2gDck9DhEGJ7d_KPMGFyT7hFGsWWKsW37acslmiXdHxvyy9Qf5kUd_NxntJ7q9zrFxcKwIaZvqw9XwrHRaG_5kxencch8MbvAeI5AaV58-OK4DCg_sYTkAccv58cqa7qrNkDPrKlSgip7p_tgEfmEXk8x5nQAEx0ZC0Tik4mgkm1wPoS6H79bBNJKcExI1s4uTA7Mgu0XMtnNJKSoUOcUiu8SnlzjSGZbc0AOMah1EJ28YvaI0a4dFh5NbNy3cfMnIPQU5hX3egLIb5WRBRpdUSkp788N1JI_ksJWQPZnAvBwIcQZ_3vQ1QcELLbSlT9xVGVysAnY_FTh6ntaLOmqmH8MNXYpSaio_kQNGc3BIMoSbbBzko2V)

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Release the Epstein Files
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. called for the total and complete release of the Epstein Files.

|
---
| | | **Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. called for the total and complete release of the Epstein Files.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=epstein_1_8_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
In his interview with FOX News correspondent Jesse Watters, Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. called for the total and complete release of the Epstein Files.
RFK Jr. asked the question, **_“Why are we hiding this from the American people?”_**
If there were prominent politicians and other government officials and US businessmen on the list and involved in Epstein’s nefarious activities, _U.S. citizens should know about it_.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=epstein_1_8_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
RFK Jr. also called for the total and unconditional release of all details surrounding the mysterious death of Jeffrey Epstein.
The loss of faith in our institutions and political class is directly connected to high profile incidents like the Epstein case, and what appears to be an FBI cover-up.
_Were politicians and world leaders blackmailed or coerced by foreign governments?_
_How widespread was the sex trafficking of minors, and exactly who was involved?_
Questions like these will never be answered by the current, corrupt leadership in Washington, and American citizens are left to themselves to piece together answers.
This is unacceptable, and as your next president, Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will restore integrity and honesty to Washington and demand the same from the leaders of its institutions.

Did you know that not a single state bordering Montana has a Democratic Senator? In fact, I’m the only statewide-elected Democrat in Montana.

body:
In the Biden Family
|

| [ ](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=abf5e2df761148408fe478feb09a0e15&_e=9eniR9FhfzOw28DZTMipDKhkTKqH-mz0ZQgplBDSC-yzj5rQo1mf4RyDTtqQoJ2I-SCdZZOWzJvRLpKoJGj_6LX_xadrUcj23sXlp3mW_Yi4v3rSAOo8k3DpdswVabOLWX0tYEFg3ZjzqwrheCtTymTD-1HOwGzICQ7COB_ukyrbIKC7BoyLgZR7EYImRj-g4g1RZU9pOjEDYHRqzHZQcIll3SYUMUt0_qhuN7tHXX2T82jfHijl2jX0ljJ5oC3VJO4KY-o7_RevIvaJabng_2MEHM8j0U1xfX69KZubGK1_L9b-FZ65fpVX8JS0_PRbd97zhfK4dNeFBXIHLZlUc0nd-FnKeNGhibTB3WKr__gu9e_mA9oPesJY5qm0aR5L)
---
Friend, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It's a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden's desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden's to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it's not just the FBI, it's the Department of Justice as well. I heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney's offices in Brookly, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I 've been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don't have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con*spir*a*cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in "conspiracy theories" like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=abf5e2df761148408fe478feb09a0e15&_e=9eniR9FhfzOw28DZTMipDKhkTKqH-mz0ZQgplBDSC-yzj5rQo1mf4RyDTtqQoJ2I-SCdZZOWzJvRLpKoJGj_6LX_xadrUcj23sXlp3mW_Yi4v3rSAOo8k3DpdswVabOLWX0tYEFg3ZjzqwrheCtTymTD-1HOwGzICQ7COB_ukyrbIKC7BoyLgZR7EYImRj-g4g1RZU9pOjEDYHRqzHZQcIll3SYUMUt0_qhuN7tHXX23HNRkEUcorMcg8o1ONDg3wu52mPOdeIX4xMsC6sc54FPympE-LVW-cW2bWih_9hOgXTPn823StI8BbSUXek8yZwJE9bVNbiR6nAYEvG7edGaGDNKbvMyCFBGBMzSv-o_Ldb_7SbeOT6fG52xY7b6N)
---
It's because they are complicit in the cover-up. I've said it before, and it's more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I 'll be honest, it is brutal... but I'm a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what's right, and who certainly doesn't back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=abf5e2df761148408fe478feb09a0e15&_e=9eniR9FhfzOw28DZTMipDKhkTKqH-mz0ZQgplBDSC-yzj5rQo1mf4RyDTtqQoJ2I-SCdZZOWzJvRLpKoJGj_6LX_xadrUcj23sXlp3mW_Yi4v3rSAOo8k3DpdswVabOLWX0tYEFg3ZjzqwrheCtTymTD-1HOwGzICQ7COB_ukyrbIKC7BoyLgZR7EYImRj-g4g1RZU9pOjEDYHRqzHZQcIll3SYUMUt0_qhuN7tHXX0ipilvFkHQOMIBw48mnGMG4Q5HOdOdMjxWJxJwH3UqkTlQ-2I1RvnZM0lMmHAfnPGeivje4iwUbyOZ3FvySTGiLQqpBxat5WLv0CKRG0QKc2L3jPgqLqkRNDCge_2LL5q_CXwKWolbof82AkwqPQRa)
---
I've only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I'm once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said "Nothing worth having is easy" and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it 's the promise of America to all of her citizens. **
[**If you 're with me, I'd be honored to have your support.**](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=abf5e2df761148408fe478feb09a0e15&_e=9eniR9FhfzOw28DZTMipDKhkTKqH-mz0ZQgplBDSC-yzj5rQo1mf4RyDTtqQoJ2I-SCdZZOWzJvRLpKoJGj_6LX_xadrUcj23sXlp3mW_Yi4v3rSAOo8k3DpdswVabOLWX0tYEFg3ZjzqwrheCtTymTD-1HOwGzICQ7COB_ukyrbIKC7BoyLgZR7EYImRj-g4g1RZU9pOjEDYHRqzHZQcIll3SYUMUt0_qhuN7tHXX3iw5EUKIx_AXfLgK52HLxFm27BvBkFWIEW3mqverYUh5zFCfJEKd382F9R4xUxhid1xL-X-s9X6aE4fhCyJGaPLqt4RBkntDv01tyXoAZZPvZbq3_fEKYLKDhHCYcaT2cE1wkDAPqiH98-wGOu4FqR)
