name: ICYMI News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1load458bakh5a9onatqj0c1f6uf3qojjd3c4eo_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim1ob1c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5n21q7ges2re2ifbt7vdip491b8nbde8vavtr30_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim1ob1c9h2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf6mej12747k0vtdtmtihl80bvm23bd2v6ub7u00_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim1ob1c9h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zb24aumcvrk8mrbi7sdmp3kmfhdodnvrtbs3avc0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim1ob1c9h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

| Happy Monday!

Today, I'm reaching out with a gentle nudge. **_[If you haven't already, please take a moment to fill out our 2024 Priorities Survey. Your input is not just valuable. It's crucial.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76717662/448252339/-1799277772?refcode=ea.b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxMDkzMTBmLTU5YWUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-mzcPLlE0i9tPN-HPy0nNLUVASRBZJWi-An7DsNjkdE=&emci=2c6dba08-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)_**

We're at a pivotal moment in the fight for our planet, and your thoughts will guide us in the right direction. Think of it as your Monday mission to stand up against the fossil fuel giants and rally for climate action.

Oh and one more thing, the team has informed me that they will be finalizing all responses by the end of today. So, don't miss your chance to make your voice heard before midnight.

Let's start this week on a strong note!

I've been a bit of a troublemaker in Washington for, well, decades. And I’m proud to still be at it.

Throughout my life, I have found activism the best antidote to despair. It’s why I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to break the fossil fuel industry's stranglehold on politics and elect climate champions in crucial races around the country.

And I am so grateful that you are a part of it.

That’s why today, instead of asking you for a contribution to our movement, I want to know what your issues are and what your activism looks like. **_[Take a few minutes to dive into our 2024 Priorities Survey and tell me what you think our priorities should be. Your honest opinion _matters_ >>> ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76717665/448252342/-1799277772?refcode=ea.b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxMDkzMTBmLTU5YWUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-mzcPLlE0i9tPN-HPy0nNLUVASRBZJWi-An7DsNjkdE=&emci=2c6dba08-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)_**
| [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76717666/448252343/-1799277772?refcode=ea.b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxMDkzMTBmLTU5YWUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-mzcPLlE0i9tPN-HPy0nNLUVASRBZJWi-An7DsNjkdE=&emci=2c6dba08-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)

It's no secret that 2024 will be a make-or-break year for climate action.

**Big Oil will spend millions to keep their fossil fuel allies safe in Washington.**

**In California, Big Oil is fighting for a ballot measure that would OVERTURN a critical law banning new oil drilling next to homes, schools, and daycare centers.**

**And they’re targeting state legislature races to flip the balance of power in swing states.**

I’m ready to fight like hell to save our planet, but that's why your opinion matters more than ever. Your responses will help my team and me understand what you think our main focus should be in the new year.

**_[I promise it will be quick and easy. Click here to take our 2024 Priorities Survey today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76717667/448252344/-1799277772?refcode=ea.b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIxMDkzMTBmLTU5YWUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-mzcPLlE0i9tPN-HPy0nNLUVASRBZJWi-An7DsNjkdE=&emci=2c6dba08-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=b109310f-59ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)_**

clean_body: Let me know. | = | Happy Monday! Today, I'm reaching out with a gentle nudge. We're at a pivotal moment in the fight for our planet, and your thoughts will guide us in the right direction. Think of it as your Monday mission to stand up against the fossil fuel giants and rally for climate action. Oh and one more thing, the team has informed me that they will be finalizing all responses by the end of today. So, don't miss your chance to make your voice heard before midnight. Let's start this week on a strong note! | Thanks again, Jane Fonda Begin forwarded message: | = I've been a bit of a troublemaker in Washington for, well, decades. And I’m proud to still be at it. Throughout my life, I have found activism the best antidote to despair. It’s why I started the Jane Fonda Climate PAC to break the fossil fuel industry's stranglehold on politics and elect climate champions in crucial races around the country. And I am so grateful that you are a part of it. That’s why today, instead of asking you for a contribution to our movement, I want to know what your issues are and what your activism looks like. | It's no secret that 2024 will be a make-or-break year for climate action. Big Oil will spend millions to keep their fossil fuel allies safe in Washington. In California, Big Oil is fighting for a ballot measure that would OVERTURN a critical law banning new oil drilling next to homes, schools, and daycare centers. And they’re targeting state legislature races to flip the balance of power in swing states. I’m ready to fight like hell to save our planet, but that's why your opinion matters more than ever. Your responses will help my team and me understand what you think our main focus should be in the new year. | Thanks for being a climate rockstar! name: Pro Life Update
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions

| This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z7uljs47vrqvh2osga4fala084or38i183hdjqv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim1ob1c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpuaodrc5n0ueen63otn8uq3h50lgv0rm1vkhr10_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim1ob1c3h2bs)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvoc51pd9nlc6gq0rq91n1ldmu0pmrslklmsmbn0_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim1ob1c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4d9p7htuas0onh29doa34hjpm9v91dukbt2pg8g_rp22sh2s8i6eo31ctim1ob1c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

GOP Lawmaker Urges Biden Admin To Investigate CCP-Tied Firm Building
Near Sensitive US Military Sites

A Republican lawmaker called on the Biden administration to
investigate a Chinese government-tied company that plans to build a
facility near several Midwest military sites, according to a letter
shared exclusively with the Daily Caller News Foundation on Monday.
Rep. Jake LaTurner of Kansas sent a letter to the Department of
Defense and Treasury Department expressing “strong concerns” about
Cnano Technology USA Inc.

subject: Final 7 days

body:
With 7 days to go until the Iowa Caucus, Ron DeSantis is the target of every challenger. We can win this... but we have to fight for it. Please, now is the time we need your support.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a380dac21caccbf6bc2685f930c496133e512701cb112798329edcbddc51b42466a51021701db7375145d97593b64ee14aa2)
---
Friend - this is it. _It has all led up to this moment._ The first nominating contest of this election will paint a picture for the nation, and voters will be watching to see the kind of momentum we earn leading up to this test. _These next 7 days are_** _crucial_.**
---
| | [RUSH IN YOUR SUPPORT: $25](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a3809a72289ac0f73ed40e03d9931a4d19d9ba7174dadc8dffb70c486341357b3f3577b11588b6df105f59ed27330bc47a2f)

---
| | [RUSH IN YOUR SUPPORT: $75](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a3803271097b90a39e4a5ba2a664027d0b4c96093c8e5ff844b66151ece0e4999fbc83577fc489d99029fafa35b258234880)
---
| | [RUSH IN YOUR SUPPORT: $100](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a380ff1b906fa8d1578987de66730b1efcc3869e7714df950cde7e6b5e319176ed6b6a0d9a2575c96add4f32d508a86d4b69)
---
The media is adamant that Ron DeSantis doesn't have what it takes. They are trying to paint us dead and now it's time to show them the truth. **_We are READY to prove them wrong._** With your support, nothing can keep us from winning. Stand with us, friend -- **___[_Send in a $15 donation here._](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a3800cf8f95b28b3d4b5316bca59b0718c741a407f2036f1acc6a66a6a22d8e96aafe61af0409c191a2bf0e33fe12f19dbb2)___**
---
[ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a380dac21caccbf6bc2685f930c496133e512701cb112798329edcbddc51b42466a51021701db7375145d97593b64ee14aa2)
---
| | [<<< RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT BEFORE 1/15 >>>](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a380dac21caccbf6bc2685f930c496133e512701cb112798329edcbddc51b42466a51021701db7375145d97593b64ee14aa2)
---
The Iowa Caucus isn't just a big moment for Iowans or our campaign; it could be a turning point for our entire country. We have to throw everything we have into this NOW, and we're asking for your immediate support for the final week before ballots are cast. Thank you,
Team DeSantis

---
| | | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a380dac21caccbf6bc2685f930c496133e512701cb112798329edcbddc51b42466a51021701db7375145d97593b64ee14aa2)
---
| |
**🚨 ATTENTION 🚨** Our grassroots team drives our every success, and we know we ask a lot of you to help us win this critical election. As this race continues to heat up, we will be relying on our supporters to help us go the distance, and we want to make sure we respect your preferences when we reach out to you. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from our team, please click **[here.](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a38060b0cf52a9789c015e527aa20df75e344d85348deaf8fb5e63aa509484a80f22af3046db480e9e5758708a5085e5ada3 "here.")**

---

**Volunteer!**
We welcome you to join Team DeSantis by volunteering to spread our message: Decline is a choice. Success is attainable. And freedom is worth fighting for.

Help us lead our Great American Comeback by getting involved today!
---
| | [Sign up here!](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a3801f4aa703be475f37436000165e4185a6a9f790cb24d2360a011afa95ad67f0f2ca56e4a8a1b479f9302738eb1d7d5eb8)
---
| | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a380dac21caccbf6bc2685f930c496133e512701cb112798329edcbddc51b42466a51021701db7375145d97593b64ee14aa2)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=c42e15608fd3a380dac21caccbf6bc2685f930c496133e512701cb112798329edcbddc51b42466a51021701db7375145d97593b64ee14aa2)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---

body:

Friend! Did you hear?! **WE ARE LESS THAN 7 DAYS AWAY FROM THE IOWA CAUCUS!** You need to see this ASAP! **We have 0 days to waste**. The _entire nation_ will be watching this caucus to see what happens... but we have just over a week to pour every effort into winning this critical Iowa nomination. If there's ever been a time to step up for a candidate,**this is it**. Nothing matters more than supporting the candidate this nation needs NOW. _**Can you help us?**_ **[>>> RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT TO HELP! <<<](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ef674cc76f38487eaece14346559e760&_e=ycZDcTBGyGD_9y5uI6n7tXObfC34_9KFCepTf-vbK_-pX9VvI1Eye4UrUljXcZEKNP91GyHIc-tods3j3vGdfin5uCEqPdmk7Q66CNV3mzHBYiVXKIVc8MBVGZuOZYaoEwrlMfo79XT9ZhAxDdpb59e4MOk9FHiTwuToA6--SQcVUh1YQST7jgO-Ar2uk0y-w8xz7PgMacrWxMRIZWxuW8qAQoz8v9vPO5l5VoqTmgj_fFH3asjE7x6DuSuIQ_uA4yFmyxaZVN_zCfhiK1F0gF-ezVjjTVPw_rh2QPtCw4Ocl03rHi2VA_xPH0HtLpKEXDRAM4nahokj1fXBfpXFpHC62P6deta_EUst8spnc-NAaCDCHDrR5AWU5UPm5WRN-qQfMzm3tmRvw5E6QW0T6EtK_mzt0FVxPL5q3iXGdLE%3D ">>> RUSH IN ANY AMOUNT TO HELP! <<<")** \- Lexi Team DeSantis \---------------------------Forwarded Message-------------------------
Hi Friend, We'll cut to the chase. We have just 7 days before we--
* Prove to the radical Left that we have what it takes to win.

* Shock every person who has bought into the fake narratives of the liberal media throughout this race.

* Take a giant leap forward toward winning for the American people.

With your support, we can make sure that January 15th, 2024 goes down as the most incredible day of our campaign yet. _But we only have 7 DAYS to do it._ We promise you, that we are putting in the work to win the Iowa Caucus. However, we're fighting against $40,000,000 that has been spent against Ron DeSantis. **This is where you come in.** What you can give today is what will drive our actions tomorrow and the final 6 days before ballots are cast.

Team DeSantis

_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ef674cc76f38487eaece14346559e760&_e=ycZDcTBGyGD_9y5uI6n7tXObfC34_9KFCepTf-vbK_-pX9VvI1Eye4UrUljXcZEKNP91GyHIc-tods3j3vGdfin5uCEqPdmk7Q66CNV3mzHBYiVXKIVc8MBVGZuOZYaoEwrlMfo79XT9ZhAxDdpb59e4MOk9FHiTwuToA6--SQcVUh1YQST7jgO-Ar2uk0y-w8xz7PgMacrWxMRIZWxuW8qAQoz8v9vPO5l5VoqTmgj_fFH3asjE7x6DuSuIQ_uA4yFmyxaZVN_zCfhiK1F0gJJQ2ReU7vTdYJ7uM0f3h0ZV51mmmrETfA-Uz9dU-HlieY12gEdxJQ7wLTr4l2vht-DaT4HrHYhRS2B7K11CxE34QFC5UpJDeCJmWmWApQ6kzKMLShvpNtUcNFo5h8pYPoFfzCBSaqGafY0zYowmBEk%3D)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ef674cc76f38487eaece14346559e760&_e=ycZDcTBGyGD_9y5uI6n7tXObfC34_9KFCepTf-vbK_-pX9VvI1Eye4UrUljXcZEKNP91GyHIc-tods3j3vGdfin5uCEqPdmk7Q66CNV3mzHBYiVXKIVc8MBVGZuOZYaoEwrlMfo79XT9ZhAxDdpb59e4MOk9FHiTwuToA6--SQcVUh1YQST7jgO-Ar2uk0y-w8xz7PgMacrWxMRIZWxuW8qAQoz8v9vPO5l5VoqTmgj_fFH3asjE7x6DuSuIQ_uA4yFmyxaZVN_zCfhiK1F0gN4lC0SekuufKqEi1FKiDYVpvR7IG-JLcMAPRTAIuViGGTtRSwM4tkN9mOj4_V2z7yM9Q9YWdqycx-YVn5EFHFf79zsHTz0k_5drl9acBFhPbSeCN6lJqmrAMuRewwSMRtXVfunMGObbj2Brm-2eQRw%3D)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|
---

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). * This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

name: VoteVets
subject: Our new ad: Buddy Up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump will never understand service because he has only ever served himself.
#
Derek, did you see Trump’s first ad of the 2024 cycle?
His campaign is trying to show that there is no greater supporter of our Troops and Veterans than Trump.
Yeah. Ok.
The guy who **just this weekend** attacked John McCain for not being able to raise his arms after being tortured in the Hanoi Hilton for years.
The guy who shut down our government and put pay for the Troops at risk. Who attacked our Generals and Admirals, and threatened to have the former Chairman of the Joint Chiefs executed.
The guy who called fallen heroes “suckers” and “losers,” who tried to avoid being seen with injured warriors because it “doesn’t look good for me.”
Yeah, that guy.
His campaign can say whatever they want. But the truth is, Trump can’t help himself. Trump looks down on the Military, he looks down on our Veterans. Trump will never understand service because he has only ever served himself.
And it’s our job to make sure that Veterans and members of the Military don’t get the wool pulled over their eyes by this traitor.
That’s why we just rolled out our newest ad, “Buddy Up.”
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan24-buddy-up-ad.BuTvmF&refcode=em240108-1-30&t=1&akid=22777%2E3013755%2ECUbR_U)
**[And to help us make sure as many people see this as possible, we’re asking you to watch it here and make a donation of $5.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan24-buddy-up-ad.BuTvmF&refcode=em240108-1-30&t=2&akid=22777%2E3013755%2ECUbR_U)
| [CHIP IN $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-jan24-buddy-up-ad.BuTvmF&refcode=em240108-1-30&t=3&akid=22777%2E3013755%2ECUbR_U)
---
Don’t let him get away with this.
Please chip in.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

Friend,

Last week I had a town hall on CNN and it was an incredible night answering questions from voters in the audience and sharing my vision for our future!

Whether it was discussing my plans to restore our economy, secure our border, and make America strong and proud again - I made sure to have an honest discussion with the people in the audience and Americans across the country.

Thanks to people like you, I know we can win this race and save our country. But I need your help to make it happen.

**[Can you rush a donation so we can reach every American with my message, win the White House, and SAVE our future?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=513c1de89d634d53896cdb12cea7da74&_e=PjO_rh_0NKTZ7ikhZ3d89A3psW_0a2R6byzGpaFyC6NicE7Ov7AUFAHYuvkyMg-jFe8tSgrbS9-65gjaIRGONhBFjxGizMJCNdcTSBK_tl-eJiji0PGntl3hKWtXjkm3IwZHYgmynsmvrIolm3eGObdeGCjwhQB92Mww2OSMzE5539Wv9iLr2ZJogrhha0kFYHWJD44OyV7HbK1zQG0ONI7jC52wyQTEAlsEKrvxBJkH9IvrwEaH27yXLa_3caqK1CYRL5LDJ6PuqqtBMZmRazC-4K3VKPov_NbnBGKwUG2Gy242pBxXwiItqlwPr5mFF_RxbApfInaH61pVmBAxjUVrkFhLtlpqtYIKfLnLnG_gds3ivwop9MiB94Z4xK57pf3X2eu8UHSYT75H40GxaaYIuv1zkGYSFZ2EF0OGn6-bKt0-X9rXHztTPR7V2Ae_2GPbWJQdeejeEmQLtlyUUQYy-PsTZSle_SoK5JdRqc6mAwjGRuHlklaWdOJFewiMZEjCg4whvGbJUUSYXdcf-ojlDRxWlUUqF9WAABAOfrY70y-0d4X1aFjBWNhHayCgCorGYk4KDo4cbndKWbwpHmTNIBYEcjamqNXYLykuXOYoAswlgeu2ZTgkVAb6AT1g "If you’re reading this email, that means YOU — we need YOUR support to help Nikki win this race. Americans are ready for a candidate who can win and right this ship, and I'm ready to get to work as your next president!

But with less than 10 DAYS until the first votes take place, I need your help right now to reach every voter with my message of strength and truth.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=513c1de89d634d53896cdb12cea7da74&_e=PjO_rh_0NKTZ7ikhZ3d89A3psW_0a2R6byzGpaFyC6NicE7Ov7AUFAHYuvkyMg-jzBFGsWKiwH2DXIXywn1Cep9D-LVFGCYZ3oqpLYuYKn5jtPlKp0KGRmtzfLVwJtDlq1m4-szzHuArG42r63mX6QNhtdFUOgiM3giayHSF58uantm1BZwBziBxx0MazZXmYRvXLHG8gj-Z5Hv5BhQmvOLDLhb2x_VOPa1NUibDz_kTsMDZChqvmMcUIRkBM0f5jypIN8j34eqMjETNGuqMnh_8P3-wo5PFu1uZUjUEpw-m9NXpRpjv0StZhN7p3fS56z_hII8UF2N1cCCUScubNPVcn8HJzixXTvw4DCbuOn5YAnZ7xHMLi_X9t1PVC9YS8pZTW0GgRkNqvK63cqFnUUNgrN7T9dScvAthEuq-YFqOH3dOcRH8Cwcz2W4qPl4_kJP48gfHCzN0BLaA-3gAW_IiJACl8izNgQkkyoZ8jvv6DdjAHrratcyVywij-QYln4ulsLo0pQ6SO60iJ5_US71bvLKEbkzvsqJMc6eZM2TmrO_QqSnqRqCh_uA0jASYISXyJ0nSqLhtf-HBSEuz5mylXOzozg7KQJKgpfJwvCuQOLrdTRxm-u-GTzVa_NRI "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: Last week I had a town hall on CNN and it was an incredible night answering questions | | | | | | Friend, Last week I had a town hall on CNN and it was an incredible night answering questions from voters in the audience and sharing my vision for our future! Whether it was discussing my plans to restore our economy, secure our border, and make America strong and proud again - I made sure to have an honest discussion with the people in the audience and Americans across the country. Thanks to people like you, I know we can win this race and save our country. But I need your help to make it happen. "If you’re reading this email, that means YOU — we need YOUR support to help Nikki win this race. " | | Just like I did last Thursday, I will continue to fight for our future and share my plans for tackling the real issues Americans care about. Americans are ready for a candidate who can win and right this ship, and I'm ready to get to work as your next president! But with less than 10 DAYS until the first votes take place, I need your help right now to reach every voter with my message of strength and truth. "Will you rush a donation to keep the momentum SURGING and amplify my message across America? " Even a $5 donation today makes a difference. Let's make history! My very best, | Nikki R. Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. subject: Liz Cheney 𝗧𝗔𝗥𝗚𝗘𝗧𝗦 Trump’s presidential run!!!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
This is a nightmare for Trump
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY)
---
**Did you see this?!** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president-v2?source=FFR_20240108_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY) Our 2024 Election Strategy is **_TOTALLY_** thrown off!

**So we’re conducting an urgent poll for top Democrats to finetune our strategy:** | **[Do you think Liz Cheney should take on Trump for the Republican Nomination?](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president-v2?source=FFR_20240108_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY)** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president-v2?source=FFR_20240108_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY) | **[YES, I DO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president-v2?source=FFR_20240108_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY)**
---
**[NO, I DON’T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president-v2?source=FFR_20240108_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=11&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY)**
**[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president-v2?source=FFR_20240108_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=12&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY)**
We don’t need to remind you how much is at stake next year.

Election experts predict that Cheney could even garner enough support from moderate Republicans to challenge Trump for the Republican nomination!

So we’re monitoring the situation closely and conducting an urgent poll to gauge local support for a Liz Cheney presidential run. **Complete your poll below:**
**[Do you think Liz Cheney should run for President as a Republican?](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president-v2?source=FFR_20240108_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=13&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY)**
[ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president-v2?source=FFR_20240108_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=14&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY)
**[YES, I DO »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president-v2?source=FFR_20240108_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=15&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY)**
---
**[NO, I DON’T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president-v2?source=FFR_20240108_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=16&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY)**
**[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/cheney-president-v2?source=FFR_20240108_EMPOLL_E2_T0_AC_RS&t=17&akid=20615%2E4449941%2EnSeFbY)**
We look forward to reading your responses,

Fight for Reform

body:
don’t let this happen ever again...
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59457?t=6&akid=12380%2E878179%2EKmvkke) | [**WE NEED 500 DEMOCRATS TO COMMIT TO SUPPORTING DEMOCRATIC HEROES LIKE SHERROD BROWN »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59457?t=7&akid=12380%2E878179%2EKmvkke)
---
**WE TOLD YOU:** a new poll shows Sherrod Brown within the margin of error of losing his seat to any of his three potential Republican challengers.

**WE TOLD YOU:** Brown’s seat is expected to be one of the closest, most important races this year!

**WE TOLD YOU:** We missed our end-of-month ‘Battleground Senate Fund” by almost $1,500.
_We CANNOT let mess-ups like these become our new normal, not when we’re fighting to save our razor-thin Senate majority!_

body:
33% JUMP LAST YEAR ALONE in WashCo ELL enrollments (Allegany is #2), while MD schools drop 60% in learning scores. | | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=c77c232a4a&e=5bb5efcda7)

|
# Biden Moves Thousands of Illegal Aliens Into MD's District Six,
School Grades Falter -
MD 5 STAR SCHOOLS DROP 60%.
I've been contacted by area High School teachers who report their classrooms are becoming overwhelmed with non-English speaking students - sometimes a third of the entire class, harming their teaching and the already-stressed student's learning and testing abilities of the whole class.
As State elected officials head back to Annapolis this week, what is happening at this moment here in our hometowns will change Western Maryland forever unless stopped by the next federal election.

IF YOU WANT TO SEND BIDEN A MESSAGE NOW TO SHUT THE OPEN BORDER, ONLY ONE THING MATTERS: SHOCK HIM BY HELPING ME [OUT RAISE MY DEMOCRAT OPPONENTS TODAY](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=4ef389b6f7&e=5bb5efcda7)[.](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=0015f11b0e&e=5bb5efcda7)

---
|
---
|
#### Friend,
Why isn't everyone running for Congress talking about this? As you likely know, the Maryland Public Schools annual ["Report Card" ](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=d779775ec0&e=5bb5efcda7)is out, and it shows that District Six schools lost ratings for four and five-star excellence, with over sixty percent dropping down to mediocre ratings.

!! Our schools such as Allegany's Parkside Elementary, Washington County's Smithsburg Middle and Pleasant Valley Elementary Schools, Garrett County's Accident Elementary, and over half of Montgomery County's high schools - and others, all dropped from a five star down to a four star rating in 2023.!!

**_At the same time, nearly 1000 new English Language enrollments just last year occurred in Washington County alone, with the runner up being Allegany County - up over 33% and 18% respectively from the year before_. And up over 110% under the Biden regime's illegal open border policy. **And it is only increasing this year with a plan for over 22 new ELS teachers to be hired in Washington County alone - on your real property tax dollars. Most of the new students are "fleeing" El Salvador and other nations and are being repatriated here into District Six illegally.

This is no coincidence. It is an engineered plan by the Biden Left to overthrow our communities and law and order by helping illegal aliens move into our local communities.

**Maryland's District Six is where some of the Nation's highest levels of sanctuary state taxpayer funding of free social programs are handed out**. That's why they already release prisoners from the state prisons right here in Hagerstown rather than back in the cities they came from when they did the crime. Now they're moving in illegal aliens. Coupled with free federal money and the lower cost of living in District Six, and the actions of the Biden administration even illegally [flying people in from other nations to the American destination of their choice](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=60bfbf1157&e=5bb5efcda7) is tantamount to an overthrow of our government, constitution and personal property rights.

Most of the voters I speak with ask me: "besides praying, being angry and contacting our elected officials, what can we do - this has to end!"
I can tell you in one word: **_support_**.

We will all lose everything we have worked for, pay higher taxes and lose property values unless you help me win and fight this massive invasion. I need your support today to win. [Join and donate now](https://coxforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=866897dcd900340c866a1068a&id=09f1564f03&e=5bb5efcda7).

Thank you and God bless you and our beautiful American families, farms, cities, land and nation.

Freedom and victory,

P.S. I am ready to fight for you in Congress, but unless we out raise the far Left, your voice will never be heard. This is our moment - help today. Thank you.

| More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.

clean_body: checking in - | | | | == | Peter, I know we've been in touch regarding your 2024 Election Year Membership - and I wanted to take some time to touch base and let you know where your membership fees will go. MAKE A ONE-TIME CONTRIBUTION OF $35 OR MORE TO | | == | Your contribution will enable us to: Knock on more doors Buy more yard signs Reach more constituents Make more phone calls * Put out more ads This is all essential to victory, Peter. == | | & | | & | | & | | & | | & | | & | Thank you, | == | Russell Prescott Republican for Congress NH-01 | | == | | == | More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner. Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963. Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook. Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company. Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce. He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business. | | == == == | | | | | | | Prescott for Congress | PO Box 26, Kingston, NH 03848 | | Sent by mailto:info@prescottforcongress.com powered by

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76719008/448257347/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTQzY2MxMy01ZWFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ME8wpungZu1fqUuMZJu8K7HOz2Zo-dnWjtEea-EVuF4=&emci=0334fe6d-4aae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3a43cc13-5eae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=43402272) | Dear Peter, **Yesterday marked one year since I was sworn into the House of Representatives** , becoming the first woman and openly LGBTQ+ member of Congress to represent Vermont. It has been the honor of my life to serve you all and fight for the Green Mountain State, and I will never take this office for granted. You may remember that the incoming freshman class was expected to be sworn in to Congress days earlier — but following chaos and disarray within the Republican conference, it took fifteen voters and four days until Republicans finally elected a speaker on the 16th try. McCarthy lasted less than nine months as speaker before being ousted by his own party. Then, the GOP failed to fill the speaker role for _three weeks_ , leaving the House at a total standstill. Instead of taking stock of their party’s dysfunction and extremism, “moderate” Republicans pointed fingers at Democrats for their own chaos. 🙄 As I reflect back on my first year in office, **I am more determined than ever to fight like hell to take back the House majority this November.** Republicans have shown that they have no interest in actually governing our country, and enough is enough. **The only sustainable solution to ending this chaos in the people’s house is to ensure that we take back the House of Representatives this year.[Will you make a donation of $27 or more to my re-election campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76719009/448257348/-526253979?&refcode=E5878-20240108-OneYear-SL-Other&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTQzY2MxMy01ZWFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ME8wpungZu1fqUuMZJu8K7HOz2Zo-dnWjtEea-EVuF4=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76719010/448257349/-526253979?express_lane=true&&refcode=E5878-20240108-OneYear-EG-Other&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTQzY2MxMy01ZWFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ME8wpungZu1fqUuMZJu8K7HOz2Zo-dnWjtEea-EVuF4=)** | **[$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76719011/448257350/-526253979?express_lane=true&&refcode=E5878-20240108-OneYear-EG-Other&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTQzY2MxMy01ZWFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ME8wpungZu1fqUuMZJu8K7HOz2Zo-dnWjtEea-EVuF4=)**

body:

_Democratic Secretary of State Candidate Jesse James Mullen joins Republican former state legislator Frank Garner, and Ranked Choice Montana Executive Director Eric Buhler for a non-partisan forum on Jan. 14 in Paradise, Montana._
SANDERS COUNTY DEMOCRATS OF MONTANA Join us for a Non-Partisan Educational Forum
Elections: Integrity and Involvement How will the new redistricting affect you?
Free and open to the public.
Sunday, January 14th, 20242:00 - 4:00 p.m. at the Paradise Center, Paradise, MT
Mindy Ferrell, election judge and current Sanders County Democrat Chair, will open the event with information about the new district lines in Sanders County, our county's election integrity, how to become an election judge.
Presenters and Topics: How does the Secretary of State's office maintain election integrity?
What came out of the 2023 Legislative Election's Integrity Commission?
Jesse Mullen, Democratic Candidate for Montana Secretary of State What are the opportunities available to empower the voter over partisan politics?
Explanation of proposed CI 126 and 127
Frank Garner, 4-term Republican Legislator, Montanans for Election Reform, and retired Kalispell Chief of Police What is Ranked Choice Voting and how would it effect our elections?
What states currently use this system?

Eric Buhler, Politically Independent, Executive Director, RCV Montana
|

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Teichert=20for=20U.S.=20Senate?=
subject: Teichert on the Trail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Teichert for Senate]()
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4ab56170923a/icymi-john-teicherts-vision-for-marylands-senate-on-fox-6688098?e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
# Teichert on the Trail
Happy New Year! Welcome to Teichert on the Trail, our weekly email highlighting the latest news and events from the campaign as retired Air Force Brigadier General John Teichert earns the hearts, minds, and votes of Marylanders in the race to be their next U.S. Senator.

[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=7ec96a507e&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
On Thursday, January 4th, John joined Andrew Wilkow on [Wilkow!](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=9a2e5bc12c&e=1b1fb1ad9f) to discuss one of the largest issues facing Americans today: the open southern border. John addressed the importance of addressing real problems with real solutions by saying in part, **“There are real problems in this country; the border is a huge one of those. Americans are expecting their leaders to address those real problems with real solutions. You look at the border, and it's a multifaceted crisis – a national security crisis, a public health crisis, a public safety crisis, and a humanitarian crisis – because this administration is failing to do the basics, which is maintaining our nation's sovereignty by sealing the border.”**
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=ed172a8b10&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
General Teichert recently joined Patrick Conley on[ More Than A Conversation](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=4dac885daf&e=1b1fb1ad9f) podcast to discuss his extensive career as a retired Air Force Brigadier General, his bid for the U.S. Senate in Maryland, and solutions for the current turmoil and lack of leadership in Washington D.C.
**“Innovation doesn't flow from the top down; it flows from the bottom up,” John stated. “One of the ways that I define innovation is this idea of creating a culture or climate where every single member of the organization knows that if they have an idea, someone senior enough to make a decision will listen, consider, and act appropriately.”**
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=f43a02d3cf&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
John joined Jimmy Failla on [Fox Across America](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=17dbdaa3ff&e=1b1fb1ad9f) last week to discuss his journey on the campaign trail, top running issues, and top issues plaguing America. **“Just like I did for 33 years serving our country in the United States Military and the United States Air Force, I'm doing this to support and defend the Constitution of the United States. We should be appalled at how far we have drifted from our foundational principles. We need people to bring us back in a revival of those principles -- and I'm doing it not because I want to hear my name as U.S. Senator but because we need to return back to a foundation that is incredible based on those founding principles that we have enjoyed for so long in this country.”**
[](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=b084ab7b02&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
General Teichert joined [Cats & Cosby](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=6327ffe2c8&e=1b1fb1ad9f) once again to discuss the Houthi attack on U.S. shipping in the Red Sea. Teichert said of the situation: **“It’s embarrassing that we keep allowing the Houthis, backed by Iran, to attack a variety of interests in the shipping canal that supplies about 12% of global commerce that travels through the Red Sea – and all we're doing is playing defense. We are not doing anything to take the fight to the Houthis, who are lobbing missiles, 100 or so in the last five weeks, and we’re doing nothing to demonstrate our will or capability against Iran. And again, they are having their will and their way with us, and all we are doing is playing a little bit of defense.”**
|
---
**Teichert on the Trail**
John had a busy week on the campaign trail! He enjoyed spending time with friends, family, and voters as he continued to share his message of leadership, not politics; here are some of the places he’s been!
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=7a3a4cc2a5&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=4e42ff1216&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=8658b38207&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
| [](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=81cb14841c&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
---
|
---
**Thoughts by Teichert**
On Wednesday January 3rd, General Teichert began the one-year countdown until he can finally represent Marylanders and bring leadership to Washington! Here is his message to the voters of Maryland with one year to election day. Watch the full video [here.](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=b48edc16d0&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
On Sunday, December 31st, John Teichert shared his plans to bring productive and sufficient leadership, not politics, to Marylanders and to Americans across the country in 2024. Watch his full message [here. ](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=9bca38614c&e=1b1fb1ad9f)
|
---
| [DONATE](https://teichertformaryland.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1ec0c6fa331e836475672e631&id=2eaa68a220&e=1b1fb1ad9f)

body:
This is going to be a long email about our January 6th trauma. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76719733/448260504/1441636268?refcode=em-1.08.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzYwMjY4MC02MGFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=We6yb6Gb0z_hvgj9RbIyuBsnhglwp7tAKiTDFkKbTso=)

This is going to be a long email about our January 6th trauma.

**[If you’re not ready to talk about it or don’t have time to read the whole email, I understand. But if you could still chip in a split donation between my campaign and the Democratic Association of Secretaries of State (DASS PAC) to help me jumpstart this race, I’d appreciate it >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76719735/448260505/1441636268?refcode=em-1.08.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzYwMjY4MC02MGFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=We6yb6Gb0z_hvgj9RbIyuBsnhglwp7tAKiTDFkKbTso=)**

If you’re still reading this, I’m assuming you’re ready. Let’s talk about our trauma. _You and me._

Ask yourself, what has our nation been arguing about for the last 3 years? What conversation has been dominating the media, the government, occupying our courts, and our daily conversations? And even separating friends and families?

**January 6, 2021.**

The ripples from that day still threaten our democracy. The lives of election workers – the backbone of our electoral systems – are being threatened online via hundreds of messages on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram by those who would disrupt our elections:

**_“Watch your back.” “I know where you sleep.” “Be afraid.”_**

Because I speak out about these challenges to our democracy, I get the same threatening messages. “We know where you live.”

_Yet MAGA representatives in Congress continue to claim our elections are being rigged._

The only difference between your January 6th trauma and mine is where we were when we experienced it.

I was at the Capitol immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, fear, blood, death, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, bigotry, and heroism.

Capitol and Washington Police officers fought for our lives, the lives of fellow police officers, and the nation's elected leaders – it didn’t matter if they were a Republican, Democrat or an Independent. They were the men and women we sent to Washington to govern our nation.

**It was our duty to protect them. And our democracy.**

While Donald Trump, then our nation’s Commander in Chief, did nothing to help us for three hours after inciting the violence himself – we were beaten bloody. And some of us died.

Even though my experience looks different from yours, _I am first an American citizen. A girl dad. A football lover. A voter. This is my country – _our country.__

That day was a stain on our nation. And we need to fight like hell to make sure we NEVER repeat a day like that. I’ll continue to use my voice to protect this country. I’ll stand up to the lies, hate, and bigotry. I will always stand my ground to make sure democracy exists.

**[So I’m asking you to stand with me. We will get through this trauma – we will get through this nightmare – but only if we stand together. Can I count on you to contribute a split donation between DASS PAC and my campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76719736/448260507/1441636268?refcode=em-1.08.24-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzYwMjY4MC02MGFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=We6yb6Gb0z_hvgj9RbIyuBsnhglwp7tAKiTDFkKbTso=)**
__If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76719738/448260508/1441636268?refcode=em-1.08.24-all-b&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzYwMjY4MC02MGFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=We6yb6Gb0z_hvgj9RbIyuBsnhglwp7tAKiTDFkKbTso=)**

Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. _Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters._ Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76719747/448260518/-664199346?refcode=em-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzYwMjY4MC02MGFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=We6yb6Gb0z_hvgj9RbIyuBsnhglwp7tAKiTDFkKbTso=)

I recently released some of the 2023 wins for OH-11 that we're most proud of, including helping constituents receive their benefits, bringing federal funds to our communities, and implementing landmark legislation.

body:
National Republicans just launched their first attack against Kristen, and it is... comically outlandish.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76720152/448261722/1433120897?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTU3MjFjMy02MGFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUZkgCWAnQmc_rmFUGSGbkJlEAVRzbCJaQPtQq55Dv8=) Hi there, it’s Shane, Kristen McDonald Rivet's campaign manager. You’ve gotta see this:

**[National Republicans just launched their first attack against Kristen, and it is... comically outlandish. I’ll explain more in a moment, but if you can donate now to help us fight back, it would make a huge difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76720163/448261730/1433120897?refcode=email_010824_attack&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTU3MjFjMy02MGFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MUZkgCWAnQmc_rmFUGSGbkJlEAVRzbCJaQPtQq55Dv8=)**

The National GOP called Kristen “extreme” and “slimy,” citing – and I really can’t make this up – her advocacy with Head Start for kids and early childhood education.

I don’t know about you, but I think we need _more_ people in DC who will stand up for vulnerable kids, not less! There’s only one slimy candidate in this race: the Trust Fund Californian who wants a complete abortion ban... and that’s not Kristen!

The GOP’s attack is baseless and outlandish, but their tactics are, sadly, to be expected. This race will determine whether we take back the House, and they see our coalition’s early momentum. We can expect them to twist reality and make up lies to try to beat Kristen.

**Look, this is just the beginning.** We need to be prepared for whatever else the GOP throws our way, no matter how ridiculous. And we can’t let them drown out Kristen’s message of restoring the Michigan Dream.

**[This is a call to action for all of us who believe in a better Michigan – and in improving early childhood education. We need to raise $5,000 by tonight to prepare to counter the National Republicans’ attacks and keep our campaign charging full speed ahead. clean_body: National Republicans just launched their first attack against Kristen, and it is... comically outlandish. = Hi there, it’s Shane, Kristen McDonald Rivet's campaign manager. You’ve gotta see this: = The National GOP called Kristen “extreme” and “slimy,” citing – and I really can’t make this up – her advocacy with Head Start for kids and early childhood education. I don’t know about you, but I think we need more people in DC who will stand up for vulnerable kids, not less! There’s only one slimy candidate in this race: the Trust Fund Californian who wants a complete abortion ban... and that’s not Kristen! The GOP’s attack is baseless and outlandish, but their tactics are, sadly, to be expected. This race will determine whether we take back the House, and they see our coalition’s early momentum. We can expect them to twist reality and make up lies to try to beat Kristen. Look, this is just the beginning. We need to be prepared for whatever else the GOP throws our way, no matter how ridiculous. Friend, it's Speaker Johnson.

I'm reaching out to you about your 2024 House Republican Membership.

**_Look, I 'll be blunt: I need you on my team. _**

So I'm reaching out to you today to personally ask you to activate your membership for 2024.

**[Please activate your membership today and join the team working to expand our conservative Majority in 2024.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/Mpfaz7yPdyqP15qfXvJJcw~~/AARclAA~~~ "Please activate your membership today and join the team working to expand our conservative Majority in 2024. ")**

**The Democrats are going ALL OUT this year. That means we need all hands on deck. **

Activating your membership might not feel like a huge step towards growing our Majority and beating the Radical Left Democrats, but let me assure you, **it makes a HUGE impact.** Let me tell you why.

**By activating your membership today, you will be:**
* Supporting conservatives across the country as they go on offense and bring the fight to the Radical Democrats.
* Boosting our efforts to hold Joe Biden and the Radical Left accountable for their corruption and failures.
* An essential part of defending our conservative Majority and fighting for conservative values.

Thank you and God bless,

Speaker Mike Johnson

Help us ramp up our fight for the next two months.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76720479/448262809/-1345170518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWYyMjIyYy02MWFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EByg2HVdvnefw1jwdJlDn344P3y_7jyu9BshgtFy1yo=&emci=96439925-61ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=f9f2222c-61ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=18818697)
Peter, it’s official — our primary is in less than two months.
In crunch times like these, you can see the true heart of a campaign — and for us that’s to make sure you have a representative that has taken the time to understand the issues of the community that raised her so she can fight tooth and nail for you in Congress.
In these next two months, we could be kissing up to corporations to help fund the rest of this race — but instead we will be getting out to meet and hear out as many people in TX-15 as possible.
That’s because we want this campaign to be rooted in the people Michelle will represent, not those who want to buy influence in Washington. That is our priority and Michelle’s commitment to all people in South Texas.
**[To keep our campaign people-powered, we are counting on supporters, like you Peter, to give what they can. Whether that's $300, $20 or just $3, every dollar makes a difference in a race like this. So, can we count on you to make a donation today? Help us ramp up our fight in these next two months on the ground to put Michelle in Congress to fight for the people of TX-15!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76720480/448262810/211715144?refcode=em20240108&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDUzMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWYyMjIyYy02MWFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EByg2HVdvnefw1jwdJlDn344P3y_7jyu9BshgtFy1yo=)**

clean_body: Help us ramp up our fight for the next two months. Peter, it’s official — our primary is in less than two months. In crunch times like these, you can see the true heart of a campaign — and for us that’s to make sure you have a representative that has taken the time to understand the issues of the community that raised her so she can fight tooth and nail for you in Congress. In these next two months, we could be kissing up to corporations to help fund the rest of this race — but instead we will be getting out to meet and hear out as many people in TX-15 as possible. That’s because we want this campaign to be rooted in the people Michelle will represent, not those who want to buy influence in Washington. That is our priority and Michelle’s commitment to all people in South Texas. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll instantly process your contribution to Michelle Vallejo: = = = = = = ¡Vamos Por Quince! Team Vallejo Paid for by Michelle Vallejo for Congress Michelle Vallejo for Congress PO Box 1265 Mission, TX 78573 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

**_Begin forwarded message:_**

Peter,

Happy New Year!

As we dive into 2024, **we must recognize just how much is on the line this year.** Not only do we have a major presidential election — with some primaries as early as January 23! — but we have so many other crucial federal, state, and local races as well.

There are countless issues we could focus on — from gerrymandered congressional maps that strip away Black voting power to anti-LGBTQ+ policies — 2024 could be the most consequential election for Black voters of the _century._

[So we want to hear from YOU, Peter: Going into 2024, what’s _your_ biggest priority?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmx1G84qBFAg2F1xj4Dg9I0eSGSuXn82t07kA2t1X22nsRkffow4Skm_vVrkSQuki4J5zh3UyKosDQewva4l-v_q0yQE-zJWZP04cFGd1VuWgI7cX8gK54aKxFaxWxSP9LqpAi3t79v6PuGB8yYkJ-rhdpIwfp2LHM9i0mevB4wx8m9SXIhK0mo52xD1BNfIdRo-SDYP3Lwmd-XsaCV37xJbyDwrkivDZYUDlgxihbvx3hMS95Co7lgp2t9JYPu_agjaYgxpaNgqQRCy75kx8mg5RaqcRDtdMuddtnR5MEaYVSthmOjlfPujXs4toQVVSSLrJVWd_cwuo9unOI5rwKLabu66cpfMdrvdcdAwXLpHrP_9ne_4-5OeSfSVvLCeoE/42t/NBJcWUZLQIuIP1siQrb_4w/h3/8WEppRT9i5IPsDe4xyXukEhBuBvyooy_OJzbm7OC5tM)

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friend,
On the campaign trail, I still hear how people are affected by the lack of broadband and its impact on their lives.
I need your help getting to Congress [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob] to fight for rural America. My opponent is voting against critical legislation that helps everyday, hardworking people. A contribution from you today — no matter the amount — will help us replace radical GOP extremists and flip the House in 2024.
MAKE A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
Half of US households pay between $60 and $90 monthly for internet service, an issue for low-income households. Forty-two million Americans lack broadband access due to unaffordability, lack of financial assistance awareness, or unavailability.
Less than one-third of eligible individuals are aware of and enrolled in government financial assistance programs. The FCC is investing billions into improving access and affordability.
My opponent voted against an FCC program that provides broadband assistance for rural Northern Michigan and the UP.
Despite Rep. Bergman's opposition, many rural residents are now eligible for a discount of up to $30/month toward internet service, $75/month on tribal lands, $100 to toward the purchase of a laptop.
Learn more at drbob.me/bb [http://drbob.me/bb?fbclid=IwAR3PM1L3C9zx83dQ1Z0KJEj0nXJDwGV6tMf0hwyD3SgQSOEiqNytlCj_0VI] .
https://www.votedrbob.com/post/broadband-is-vital-to-all-americans-especially-in-rural-america [https://www.votedrbob.com/post/broadband-is-vital-to-all-americans-especially-in-rural-america]
Jack Bergman voted against the largest broadband affordability program we've ever had in this country. Help me replace him.
Rural areas, including tribal lands, face challenges with the affordability and availability of broadband infrastructure, particularly with the "last mile" connection to households.
There is growing concern that Congress may reduce funding for broadband along with cuts to essential programs like nutritional assistance, childcare, and healthcare.
Bergman has voted against rural broadband more than once and often refers to federal social investments as "worthless government spending."
Friend, with your help, we will flip the House, and as MI01's next Representative I won't stop fighting for connectivity in our rural communities and throughout the US.
Thank you for your consideration,
Regards,
-Dr. Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan, Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
MAKE A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
FRIENDS OF DR. BOB
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States
PAID FOR BY THE FRIENDS OF DR. BOB LORINSER

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Ro Khanna urges Biden and Congress to back a ceasefire
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Justice Democrats incumbent Rep. Ro Khanna of California is amplifying the
ceasefire movement and urging President Biden and his fellow members of
Congress to back a permanent ceasefire in Gaza.

As the estimated Palestinian death toll surpasses 23,000 people, with
injuries nearing 60,000 people, the humanitarian crisis in Gaza grows
worse each and every day that goes by, as millions of people (many of whom
are children) are subjected to bombs, bullets, starvation, and the spread
of disease.

As Ro rightly pointed out in an interview with Common Dreams last week,
"Every international humanitarian organization is begging the United
States for the war to stop... It is a matter of conscience."

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240108.TgNfY3&refcode=em20240108-32728&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=32728%2E1203867%2E4g2Bts ]Common Dreams article, ‘A Matter of Conscience’: Khan Urges Biden,
Congress to Back Gaza Cease-Fire

If President Biden and Congress don’t change course, Ro warns, "this is
going to be a dividing issue for the Democratic Party for the future, like
the Iraq War was... And I think the window is rapidly closing to be on the
right side of history."

Ro is right. We need more leaders in Congress and the Biden Administration
to stop supporting and funding a genocide against innocent Palestinians.
While our ceasefire movement grows, pro-war groups like AIPAC are
attacking our progressive incumbents with $100 million to unseat them in
the 2024 Democratic primaries.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240108.TgNfY3&refcode=em20240108-32728&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32728%2E1203867%2E4g2Bts ]Stand with Justice Democrats today as we keep up the fight to re-elect
pro-peace Democrats leading the way on demanding a ceasefire: pitch in
$3 or whatever you can afford to fuel our critical work
this year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240108.TgNfY3&refcode=em20240108-32728&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=32728%2E1203867%2E4g2Bts ]Contribute $3

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=32728%2E1203867%2E4g2Bts ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=32728%2E1203867%2E4g2Bts ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240108-32728-footer&t=1024&refcode2=32728_1203867_4g2Bts&akid=32728%2E1203867%2E4g2Bts

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=32728%2E1203867%2E4g2Bts

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com
