name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Personal Letter for You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
This message is an opportunity to introduce myself.
z
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675c714503e0460e89a946ddaf44eda4&_e=G8rOC6vxlrnJGwVC1bgH379x7swvzk2QDNI3m66TxBZovRtYEHb0axGpfMF1ZlzdgvEYwFRgH9lrtpceoGiRI2SP8Wo97kFJdcZHU18BtzaC5SWJ17qEPgUVY3cqqzh64ojjy5W-RObbwTRdII1fMc5jLubrYOtYKk6D8MqLll3NVU5m1eRRvzfRaB0bjsN7SDjtNmoLFxTH85FO2YbNnhOInyyx4KCaVVNhPEw13TAD_tAhdUC5O0HK_OLY1hqIRvbRo6ihi7tc6DlRHXm0iUEIKx7fIYAG9xTDbVnePGMl3CYoGdQg6q8JID_ZjOOigJVws1W_9UosH5YWPBo3qlB2JAqSlI3gs-3G2sHd1MXmVS2L-NFqKYM9W0DHtKxKTkApfhg9-tUUPyGH7FpOtQ0f4u8v6guJJDyUMZVKEN8VBdOWwAWUTm1w7J08Y93q)
---
**_" Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson."_** When I heard that aloud for the first time it was truly a surreal experience. Even now, as I write it down I'm both humbled and thrilled. I am honored beyond imagination and completely understand how great of a responsibility it is to lead the House of Representatives on behalf of patriotic Americans like you. This message is an opportunity to introduce myself, and I'm truly grateful that you're reading this right now - but before I tell you my story, I have a request: **_Firstly, would you pray for me?_** I've always believed in the power of prayer. That's why I'm asking that you pray on my behalf that God would guide my hand and my gavel through my tenure as Speaker of the House. **_Secondly,[would you join Team Johnson?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675c714503e0460e89a946ddaf44eda4&_e=G8rOC6vxlrnJGwVC1bgH379x7swvzk2QDNI3m66TxBZovRtYEHb0axGpfMF1ZlzdgvEYwFRgH9lrtpceoGiRI2SP8Wo97kFJdcZHU18BtzaC5SWJ17qEPgUVY3cqqzh64ojjy5W-RObbwTRdII1fMc5jLubrYOtYKk6D8MqLll3NVU5m1eRRvzfRaB0bjsN7SDjtNmoLFxTH85FO2YbNnhOInyyx4KCaVVNhPEw13TAD_tAhdUC5O0HK_OLY1hqIRvbRo6ihi7tc6DlRHXm0iUEIKx7fIYAG9xTDbVnePGNNdI7Q6B0ktM1icvF3mBzjWcHgqxfv446Ef9DD8pk0q_9qMyQ-Z_s0Lpvv6yZuk__bSg5rkwHr1UD18t8nAPsgP6f2VyZKCt3e92a3hDhrGDWP9QaTZeDVXeyDzKp0FwC7oAI4cnhKsgMPaf6o3IqY) [](Friend)_**The House Republican Majority will soon be down to just a razor-thin margin and America is at a true crossroads. Will we submit and allow Democrats to take back the House in 2024, or will we fight back and expand our majority? **[To stand strong and fight back, we truly need your support.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675c714503e0460e89a946ddaf44eda4&_e=G8rOC6vxlrnJGwVC1bgH379x7swvzk2QDNI3m66TxBZovRtYEHb0axGpfMF1ZlzdgvEYwFRgH9lrtpceoGiRI2SP8Wo97kFJdcZHU18BtzaC5SWJ17qEPgUVY3cqqzh64ojjy5W-RObbwTRdII1fMc5jLubrYOtYKk6D8MqLll3NVU5m1eRRvzfRaB0bjsN7SDjtNmoLFxTH85FO2YbNnhOInyyx4KCaVVNhPEw13TAD_tAhdUC5O0HK_OLY1hqIRvbRo6ihi7tc6DlRHXm0iUEIKx7fIYAG9xTDbVnePGORbW1lBgucI9aTrvMLJfotnbkGClF6l3b-1ZH88R8qCoX9Xuyz88wNAbOTrdmWwtwenk5fUFCf8ji97mj1l_JAh-NLuI-jrFkzPEYvlS56N_Pe8SNUcgrHTuvwbRCbGtQcYuPpzNAGqowwQYkjg54Q)** **[Even $1 could be the difference between Republican and Democrat Control.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675c714503e0460e89a946ddaf44eda4&_e=G8rOC6vxlrnJGwVC1bgH379x7swvzk2QDNI3m66TxBZovRtYEHb0axGpfMF1ZlzdgvEYwFRgH9lrtpceoGiRI2SP8Wo97kFJdcZHU18BtzaC5SWJ17qEPgUVY3cqqzh64ojjy5W-RObbwTRdII1fMc5jLubrYOtYKk6D8MqLll3NVU5m1eRRvzfRaB0bjsN7SDjtNmoLFxTH85FO2YbNnhOInyyx4KCaVVNhPEw13TAD_tAhdUC5O0HK_OLY1hqIRvbRo6ihi7tc6DlRHXm0iUEIKx7fIYAG9xTDbVnePGNUPP963BhlHv0RJ9eHNpyIvBbbaVsvT4cqUsj2z0yJ_8ECpfGGEeTjOMLo5GtIDBgk6r5co_9GMFSD5kwhUuBbq1THiz-NijQy9TaXTdpfAWY5Zz3CrX1Yix_B19t-p5aDdPtqhntCcIQkde9CX7GO)** Growing up, my dad was a fireman. To me, he was Superman, and I wanted to be just like him. For the longest time I was set on serving my community as a firefighter -- but after my father was severely injured while on the job, he discouraged me from following in his footsteps. So I turned to my other passion of service: The Law. I was the first member of my family to earn a Bachelor's degree. And just a few years later, I graduated from law school. I would go on to specialize in Constitutional Law and dedicate my career to defending religious liberty. I also founded a non-profit law firm to defend Christians against religious persecution. In 2016 I ran to become a member of the House of Representatives and WON. Since then, I've spent every day working to defend freedom for generations to come. I've spent the last 20 years on the front lines of the fight to defend our constitution, our country, and our faith. As long as there is breath in my lungs, I won't stop fighting. Friend, I know you might have heard of me for the first time ever on the news just a few months ago. That's why I wanted you to hear my story from me, directly, with no media talking heads between us. **[Now that you know a little more about me and what I stand for, I hope that you'll join Team Johnson.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675c714503e0460e89a946ddaf44eda4&_e=G8rOC6vxlrnJGwVC1bgH379x7swvzk2QDNI3m66TxBZovRtYEHb0axGpfMF1ZlzdgvEYwFRgH9lrtpceoGiRI2SP8Wo97kFJdcZHU18BtzaC5SWJ17qEPgUVY3cqqzh64ojjy5W-RObbwTRdII1fMc5jLubrYOtYKk6D8MqLll3NVU5m1eRRvzfRaB0bjsN7SDjtNmoLFxTH85FO2YbNnhOInyyx4KCaVVNhPEw13TAD_tAhdUC5O0HK_OLY1hqIRvbRo6ihi7tc6DlRHXm0iUEIKx7fIYAG9xTDbVnePGOkn-YRpVzgTVGkXjMzsYdfBMo0EQc5LQ3JCjnc_yZb5yecn0benwNzsKnn_q3kuRZlSQYEBei6OOEoSWCt0R4C5oTinj0P9hff9I5b_UhCRswlh4uO_slLzeJ3lajB3VbVyYF64Oej_KY0jShTqNMj)**
---
[**JOIN TEAM JOHNSON TODAY**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675c714503e0460e89a946ddaf44eda4&_e=G8rOC6vxlrnJGwVC1bgH379x7swvzk2QDNI3m66TxBZovRtYEHb0axGpfMF1ZlzdgvEYwFRgH9lrtpceoGiRI2SP8Wo97kFJdcZHU18BtzaC5SWJ17qEPgUVY3cqqzh64ojjy5W-RObbwTRdII1fMc5jLubrYOtYKk6D8MqLll3NVU5m1eRRvzfRaB0bjsN7SDjtNmoLFxTH85FO2YbNnhOInyyx4KCaVVNhPEw13TAD_tAhdUC5O0HK_OLY1hqIRvbRo6ihi7tc6DlRHXm0iUEIKx7fIYAG9xTDbVnePGMfYjKerfix0omiecBiLtL6NFGDhQJWrvEj91C0CY2kD-162TTmdczCa3fm9U87QsJeQAvOxiK29Iz2y2ON9gp2dloeTO4OZTm43twpPcRwPKXb9yX_n4rR-vsTayDyHgPDQyvOhq3pob0CgH_tqp-u)
---
Thank you so much for your time and support, Friend. Sincerely,
---
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=675c714503e0460e89a946ddaf44eda4&_e=G8rOC6vxlrnJGwVC1bgH379x7swvzk2QDNI3m66TxBZovRtYEHb0axGpfMF1ZlzdgvEYwFRgH9lrtpceoGiRI2SP8Wo97kFJdcZHU18BtzaC5SWJ17qEPgUVY3cqqzh64ojjy5W-RObbwTRdII1fMc5jLubrYOtYKk6D8MqLll3NVU5m1eRRvzfRaB0bjsN7SDjtNmoLFxTH85FO2YbNnhOInyyx4KCaVVNhPEw13TAD_tAhdUC5O0HK_OLY1hqIRvbRo6ihi7tc6DlRHXm0iUEIKx7fIYAG9xTDbVnePGMFCuWfaztTOC0gcUfsyOqZaFvm2TqVK4YXPZevb5YpuSoJdAv2QS3_hlk1d1f57KWSoQWQ_pPR103zy4phlKQR4ifFQdMkuTwq4r2VQZeW8mJN2-0Sw9osvDzOXT_XKhWapgdPK6o4UFP-euZ2Uezi)
---
Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson P.S. I love this country and I'm deeply grateful for the opportunity to serve. But Team Johnson can't save America from the radical left and turn things around without the help of patriots like you. clean_body: This message is an opportunity to introduce myself. z | | | " Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson." When I heard that aloud for the first time it was truly a surreal experience. Even now, as I write it down I'm both humbled and thrilled. I am honored beyond imagination and completely understand how great of a responsibility it is to lead the House of Representatives on behalf of patriotic Americans like you. This message is an opportunity to introduce myself, and I'm truly grateful that you're reading this right now - but before I tell you my story, I have a request: Firstly, would you pray for me? I've always believed in the power of prayer. That's why I'm asking that you pray on my behalf that God would guide my hand and my gavel through my tenure as Speaker of the House. Secondly, FriendThe House Republican Majority will soon be down to just a razor-thin margin and America is at a true crossroads. Will we submit and allow Democrats to take back the House in 2024, or will we fight back and expand our majority? Growing up, my dad was a fireman. To me, he was Superman, and I wanted to be just like him. For the longest time I was set on serving my community as a firefighter -- but after my father was severely injured while on the job, he discouraged me from following in his footsteps. So I turned to my other passion of service: The Law. I was the first member of my family to earn a Bachelor's degree. And just a few years later, I graduated from law school. I would go on to specialize in Constitutional Law and dedicate my career to defending religious liberty. I also founded a non-profit law firm to defend Christians against religious persecution. In 2016 I ran to become a member of the House of Representatives and WON. Since then, I've spent every day working to defend freedom for generations to come. I've spent the last 20 years on the front lines of the fight to defend our constitution, our country, and our faith. As long as there is breath in my lungs, I won't stop fighting. Friend, I know you might have heard of me for the first time ever on the news just a few months ago. That's why I wanted you to hear my story from me, directly, with no media talking heads between us. Thank you so much for your time and support, Friend. Sincerely, Speaker of the House, Mike Johnson P.S. I love this country and I'm deeply grateful for the opportunity to serve. But Team Johnson can't save America from the radical left and turn things around without the help of patriots like you. That's why I hope and pray that we can count on your support. | | | Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana | Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Mark Mullet
subject: I want to know [quick survey]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Once again, our state Attorney General is proving he's great at suing corporations and taking credit — but is nowhere to be found when things go sideways.

In his latest blunder, Bob Ferguson and the Office of Attorney General have been mailing refund checks to dead people and millionaires. **Refund checks intended for Washingtonians living at the poverty line.**

Each check has Ferguson's name on the signature line.

Now, Ferguson is pointing the finger of blame at others. He says the fault is not his or that of the people working in his office.

It's simple.

**Bob Ferguson needs to step up and own this mistake.**

In my pizza restaurant business, I don't immediately start pointing fingers and assigning blame if a pizza gets delivered to the wrong address. Instead, I find out what happened.

**Running small businesses has taught me how to manage budgets and accept responsibility. The buck stops with me.**
_I want to hear from you on this. Here's what I want to know:_

[Should there be more oversight for state offices, in this instance, the Attorney General's office, when distributing refund checks?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76720827/448264286/1042459181?source=MM_EM_EN_90DO_240108_1_1&refcode2=c45bd798-62ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=Q1bRe19mFIogRVIAWtrgrCpLnkLwXE3cCMtRh262HbmccEgjYRxkJAifML+AknAn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDViZDc5OC02MmFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quRSSBpxdxLiSP_FfsB516A2w51Fgh_wBSPxrFgwrUE=&emci=32cec6e7-17ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=c45bd798-62ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=45626167) | | ****[YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76720828/448264287/1042459181?source=MM_EM_EN_90DO_240108_1_1&refcode2=c45bd798-62ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&contactdata=Q1bRe19mFIogRVIAWtrgrCpLnkLwXE3cCMtRh262HbmccEgjYRxkJAifML+AknAn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDViZDc5OC02MmFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=quRSSBpxdxLiSP_FfsB516A2w51Fgh_wBSPxrFgwrUE=&emci=32cec6e7-17ac-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=c45bd798-62ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=45626167)****

name: Powered By People
subject: Texas children are suffering
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Texas children are suffering under the GOP’s failed leadership — and we
need your help to fight back.

* In a state where 1 in 5 children don’t have enough to eat, Texas
Republicans just turned down $150 million a year in federal food
assistance for hungry children.

* As U.S. House Republicans work to slash spending on postpartum care
and infant nutrition, nearly a quarter million Texas moms and babies
may soon lose benefits.

* Due to “procedural errors” within Texas’ overburdened state health
agency, hundreds of thousands of children have erroneously lost
Medicaid coverage.

* As the Texas GOP attacks reproductive health care and forces women to
carry nonviable pregnancies to term, infant deaths have spiked by over
10% in our state.

Our children deserve better.

the GOP leaders who are failing our kids?

body:

clean_body: Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a wrongful death lawsuit against the U.S. Government on behalf of the family of Ashli Babbitt, the U.S. Air Force veteran who was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd on January 6, 2021. | | | | | | Because no one is above the law! | Jan 7, 2024 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | | Judicial Watch announced recently that it filed a wrongful death lawsuit against the U.S. Government on behalf of the family of Ashli Babbitt, the U.S. Air Force veteran who was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd on January 6, 2021. ---|--- | | | | | “Judicial Watch and I have been censored again and again by government and Big Tech,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. “That we had to file a federal lawsuit to get basic information about this targeting is another sure sign that CISA has been up to no good.” ---|--- | | | | | As a result of the Biden administration’s reckless open border policies the federal agency charged with enforcing immigration laws inside the United States is getting slammed and discloses in its latest annual report that enforcement arrests nearly doubled in a year in which thousands of criminals were apprehended including dozens of known or suspected terrorists. In fiscal year 2023, which ended in September, Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) arrested 170,590 illegal immigrants inside the country, almost half of them with criminal records. ---|--- | | | | | Jewish leaders were reportedly told that the festival board was not comfortable allowing the lighting at the festival. Shirley Vermillion, the festival’s founder, reportedly said the menorah lighting “seemed very inappropriate” given current events in Israel and Gaza. ---|--- | | | Judicial Watch Judicial Watch rreceived five pages of records from the National Archives and Records Administration that show then-Vice President Joe Biden and his son Hunter received a May 26, 2016, email detailing a scheduled “8:45 am prep for a 9 am phone call with Pres Poroshenko,” who was the president of Ukraine. Judicial Watch "Evidence shows Garland Justice Department obstructed an IRS criminal investigation implicating Joe Biden. And on top of this obstruction, Garland’s Justice Department is violating federal FOIA law to cover up this serious scandal,” said Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. Jonathan Turley The long-awaited tort action from the family of Ashli Babbitt has now been filed in Southern California. Babbitt was shot and killed on Jan. 6th and her family is seeking $30 million in a wrongful death action. Equally important, the lawsuit could force additional answers to why Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd shot and killed the unarmed protester as she attempted to climb through a window near the House Chamber. | CLIPS | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | | | | | ---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2024, All Rights Reserved |

Big news: National Democrats have their eyes set on Michigan, particularly West Michigan, as a pivotal battleground for securing the White House and regaining control of the House. However, on the flip side, National Republican groups are equally aware of the importance of West Michigan in their pursuit of victory. They are fervently targeting Hillary and her accomplishments. To ensure a decisive win in November, the impetus needs to start right here in Hillary’s district. body:
| | | Fellow American,

We might not know each other personally, but you probably know someone with a story like mine - or maybe my story looks like yours. My parents were refugees who escaped from Communist Cuba to America in search of freedom. We didn’t have a lot growing up, but my parents worked incredibly hard and instilled in me the values of faith, gift, and dedication to the country that gave us everything. **Now, I’m carrying on my parents legacy by making sure America NEVER goes the way of Communist Cuba and fighting socialism.** I’m a proud Latina woman, a daughter of refugees, and an unapologetic conservative. It goes against everything the Democrats’ woke narrative says. And that means they’re determined to take me down. **[I’m fighting like hell to protect the American Dream from socialism, and I need your help. Will you join our team today?](http://links.electsalazar.com/u/click?_t=efb87ae1dcc34914b1524d5a4e324c41&_m=e2bf999e743d44e698a5630fea58e57f&_e=BnJ49jQz8O5RRCJxIQ0nmu7WYnIu9V9o9DIG9Wa2dkLt8__4CZOS0uSDCwY8Pv1gzOB1QMEdBvcwFLNQGU4o-jwP7J76i48nqJnDpmyXcrzQ5T0fO8-G5fI5nyJTBcEJ0pnU-qqzXIIXKsahsToyltsPI7yESQEo5DpYguociXqKEW3dL97AFkmzaZeXa23Otwf2APpoJeSoucmH_oZLXxIVHTlHplqUaDPit7e-w_BhcBQfefF6wxsmmovCXNOGXbd8caf8pQL1mXVR69szDkkWovuB71xLmVSbOYbPaLJEJ0HMnzmf7w0aDpYUEFpdBvxnagMDeytNI-WQ2DCOdcOjuLfE_oJUTPDbVCnYF1U%3D)**

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Local news can save democracy
body:
MAGA Republicans are seizing on voters’ frustrations by pushing a dangerous narrative that democracy itself is broken.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76721414/448265704/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVmN2M5YWQtNjRhZS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FyjwZZea-l93_GL-4yIg7bYFEzBa8p75e-YYzYa4Nao=&emci=056162ea-4eae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=6ef7c9ad-64ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Hyper partisanship. Dysfunction. Right-wing politicians are more interested in destroying democracy than they are in making it work.
It’s no wonder that so many are losing faith in our political system.
**As faith in democracy plummets, so too has our trust in journalism and the news media. A huge reason for that is the total decimation of local news.**
Whether it’s TV, newspapers, or radio, local newsrooms have been closing for years. In their place, right-wing propaganda is filling the void with the same kind of untethered-to-reality conspiracy theories that led to January 6th.
**The good news is there’s hope. With your help, Courier Newsroom can strengthen our democracy by building the largest, left-leaning local news network in the country.**
[**Right now, Courier Newsroom's network in 10 battleground states is working to provide factual, pro-democracy journalism to communities who are vulnerable to right-wing lies and conspiracy theories. Will you pitch in $5 today to help support our mission?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76721416/448265706/-2091520129?refcode=em20240108&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVmN2M5YWQtNjRhZS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FyjwZZea-l93_GL-4yIg7bYFEzBa8p75e-YYzYa4Nao=)
While the right-wing media lies, the mainstream media isn’t doing much better.
Preoccupied with ratings, profits, and the latest click-bait scandal of the day, national news organizations mostly ignore the local issues that directly impact our lives and communities.
Our research shows that there's a better way.
Through tests and experiments, we've found that when people have access to trustworthy local news about issues that impact them, they are more likely to participate in our democracy.
**And that change can have a real impact that defies conventional wisdom and partisan politics.**
**Just look at the fight for abortion access in a post-Roe world.** Even in deeply red states, voters are turning out to support reproductive freedom, especially when provided with trustworthy information and the opportunity to make their voices heard.
**Right now, in battleground states like Arizona, Michigan, Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, and North Carolina, we’re working to ensure voters have the information they need to make informed decisions this November — but we need your help to keep.**
[**If you can, please pitch in $5 today to support our mission. All of our stories are free to read, with no paywalls or subscription fees, which means we're counting on you to keep providing high-quality reporting in all 10 of our newsrooms.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76721418/448265708/-2091520129?refcode=em20240108&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVmN2M5YWQtNjRhZS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FyjwZZea-l93_GL-4yIg7bYFEzBa8p75e-YYzYa4Nao=)
Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76721419/448265709/-544721131?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em20240108&refcode2=6ef7c9ad-64ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVmN2M5YWQtNjRhZS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FyjwZZea-l93_GL-4yIg7bYFEzBa8p75e-YYzYa4Nao=) | [$15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76721421/448265711/-544721131?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=em20240108&refcode2=6ef7c9ad-64ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVmN2M5YWQtNjRhZS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FyjwZZea-l93_GL-4yIg7bYFEzBa8p75e-YYzYa4Nao=) | [$25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76721423/448265713/-544721131?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em20240108&refcode2=6ef7c9ad-64ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVmN2M5YWQtNjRhZS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FyjwZZea-l93_GL-4yIg7bYFEzBa8p75e-YYzYa4Nao=) | [$50](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76721425/448265715/-544721131?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em20240108&refcode2=6ef7c9ad-64ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVmN2M5YWQtNjRhZS1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=FyjwZZea-l93_GL-4yIg7bYFEzBa8p75e-YYzYa4Nao=)

clean_body: MAGA Republicans are seizing on voters’ frustrations by pushing a dangerous narrative that democracy itself is broken. Peter, Hyper partisanship. Dysfunction. Right-wing politicians are more interested in destroying democracy than they are in making it work. It’s no wonder that so many are losing faith in our political system. As faith in democracy plummets, so too has our trust in journalism and the news media. A huge reason for that is the total decimation of local news. Whether it’s TV, newspapers, or radio, local newsrooms have been closing for years. In their place, right-wing propaganda is filling the void with the same kind of untethered-to-reality conspiracy theories that led to January 6th. The good news is there’s hope. With your help, Courier Newsroom can strengthen our democracy by building the largest, left-leaning local news network in the country. = While the right-wing media lies, the mainstream media isn’t doing much better. Preoccupied with ratings, profits, and the latest click-bait scandal of the day, national news organizations mostly ignore the local issues that directly impact our lives and communities. Our research shows that there's a better way. Through tests and experiments, we've found that when people have access to trustworthy local news about issues that impact them, they are more likely to participate in our democracy. And that change can have a real impact that defies conventional wisdom and partisan politics. Just look at the fight for abortion access in a post-Roe world. Even in deeply red states, voters are turning out to support reproductive freedom, especially when provided with trustworthy information and the opportunity to make their voices heard. Right now, in battleground states like Arizona, Michigan, Wisconsin, Pennsylvania, and North Carolina, we’re working to ensure voters have the information they need to make informed decisions this November — but we need your help to keep. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you, Courier Newsroom Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

_**It’s an all-out race against the clock now, Fellow American,**_

I’m about to head into my next town hall and wanted to get you this message. In **ONE WEEK** , we are going to shock the nation and shatter the expectations.

We’re doing things differently on this campaign. Many of my campaign's supporters are first-time caucusgoers, people who have not been traditionally polled. Our grassroots activation is higher, I’ve done more podcasts, and **by caucus night I will have had more than 390 events in Iowa alone** – more than any other presidential campaign in American history.

[**We are taking this campaign to the next level and using non-traditional methods to find non-traditional supporters.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=2d6bba00ce6641929c31b61dea744ae8&_e=QQD_xwm9QvThfV9mpBmhDXVri_BWAzIVs8-Bg9mQLjwNgvqtnoh8K4_nDqmnUIJc0b3dqepAX_4kDkvup8UH61mtnUi0YqsseSzwMt8hb0dcEjvVTM4JoJse5X-0rbCO5YZqZUwSuz28HYbUf2PqcX3tf00wVGy5Ljy6NHXlUVBS403AzEx7bPHZBSYibqFFe9S-s_Cv2I58QwFrFdQ0lHoTiJvn66tiRF4yHWitMFrrvJMd-cMmgm3cJnZTMijqEIHp755DVTo74pfdEhRsV8RwunXYducu_cR65mJHroWxYHsgpm2u4xmKzfMW9Z7fKdCsYGNnWpPq___C2XytJgRQfNkkezapHqngRKspZ_qJPpetcstV0U8HsixuPZNY)

I’m increasingly concerned this year that we are seeing assaults on our democracy, a system that has unilaterally that they will illegally keep Donald Trump out of this race. I’m the only candidate who is taking action and not just providing talking points into whichever way the political winds change.

[**It all comes down to this, Fellow American: voters in this country should be able to decide who their President is. That’s what the United States was founded on.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=2d6bba00ce6641929c31b61dea744ae8&_e=QQD_xwm9QvThfV9mpBmhDXVri_BWAzIVs8-Bg9mQLjwNgvqtnoh8K4_nDqmnUIJc0b3dqepAX_4kDkvup8UH61mtnUi0YqsseSzwMt8hb0dcEjvVTM4JoJse5X-0rbCO5YZqZUwSuz28HYbUf2PqcX3tf00wVGy5Ljy6NHXlUVBS403AzEx7bPHZBSYibqFFe9S-s_Cv2I58QwFrFdQ0lHoTiJvn66tiRF4yHWitMFrOrDNEi4caPEf1bSohbSRp7t1Yw8OnhetwFwj6FeXXt2Ulov_6L4rGtuSMf2v3OX04eMmKkcCdWHyRZ-75kTMH6YQg95rpOXNSGIuxIapDJXEaZEZ9uj0pjFZI3vmN5IjUa1Y_h39o9n3aPrLE9fpu)

This is our 1776 moment. We need to revive the ideals of the American Revolution. And it’s going to take a leader from the next generation to get us there. We are taking the anti-deep state America First agenda further than ever.

[**Before I take the stage for my next Iowa event, will you pitch in $7 or more to help finish these next 7 DAYS with your voice in this revolution?**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=2d6bba00ce6641929c31b61dea744ae8&_e=QQD_xwm9QvThfV9mpBmhDXVri_BWAzIVs8-Bg9mQLjwNgvqtnoh8K4_nDqmnUIJc0b3dqepAX_4kDkvup8UH61mtnUi0YqsseSzwMt8hb0dcEjvVTM4JoJse5X-0rbCO5YZqZUwSuz28HYbUf2PqcX3tf00wVGy5Ljy6NHXlUVBS403AzEx7bPHZBSYibqFFe9S-s_Cv2I58QwFrFdQ0lHoTiJvn66tiRF4yHWitMFpcfZdOSHc2LZyI4BU3OU3Y7W1AvquDbNxZGWE73uNflN0n9oLeB8TvRfdWEIbxUNyMQqmPxfHQy5vo6fpp-9CvXv8kJzbCQiLEG5slaPwuzFuPdiszQHey8CTW4QySe5Ij4tpa6JYs3EcExX3EADG2)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Why I ask these two questions to every nominee
body:
|
#
_Content warning: This message contains mentions of sexual assault._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76721431/448265725/296097457?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGY3YzlhZC02NGFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POwwEA1pK-CDLk1rKN4_btnpBBNHOiY7rH8riF2Rurc=) Peter, When countless people across the country sparked the #MeToo movement six years ago by courageously speaking up about sexual misconduct they faced from powerful men — celebrities, politicians, business executives, and superiors — I wanted to ensure that this movement would not get swept under the rug in Washington. **So I began asking two questions — on the record, under oath — to every nominee before the Judiciary Committee, as judicial nominees receive lifetime appointments with little opportunity for oversight or review:**
* _“Since you became a legal adult, have you ever made unwanted requests for sexual favors or committed any verbal or physical harassment or assault of a sexual nature?”_

* _“Have you ever faced discipline or entered into a settlement related to this kind of conduct?”_

At first, these questions caught many by surprise. Onlookers in the audience would shift uncomfortably in their seats. These issues were not commonly spoken about in Washington — and they were _certainly_ not directed at accomplished judges seeking lifetime appointments. This practice drew intense attention when, days after I asked these questions to Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh during his confirmation hearing, he was credibly accused by multiple women of sexual misconduct. That is when the importance of asking these questions, even if they are uncomfortable, quickly became evident. [**Peter, that’s why I’m personally asking if you will chip in any amount to power my work today. clean_body: | Content warning: This message contains mentions of sexual assault. = Peter, When countless people across the country sparked the #MeToo movement six years ago by courageously speaking up about sexual misconduct they faced from powerful men — celebrities, politicians, business executives, and superiors — I wanted to ensure that this movement would not get swept under the rug in Washington. So I began asking two questions — on the record, under oath — to every nominee before the Judiciary Committee, as judicial nominees receive lifetime appointments with little opportunity for oversight or review: “Since you became a legal adult, have you ever made unwanted requests for sexual favors or committed any verbal or physical harassment or assault of a sexual nature?” “Have you ever faced discipline or entered into a settlement related to this kind of conduct?” At first, these questions caught many by surprise. Onlookers in the audience would shift uncomfortably in their seats. These issues were not commonly spoken about in Washington — and they were certainly not directed at accomplished judges seeking lifetime appointments. This practice drew intense attention when, days after I asked these questions to Supreme Court Justice Brett Kavanaugh during his confirmation hearing, he was credibly accused by multiple women of sexual misconduct. That is when the importance of asking these questions, even if they are uncomfortable, quickly became evident. But the truth is, I had asked these questions of dozens of nominees before him and of all nominees since who have come before every committee on which I sit, including President Biden’s nominees — because the only way to eliminate the pervasive culture of sexual violence and harassment in our society is to speak openly about it. It is not lost on me that as a woman, I shouldered the responsibility of asking these questions for the first time. But I am not afraid to speak out bluntly about injustice. Whether it’s leading the call to reform the extremist Supreme Court majority, to calling out Republicans for their radical agenda to ban abortion nationwide and wage an outright attack on women in this country, I have no plans to stop using my voice — especially while the MAGA GOP tries to silence yours. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | **= ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** | | **= ** | **= ** Thank you for standing with me. Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States

name: Dr. Paul Gosar
subject: Holding Hunter Biden Accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | | House to Vote to Hold Hunter Biden in Contempt of Congress | [](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-17-30-25-74d37711eb-7ra5d1411b)
---
**Dear Fellow Patriot,**

As a committed figher for accountability and transparency in government, I wanted to share with you an important development that demands our immediate attention and action.

**House to Vote to Hold Hunter Biden in Contempt of Congress**

This week is crucial in our pursuit of justice and integrity in government. T**he House Oversight and Accountability Committee, of which I am a proud member, will mark up a resolution to hold Hunter Biden in contempt of Congress**. _This decisive action follows Hunter Biden's blatant refusal to comply with subpoenas requiring his presence for a congressional deposition last month_.

As you might recall from my previous messages, I have extensively covered Hunter Biden's defiance. This issue becomes even more serious with the revelation that President Joe Biden had advanced knowledge of Hunter’s intention to defy the subpoenas.

**Hunter Biden's Lawbreaking and the Double Standard**

Hunter Biden's refusal to appear before the committee is a serious legal violation. It directly concerns the mounting evidence of Joe Biden’s alleged corruption and influence peddling schemes. Compliance with a Congressional subpoena is a fundamental legal responsibility, yet it seems this law is selectively applied.

**Joe Biden's Obstruction of Justice**

The situation worsens with Joe Biden's obstruction of justice. It's now known that Joe Biden was aware in advance of Hunter’s decision to defy the subpoena and even attempted to prevent the House Oversight and Accountability Committee’s proceedings.

**This act of conspiracy to obstruct a proceeding of Congress is illegal and, in my view, constitutes another impeachable offense**.

Your Support is Crucial! All of our power and support comes from good folks like YOU and those who just want to be prepared when evil rears its ugly head.

**[That’s why I’m hoping you’ll step up and make a contribution today. Your support is vital in our fight against corruption and in upholding the principles of justice and accountability](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-17-30-25-74d37711eb-7ra5d1411b)**.

Thank you for your unwavering support and commitment to holding Hunter and Joe Biden's feet to the fire.

**For Freedom,**

Congressman Paul A. Gosar, D.D.S. | [ DONATE >> ](https://tk.paulgosaraz.com/ga/click/2-57929-1-17-30-25-74d37711eb-7ra5d1411b)

This issue becomes even more serious with the revelation that President Joe Biden had advanced knowledge of Hunter’s intention to defy the subpoenas. Hunter Biden's Lawbreaking and the Double Standard Hunter Biden's refusal to appear before the committee is a serious legal violation. It directly concerns the mounting evidence of Joe Biden’s alleged corruption and influence peddling schemes. Compliance with a Congressional subpoena is a fundamental legal responsibility, yet it seems this law is selectively applied. Joe Biden's Obstruction of Justice The situation worsens with Joe Biden's obstruction of justice. It's now known that Joe Biden was aware in advance of Hunter’s decision to defy the subpoena and even attempted to prevent the House Oversight and Accountability Committee’s proceedings. This act of conspiracy to obstruct a proceeding of Congress is illegal and, in my view, constitutes another impeachable offense. Your Support is Crucial! All of our power and support comes from good folks like YOU and those who just want to be prepared when evil rears its ugly head. . Thank you for your unwavering support and commitment to holding Hunter and Joe Biden's feet to the fire. For Freedom, Congressman Paul A. Gosar, D.D.S. | View as a Web Page PAID FOR BY GOSAR FOR CONGRESS Copyright © 2023 Gosar For Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Raise wages for workers, or cut taxes for billionaires?
body:
How Sinema helped secure preferential tax treatment for billionaires | | | Peter – When President Biden and Democrats were working to pass the biggest healthcare and climate bill in a generation, Kyrsten Sinema bent over backwards to save the carried interest loophole, giving away BILLIONS per year in special tax breaks to Wall Street. If you didn’t know, the carried interest loophole allows private equity and hedge fund managers to claim large portions of their compensation as investment gains -- **which allows them to pay lower tax rates than everyone else**. It is the epitome of everything that is wrong with our tax code. So, as economist Dean Baker pointed out last night, if you’re a private equity billionaire who makes $100 Million a year, Kyrsten Sinema just gave you an extra **$17 Million per year**. So, if you’re a private equity billionaire, we don’t blame you for loving Kyrsten Sinema! No wonder you’ve been giving her so much campaign cash! But if you’re everyone else, well, that’s another story. clean_body: How Sinema helped secure preferential tax treatment for billionaires | | | Peter – When President Biden and Democrats were working to pass the biggest healthcare and climate bill in a generation, Kyrsten Sinema bent over backwards to save the carried interest loophole, giving away BILLIONS per year in special tax breaks to Wall Street. If you didn’t know, the carried interest loophole allows private equity and hedge fund managers to claim large portions of their compensation as investment gains -- which allows them to pay lower tax rates than everyone else. It is the epitome of everything that is wrong with our tax code. So, as economist Dean Baker pointed out last night, if you’re a private equity billionaire who makes $100 Million a year, Kyrsten Sinema just gave you an extra $17 Million per year. So, if you’re a private equity billionaire, we don’t blame you for loving Kyrsten Sinema! No wonder you’ve been giving her so much campaign cash! But if you’re everyone else, well, that’s another story. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Meanwhile, of course, Sinema’s obstruction also blocked Democrats from renewing the expanded Child Tax Credit – and as a result, the rate of child poverty in America more than doubled in one year. And who could forget when Sinema voted a big ole 👎on raising the federal minimum wage? She doesn’t even think workers deserve a measly $15 an hour??? There is no reason for disgustingly rich private equity fat cats to get preferential tax treatment while American families work hard to make ends meet. But Kyrsten Sinema will always put her Wall Street donors and the special interests who fund her luxury lifestyle first. Don’t forget, those trips to Paris and Barcelona don’t pay for themselves! name: Zach Shrewsbury
subject: A matter of conscience
body:
There are no real winners in war except the arms industry.

| | | [ ](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQVjOopfWgNzEeB_RoZF1o1AgPKN_ovXC15RwSuE3np72&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=010823_palestine&n=1)
---
Dear Friend, In mid-October, only 13 House progressives led by Cori Bush and Rashida Tlaib called for a ceasefire to stop Israel's retaliation against Palestinian civilians for Hamas's attack on Israelis. But Israel's continued indiscriminate bombing and public pressure have forced more members of Congress to reconsider their blind support for Israel's war crimes. They are starting to see that we are dealing with another Iraq war-like situation. We need a permanent ceasefire in Gaza now more than ever. **We must stop aiding and abetting Israel. The billions of dollars in unconditional military aid we provide have been used to kill over 23,000 civilians, two-thirds of them women and children.** The threat of a wider war looms as other nations in the region become involved in the conflict. There are no real winners in war except the arms industry, as President Eisenhower reminded us 70 years ago. As we pour billions of dollars in taxpayers' money into the jaws of this endless, brutal war, our population at home suffers from an increase in homelessness, opioid addiction, suicide, mass shootings, exorbitant rents, medical bankruptcies, college debt, the unavailability of long term care and many other social needs that demand resources and our attention. Our support for Israel's assault on Gaza is further undermined by the case that South Africa has brought before the UN International Criminal Court, charging Israel with genocide against the Palestinian population. The case will be heard next week. Do we want to be associated with an ally charged with genocide, much less an ally convicted of genocide, if that is the result? Secretary of State Blinken is flying to the region this week to meet with Israeli leaders and other parties to prevent the war from expanding. **He should demand that Israel cease all military action in Gaza. He should inform them that the U.S. will cut off all military aid if they refuse.** Most Americans support a permanent ceasefire, so Blinken's message would have widespread support at home. In a larger sense, it is time to follow the advice of the Prophet Isaiah: "Nation shall not lift up sword against nation, neither shall they learn war anymore." I'm running for Senate because we need strong leaders who advocate for everyday people here in the U.S. and who support peace, diplomacy, and collaboration worldwide, not wars, competition, and the military-industrial complex's profit interests. **[Help us build a strong campaign to bring the human-rights-first perspective to the U.S. Senate with your generous contribution today.](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQVjOopfWgNzEeB_RoZF1o1AgPKN_ovXC15RwSuE3np72&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=010823_palestine&n=2)** Thank you, Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV), Candidate for the U.S. Senate

---

| Zach Shrewsbury (D-WV) is running for the U.S. Senate seat as the only Democrat in the race. A native West Virginian, a Marine Corps veteran, and a grandson of a coal miner, Zach has a passion for making a difference in his community. He has seen firsthand the struggles faced by working families who are just trying to get by. Zach's military service experiences and his work as a community and climate justice organizer shaped his commitment to fighting for social and economic justice, and he's dedicated his career to making a difference in people's lives. **[For Democrats to keep the Senate, Zach has to win. Support the campaign today.](https://www.shrewsburyforsenate.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_4EuiRHvEQu_OzjBiZlAGzs2u921EReiR88ARqrt5HWpbBPunnEofCMh9dr_AFzKQVjOopfWgNzEeB_RoZF1o1AgPKN_ovXC15RwSuE3np72&e=835c7faa13004566534194ac192acb50&utm_source=shrewsburyforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=010823_palestine&n=5)**

body:
Sign HERE by 8PM to FIRE the entire Biden Admin >>

| |
---
| | |
**First , President Joe Biden** tanked our economy and our energy independence with his insane executive orders.

**Then** , with the help of **Sec. of Homeland Security Alejandro Mayorkas** , he opened the southern border to record rates of crime, drugs and human trafficking.

**Now ,** **Sec. of Transportation Pete Buttigieg** is neglecting his responsibility to oversee the efforts of the Ohio train derailments.

name: Wes Moore
subject: The NRA chief Wayne LaPierre is retiring
body:
Friend,

Wayne LaPierre just announced his retirement as the NRA’s leader.

My thoughts on this announcement? Good riddance.

Under LaPierre’s leadership, our country saw countless mass shootings and increased gun violence. As our communities suffered, LaPierre stood by and did nothing .

Instead, he litigated against common-sense gun reforms many states passed in response to the increasing violence. When I signed the Gun Safety Act of 2023 last legislative session, the NRA and a gun dealer sued our state moments after the ink was dry.

I will not be intimidated by the NRA. Maryland will not be intimidated by the NRA. We refuse to accept preventable gun deaths. We refuse to go backward.

As I head into this year’s legislative session, I will continue the fight for the safety of our communities. I will not stop advocating for common-sense reforms to save lives.

My message to the next leader of the NRA is simple: If you come for Maryland, we will fight back.

The safety and protection of all Marylanders will always be a top priority. Make a donation to our campaign today to help us show via the power of grassroots fundraising just how many people are with us in the fight for common-sense gun safety reforms. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240108-1?refcode=em20240108]

Contribute » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20240108-1?refcode=em20240108]

Elevate,

Wes

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Sign now: Shut down Line 5 pipeline!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Water is a human right. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTviq3PFkZQD2yBPSZyYXEPUHBYt6lPNVA0xcaIQUavrIUDk00QSJmCfHYi5-Xyn81-s-6EBAEqhvvQ5QbP2l9dDiX_9Nz3Ep2FuSJibcYvQJ2NDbjjJs_QAOXvavbQVowH9Wv4aKICfg38fGZ1Ml7GdJje0jx_M-7StJplsfBFpig/42t/70WkiIigRoeEQC88aVhu2w/h0/b3powVCabaRXk87sWkPBK9pCP4Gco4DOL8Imu1Kj81w)
---
Friend, Every day that oil flows through the Line 5 pipeline is a catastrophic risk to the entire Great Lakes region. The aging, deteriorating pipeline, operated by Canadian multinational corporation Enbridge Energy, trespasses on Tribal sovereign lands. A spill could poison the drinking water of tens of millions of people, including in my home state of Michigan. Enbridge is already responsible for the single largest inland oil spill in the U.S. when, in 2010, its Line 6B pipeline dumped 840,000 gallons of oil into the headwaters of the Kalamazoo River. name: Tammy Baldwin for Senate
subject: We’re waiting for your response
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| We’re only collecting responses until midnight.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1827%2E35263%2ECpxm2K)
Peter — Republicans are working tirelessly to retake the Senate majority this November. They’re on a mission to advance their extreme, out-of-touch agenda — _and they only need to flip one more Senate seat like Wisconsin’s to do it._ **[With so much at stake this year, we’re asking Tammy’s top supporters: What concerns you most about a Republican Senate majority takeover? Take our one-question survey to share your thoughts:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Senate_Majority_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1827%2E35263%2ECpxm2K)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Senate_Majority_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1827%2E35263%2ECpxm2K)
---
Republicans haven’t been shy about their intentions:
Passing a national abortion ban.
Repealing the _Affordable Care Act._
Cutting earned benefits like Social Security.
Eroding LGTBQ+ rights.
**All of this — and more — is on the table if Republicans are victorious this November.**
**[We’re only collecting responses until midnight, so take our one-question survey to be a part of our work to defend the Democratic Senate majority and defeat extreme Republicans →](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/survey/Senate_Majority_Survey/?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20240108_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1827%2E35263%2ECpxm2K)**
Thanks for sharing your input.
— Tammy Baldwin for Senate

name: Paul Begala
subject: Listen up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
Peter:
For decades, I have worked in politics electing Democrats in tough races across the country. I’ve been on both the winning and losing side, and here’s what I know for sure: **As PA goes, so goes the nation.**
Just look at the numbers: In 2016, 44,292 votes in PA propelled Donald Trump to his unexpected victory. Then, in 2020, Joe Biden clinched Pennsylvania’s 20 electoral votes by a narrow 1.17% margin, helping him secure the White House.
**Mark my words, 2024 will be no different, and Pennsylvania will once again be THE tipping point.**
So here’s a piece of expert advice for grassroots donors like you, Peter: **[If we’re going to protect our Democratic Senate majority, we must prioritize supporting Bob Casey in Pennsylvania.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240108-2?refcode=em20240108-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1630_552475_ARyPq5&akid=1630%2E552475%2EARyPq5)**
National Republicans know that if they flip this seat, they can flip the Senate, and they’re going to spend whatever it takes to do just that. Bob is already up against a mega-millionaire who can self-fund his campaign. So we need the resources to fight back.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting Bob Casey’s re-election campaign. Whatever you can pitch in will make a big difference in a race this competitive.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240108-2?refcode=em20240108-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1630_552475_ARyPq5&akid=1630%2E552475%2EARyPq5)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240108-2?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240108-2-el&refcode2=1630_552475_ARyPq5&akid=1630%2E552475%2EARyPq5) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240108-2?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240108-2-el&refcode2=1630_552475_ARyPq5&akid=1630%2E552475%2EARyPq5) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240108-2?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240108-2-el&refcode2=1630_552475_ARyPq5&akid=1630%2E552475%2EARyPq5) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240108-2?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240108-2-el&refcode2=1630_552475_ARyPq5&akid=1630%2E552475%2EARyPq5) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240108-2?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240108-2-el&refcode2=1630_552475_ARyPq5&akid=1630%2E552475%2EARyPq5) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240108-2?recurring=1&refcode=em20240108-2&refcode2=1630_552475_ARyPq5&akid=1630%2E552475%2EARyPq5)
---
Support from grassroots donors like you really is going to make all the difference in this battleground race.
– Paul Begala
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240108-2?refcode=em20240108-2&recurring=1&refcode2=1630_552475_ARyPq5&akid=1630%2E552475%2EARyPq5)
Paul Begala is a longtime political strategist and former advisor to President Bill Clinton. | | Friend, Here we go again. Team Burchett is ready to take a stand with Tim as he digs in his heels to demand some _real_ budget cuts. The latest spending “deal” for government funding isn’t anything close to a good deal—especially for Republicans who want some dadgum fiscal responsibility. Supporters of the [$1.59 trillion](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3774ce40d8b840ddb19d7a94512b7849&_e=7b9Pw81OwvWHSlH6x01OxrKx-rUxOObC5PHiGBMXlcBp5_pJ5a9oOAqTOm72SWWugxN_DK252YUzzN7anL2K98aCfZkxD7rfmZRxDiSO8E-2OW4rozcPD_uo8S-Kfs9pfpIQxjwab5PtWZ6_FzQy9chlahqeclwFN_5x9teE-Q7H1XJGVQCq6aAvlhGgzQ6qEJjT9l0hpAyK0HIYZ0dicCTrh5aud76ZSptNUygeZZgWEgWL2yonmFxcD1dJuBdJFJkDUqvCTQ5Jb2CbuAjQbw%3D%3D) free-for-all will try to tell you that everything is fine and dandy. But the math doesn’t add up, and the House Freedom Caucus estimates the true cost rings up to about [$1.658 trillion](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3774ce40d8b840ddb19d7a94512b7849&_e=7b9Pw81OwvWHSlH6x01OxqaDJ15U_xye6EiRHtmBoKuAmD_IK2UQFH9qaNDpj6f1KAaipVtMMJtMUUULwAgJjwlD9NL6-RsvRxGCKAYbiAXT2pSC5n1pnHJ7rWCoFZbN9F-PBXCslKqpOq5madle8aazhPZIS4c-DpbbRC7b1xQOMKfZvHJTpb38jBUtixwaRFW2ChKuP-IuLH_BUaEJOcmHX69Js1GY7HXODdrmlQ5QSHopfWpRigGRvBrCuI8tRnPWbA_J0yaq3he4qCjD08_HbQGpY2fnjlKSCNeoa-M%3D). But that’s not even the worst part. In addition to falling off a fiscal cliff (while leaders on both sides of the aisle are blissfully in denial), we still have a [reckless form of anarchy](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3774ce40d8b840ddb19d7a94512b7849&_e=7b9Pw81OwvWHSlH6x01OxkRhaw-HxbIcTc03NThMkSrhSy_tM95ur4gfQGhpm-7jA2-iZgSwvUCTOzArz1J5WDQzMjVWMHrHN0zLkfuGROXPNNopN3MEAfcVgaTmLB_Pv2hRBczvWhQoL5k-X-85F059pcMM7scSk1fne-FcAHTijFS1ynrUtr7_0UBJafdvppJYxFIwLw9TAADOd6gkkTi0hfXlcOnrjo6E4o3tRN6DUO8LTLIKn1svjhofmqmg0UZ8-1SngxCF_L2S9SHajxCa1-cru_M96Sg09-R3wds%3D) unfolding at our southern border. If Congress doesn’t move to defund all federal programs that process and support undocumented immigrants, Republicans should let the government shut down. We have no other choice! Democrats will continue to fund this chaos to the tune of [$451 billion a year](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3774ce40d8b840ddb19d7a94512b7849&_e=7b9Pw81OwvWHSlH6x01OxmJ6cFbsrn9iberQjxn9zxzgVIHEe2VlVC4E1UEIvvCBThKJ-XaWmKMVfcexnKsKmve_W7XtTWRkYABK1m0zI09fYwRNtpgXWWgMtrHE7uotAW-YTi6E-Bt0VZ4hHv4b0N-mzTAkLpmlN3XVWmGUew2z08boxaW70OerPyEIdK-vdtBdd07EgAZrv0OJMInGscAnBRToNyCrs8shc6rKMkv-Oth5fYzc-Tw99_I2HPa8NbH1MeSZdeyJ5Jeixw2gwlKfQjhKa-uXeP533BJK2MKeK_EPCfvgQs3e_B0atK9b88B7LDqxgo8EdOaRtbnRxA%3D%3D) if we let them. That means your hard-earned tax dollars are going towards housing, feeding, and educating illegal aliens—not to mention footing the bill for their medical care. Thanks to the Biden administration, the America we know is gone. The Left’s answer to the border problem is to make illegal immigration legal—and someone’s got to take a stand.** ** **[>>> Are you with us on this one? body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/emiliasykesforcongress/emilia-sykes-announces-campaign-for-us-congress-17616204?e=7730fa895a)
---
| |
---
| Tomorrow, the Ohio Democratic Party will hold elections in each of the state’s 15 Congressional Districts to select district-level delegates for the 2024 Democratic National Convention in Chicago.

The election for the OH-13 delegates will take place:

**Tuesday, January 9, 2024
Akron-Summit County Public Library
60 S High Street
Akron, OH 44326**

Doors will open at 6 p.m. and the elections will begin at 7 p.m.

[Click here](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=70ed49a395&e=7730fa895a) for a list of filed OH-13 delegate candidates. Anyone who wants to vote must be a resident of the district and turn 18 by Election Day 2024.

DNC Delegates help nominate the Democratic candidate for President. A total of 83 district delegates from Ohio and eight district alternates will be elected to represent Ohio at the 2024 DNC, in addition to at-large delegates and others representing the Ohio Democratic Party. Read more about the [2024 Ohio Delegate Selection Plan](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=5ae285abdc&e=7730fa895a).

The convention will take place in Chicago from August 19 – 22, 2024.
---
|

---
Peter, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It’s a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden’s desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. **It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years.** For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden’s to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it’s not just the FBI, it’s the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney’s offices in Brooklyn, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. **As I’ve been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE!** While words don’t have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. **CONSPIRACY NOUN** con·spir·a·cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in “conspiracy theories” like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... _but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family._
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8571ab78ffdb4078913e886204e32337&_e=mrTNe4gKXeUwa-TXBPVMNNM5qkmS_z2VexRHMgOpyLCrBb9es4OneHrPvcVp8682ceOt2q79FooWcAnw-MZiSlcemoqZ8Cn87QbQFhtJhA6_K5-sEQvXBnVLQV6u9ljL8kEgMv2LbzUR_bfZE5lOKgPQNGDtxWj6tuL2Ao549TGFVurN9hZ7b_AEGZ8bFYxhabVF9hX-CdNJCQLoTZbLoFlqTJHclNjzl4g16GDz4fN7g56HdlBAQ5yxlnn-pjjU_LtF2Vx3u20HtTUfZpK39SEsIpU6qnfKVUqgRjLIJlwqG6sGJAqnyQBJ02G4iFg7fxhQlG_AVC14etQkT-7WTN_zh9D3ST4vf3ADjkN66uvnzGmpuBarehqbCXQFYKmT)
---
It’s because they are complicit in the cover-up. I’ve said it before, and it’s more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. **I’ll be honest, it is brutal... but I’m a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what’s right, and who certainly doesn’t back down from a fight.**
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8571ab78ffdb4078913e886204e32337&_e=mrTNe4gKXeUwa-TXBPVMNNM5qkmS_z2VexRHMgOpyLCrBb9es4OneHrPvcVp8682ceOt2q79FooWcAnw-MZiSlcemoqZ8Cn87QbQFhtJhA6_K5-sEQvXBnVLQV6u9ljL8kEgMv2LbzUR_bfZE5lOKgPQNGDtxWj6tuL2Ao549TGFVurN9hZ7b_AEGZ8bFYxhabVF9hX-CdNJCQLoTZbLoFlqTJHclNjzl4g16GDz4fMLsN66Au3tRaZ0jEyMz_bBgOnyz_tDaRXLbIzIJq1_koBrU228ktzs31JuAmO43-AUXWq-qy11mJCTNLRrzLQa7nikJWNr8vCIOebXKuxB2mzPK1dwoB55aLSFXlZEZ4alSGG_SzBsDv4fGey9CRIj)
---
I’ve only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I’m once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY.
As Theodore Roosevelt said “Nothing worth having is easy” and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, **it’s the promise of America to all of her citizens.**
[**If you’re with me, I’d be honored to have your support.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8571ab78ffdb4078913e886204e32337&_e=mrTNe4gKXeUwa-TXBPVMNNM5qkmS_z2VexRHMgOpyLCrBb9es4OneHrPvcVp8682ceOt2q79FooWcAnw-MZiSlcemoqZ8Cn87QbQFhtJhA6_K5-sEQvXBnVLQV6u9ljL8kEgMv2LbzUR_bfZE5lOKgPQNGDtxWj6tuL2Ao549TGFVurN9hZ7b_AEGZ8bFYxhabVF9hX-CdNJCQLoTZbLoFlqTJHclNjzl4g16GDz4fPtC1MOMhuy2nOdEo3-4mLxJnL_EtoWzPSKwZcFGtnPBFi0imnrzvgfdwIkaSKgKhBCax-_ZT-i5YsoEBWX50JEBd-xnXDUPdLPPv-ufHuZtdH3qEjqQ7YtnLh-f6dtVliNwEeaTF0XnGTFk3QOOZYR)

clean_body: In the Biden Family | | | Peter, Just a year ago, it was unfathomable to me that I would be writing this email. It’s a bit long, but I would ask you to read it in its entirety. I spent a lot of time writing it and did my best to make every word count. I write it with great sadness and astonishment, sadness for our country which I hold so dear, and astonishment at Joe Biden’s desecration of the Oath of Office he took with his hand on the Bible in front of the world. It has come to light that the Federal Bureau of Investigation has had 40 informants inside the Biden family over the past 15 years. For 15 years, Credible Informants have been providing criminal information against the Biden’s to FBI Field Offices across the country, and for 15 years, everytime the information has been brought to FBI HQ, the leadership of the FBI shuts it down. But it’s not just the FBI, it’s the Department of Justice as well. I just heard sworn witness testimony that the Biden Bribery allegations on the FD-1023 Form were CREDIBLE, and that he referred the criminal matters originating from it to three separate U.S. Attorney’s offices in Brooklyn, Manhattan and Delaware for further investigation. Then, just like at the FBI, nothing happened. As I’ve been saying since I started this investigation; the allegations about Joe Biden are being covered up... because they are TRUE! While words don’t have any meaning to the Left, they still mean something to me and the law in this country. CONSPIRACY NOUN con·spir·a·cy An agreement between two or more people to commit an illegal act, along with an intent to achieve the agreement's goal. The media loves to talk about how Republicans believe in “conspiracy theories” like the Russian-Collusion Hoax, the origins of COVID, and the Steele-Dossier... but they sure have been silent about the conspiracy at the highest levels of government to cover up the expansive criminal operation being run by the Biden Crime Family. | It’s because they are complicit in the cover-up. I’ve said it before, and it’s more true today than ever before; I am facing down and exposing the rotten corruption of the most powerful and unholy triumvirate in American history, the Biden Family, the Federal Bureaucracy, and the Corporate Media. They are hellbent on stopping my investigation and they are throwing everything they have at me. I’ll be honest, it is brutal... but I’m a country boy from West Kentucky who was taught to stand up for what’s right, and who certainly doesn’t back down from a fight. | I’ve only been able to weather the attacks with the support of patriotic Americans across the country, and I’m once again asking for your help to defend my good name as I delve deeper into the belly of the corrupt beast that is ravaging our country: THE BIDEN CRIME FAMILY. As Theodore Roosevelt said “Nothing worth having is easy” and having an honest government free of corruption is not just worth having, it’s the promise of America to all of her citizens. | With Courage, James Comer Chairman, House Oversight Committee | | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress ../../../private/var/folders/r/prmwhjj3zq7czqp52lmjdcw0000gn/T/com.microsoft.Outlook/Outlook Temp/%unsubscribeurl%

**2024 is the year of the states.**
The future of our democracy depends on expanding our power at the state level, defending our majorities, and defeating our extreme Republican opponents. At our level of the ballot, races often come down to just a handful of votes – meaning we can’t count out a single vote if we’re going to succeed this November.
Pledging to vote in November is an easy way to declare your support for Democrats right now – and an essential step in our mission to elect Democrats to statehouses across the country.

| | This weekend, we solemnly marked the anniversary of the January 6th insurrection.

Three years ago, Donald Trump incited a dangerous attack on our nation’s most sacred democratic principles. Like you, I watched in disbelief as the former president attempted to overturn the results of a free and fair election.

It was a flagrant assault on who we are as a nation and we cannot allow anything like it to happen ever again.

[If you’re committed to defending our democracy, will you chip in a donation now to show Trump and his GOP enablers that we will not allow him to recklessly endanger our country again?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76723719/448273028/1045260035?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_ZL_20240108_FR_Jan6_0_3MO_ZoeLofgren_NA_NA_Jan6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MjU2NDJiMC02ZmFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-XFBvNqp2fdmikj-sZZXGsEDbAMiWuYrGWXfrHEBCIw=)

Fellow American, I received some concerning news, and I'm asking you to read this entire memo about the state of my re-election campaign. My Democrat opponent just filed to run against me in Kentucky's first congressional district and it is alarming.
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=99686011bd804f9ba26558232e180222&_e=ktuhpBnQrJo9wonYMN3opyTTVXD627BsUhAX01DgM5Q0bUMt2ACpUMB9hlQYGNULBsL3I6uRmkxEcPbajGFUYXjcka6bsV3yjHgU2JBXk3CfipB16hp5o_q2x8vqs6XQRs3ovpXWRaAX7gDH-G0KEN3Uq0o_f74EwtifN1EF1GS8A-YgoBqfb1Dl0ZeblJ3eat74xv_e68fDPTPR3OFDXw3YLYJUS_KHzyLh12Pr3VMFbDYCnlhGRMaTZ10vMk3k7f0oP5W1CtXoJ6AYJFYAfQJfhne2XLx0BNnuTPwgOCOMiLYwMiKp62jesgVAIqmN)
---
My opponent is a Far-Left activist who worked for the Hillary Clinton campaign, and she's already raising tons of money on ActBlue from liberal online donors around the country. She is determined to defeat me and end my investigation once and for all. **You and I both know we can 't let that happen.** But it's not only that. She's hired Amy McGrath's campaign manager. You may not remember Amy McGrath, but I sure do. McGrath raised $88 Million dollars in her 2020 campaign for Kentucky Senate. **$88,000,000!**
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.myfreedomnews.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=99686011bd804f9ba26558232e180222&_e=ktuhpBnQrJo9wonYMN3opyTTVXD627BsUhAX01DgM5Q0bUMt2ACpUMB9hlQYGNULBsL3I6uRmkxEcPbajGFUYXjcka6bsV3yjHgU2JBXk3CfipB16hp5o_q2x8vqs6XQRs3ovpXWRaAX7gDH-G0KEN3Uq0o_f74EwtifN1EF1GRRXuDS7dsgOBaEi2YXe1_f-bTa_ieSte_aLNpv40TL63T8QejV_6sd_PHrzok9VXkQ2gCd44OXo56hi5GRnpcgnjRiveptbBkVM2FZw4pJCdEvXnl4L6oCvEdn82AHpMPGRIekrmALcmJxPEgnhraN)
---
That's an astounding amount of money, and her campaign manager's rolodex is stuffed to the brim with democrat mega-donors chomping at the bit to take me down. They know their investment in the Biden administration is at serious risk due to the findings of my investigation, and they will do whatever it takes to defeat me in November and end my inquiry into the Biden Family's corruption racket and cover-up. I'm asking everyone who reads this memo to stand with me today as my 2024 campaign kicks off in earnest. We must show national Democrats that our campaign is strong enough to weather anything... _or this campaign could get really rough for me in the fall._ If you're able, I'd love to have your renewed support. Thank you for everything, James Comer

clean_body: It’s going to take a massive grassroots effort to reach every voter across PA-08, and we’re turning to our biggest supporters to help us get there. | Peter, We’re officially less than 10 months away from Election Day , and our team is gearing up to make every moment count. It’s going to take a massive grassroots effort to reach every voter across PA-08, and we’re turning to our biggest supporters to help us get there. The best way you can fuel our efforts to re-elect Matt and kick off this crucial election year on the right foot is with a monthly recurring donation. Your consistent support keeps our campaign running smoothly. It’s what will allow us to expand our outreach, mobilize volunteers, run ads, and get our message out to every corner of northeastern Pennsylvania over the next 10 months. Your recurring contribution is a direct investment in our mission to keep PA-08 blue and push back against the outside money pouring into this district. = | = If you’re unable to make a monthly contribution, you can also = Every dollar we raise helps reach voters across PA-08. Thank you, Team Cartwright In 2022, Matt Cartwright was one of only 5 Democrats to win a House race in a district that Donald Trump carried in 2020. He's gearing up for another tough re-election, and he needs your support to keep PA-08 blue. Rush a donation right away to help Matt protect his seat. | = | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Twitter" | Paid for by Cartwright for Congress | Cartwright For Congress PO Box 414 Scranton, PA 18501 United States Click here to from the Cartwright for Congress.

body:
If we end up in a three-way race between me, Kari Lake, and Kyrsten Sinema, I’m never going to win it without your support.
#

Hey, Peter. This is Ruben Gallego.
I’m running for U.S. Senate in Arizona to take back a seat from Kyrsten Sinema and hold our majority. And I’m running to defeat Kari Lake so we don’t end up with Trump’s “MAGA Queen” in the Senate — one of the most extreme, most dangerous election deniers in the country.
If we end up in a three-way race between me, Kari Lake, and Kyrsten Sinema, I’m never going to win it without your support. I really need your help.
[**So I’m asking you, right now, whether I can count on your support to help me win in Arizona. Can you make a donation of $3 and become one of our first donors of the Election Year?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240108-1-30&t=1&akid=1680%2E734936%2ERzVSW6)

name: Full Mag News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dfd5471664414922b12d00692cde484b&_e=DyvJHV7D9ExbMWs6t80NRJxJQk-G8lLpzCPrMEQqoJHj6BUsYlpB6mwBqaXOGToAOR3R2ZHJPYYy_YV3TYWFtWIX5r4scFy1X5PDBdgce1LM93DpzKvw_ee_DZ0vd4ag954HSl-GmeDnctGnVw7Fvx6peZQ4NK90SlDe-trIUJLJ1X7luiw4uvZVtvEudZNLpiMZIjUcig0b8iSW0MaZDmtcDhKjuxb4VSShopW5kle2GCQORquLa2U5EkjYNGWppq_jMmvKj7Yv9Cu39_ucXo6IPajPAGOiZTK_9taJ-jP9yMENkKNGAKyiqdLuTAn8XDHJD_jzjjjk0pht8sCC17OsjyiK1cHA35Z9XahupQDV3XMf7brybdviEqZ0fp1xElW884ogVR2H_tFOUsf0lHs5h08SSyCeiWMcpZqTf9FdP4UN9MTbDTYOy3-ZYYE3)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dfd5471664414922b12d00692cde484b&_e=DyvJHV7D9ExbMWs6t80NRJxJQk-G8lLpzCPrMEQqoJHj6BUsYlpB6mwBqaXOGToAOR3R2ZHJPYYy_YV3TYWFtWIX5r4scFy1X5PDBdgce1LM93DpzKvw_ee_DZ0vd4ag954HSl-GmeDnctGnVw7Fvx6peZQ4NK90SlDe-trIUJLJ1X7luiw4uvZVtvEudZNLpiMZIjUcig0b8iSW0MaZDmtcDhKjuxb4VSShopW5kle2GCQORquLa2U5EkjYNGWppq_jMmvKj7Yv9Cu39_ucXmwheq9pFMhUP0Z8ihA4md9rB3MgNul_NZUXd-6PUE3yDfZjcXvUThD0Wv6oOnw6HaNqD7iQE3n0GJnopOeffcHt7PJ0h5_lopIwu5CPWXY2Bgi0JFMKve-OQ-TXPsjAKfsOyCCa5ktzlO9Pr-VLV2x9OEqeioAhh5IxAwm-gQ6L)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dfd5471664414922b12d00692cde484b&_e=DyvJHV7D9ExbMWs6t80NRJxJQk-G8lLpzCPrMEQqoJHj6BUsYlpB6mwBqaXOGToAOR3R2ZHJPYYy_YV3TYWFtWIX5r4scFy1X5PDBdgce1LM93DpzKvw_ee_DZ0vd4ag954HSl-GmeDnctGnVw7Fvx6peZQ4NK90SlDe-trIUJLJ1X7luiw4uvZVtvEudZNLpiMZIjUcig0b8iSW0MaZDmtcDhKjuxb4VSShopW5kle2GCQORquLa2U5EkjYNGWppq_jMmvKj7Yv9Cu39_ucXrI8fBctjxPVE5aPvtkRdpA35vcoMsX2IsLvPEsLkXcgew6LdTpFK-tl0V9XjdSuaeeyGCiUl5RLxjUCT-jHMkIbQ9z4EPp7PMuYQzZQGPQCxCSeRztBSxgSuz9MKtDnMKsiRmQR4vHqReXRUgzxBv04clp6PyMgd6-dLdM62UUh)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=dfd5471664414922b12d00692cde484b&_e=DyvJHV7D9ExbMWs6t80NRJxJQk-G8lLpzCPrMEQqoJHj6BUsYlpB6mwBqaXOGToAOR3R2ZHJPYYy_YV3TYWFtWIX5r4scFy1X5PDBdgce1LM93DpzKvw_ee_DZ0vd4ag954HSl-GmeDnctGnVw7Fvx6peZQ4NK90SlDe-trIUJLJ1X7luiw4uvZVtvEudZNLpiMZIjUcig0b8iSW0MaZDmtcDhKjuxb4VSShopW5kle2GCQORquLa2U5EkjYNGWppq_jMmvKj7Yv9Cu39_ucXi77ymhPh5MiCkS6Dq36Oqc9JXFaORX8iDc1OaoUpNHOvJtMs4_MF1XXlj4tBkken9Lh_VO076C9iJRwvKq9p2N-3ukjCecL9PpfUVJGzdEsnfHSOs4Y2XnDvqR1xcfc9I37jh65nM9C3gPY5yVozdBY3An_9r882tk6rVt913EM).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

body:
Tina is doing everything she can to keep Trump out of the White House — but she can’t do it alone. |
#
Folks — The threat that Donald Trump poses to our democracy is very real. From 91 indictments, including obstruction of justice, to declaring that he will be “a dictator on Day One” if he wins back the White House, Trump’s behavior has made it clear: **we have to keep him far far away from the Oval Office.** That work starts right here in Minnesota. As of last week, all GOP members of Congress from Minnesota have endorsed Trump.
