body:
we need to replace George Santos with a true leader

| Peter,

It’s Tom Suozzi. Fight for Progress asked me to reach out to you about the critical special election to replace George Santos on February 13.

Here’s why–this election is critical not just to my community in Nassau and Queens but to the whole country. We need to restore sanity to our government, we need to set the tone for 2024, and we need to get our country back on track and get people working together again. **All of this is at stake in NY-03.**

But Peter, national Republicans know how important this election is. That’s why they’re going to pour money into ads to make me look bad. And in **a toss-up race like this, we can’t afford to be unprepared.**

[_**That’s why I’m asking if you’ll split a donation right now between Fight for Progress and me. This special election just a few weeks from now will be extremely competitive, and we need the resources to win to get 2024 started off right.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76725380/448278668/-349024561?refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2024-01-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjMyOTI5ZDcxLTc1YWUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=cAsetAvnkrI6lLWQKHwPd9W2aRydit-wRjStSnRbJZU=)

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: We need to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Across the country, people are feeling a disconnect between their own needs and values and the priorities of the MAGA House majority.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240108-3368-footer&t=1&akid=3368%2E420207%2E2hd7My)
Peter, 2024 is set to be one of the most influential election years our country has ever seen. So it’s imperative that our progressive movement remains united in our mission.
**We need to hear from you****, Peter.**
[**Will you take 2 minutes to take our 2024 Election Year Priorities Survey and share your perspective with Pramila?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2024-congressional-priorities-survey/?source=em20240108&t=2&akid=3368%2E420207%2E2hd7My)
Across the country, people are feeling a disconnect between their own needs and the misguided priorities of the MAGA House majority. Lobbyists and special interest groups often try to get in the way of our work to build a democracy that works for everyone — not just the privileged few.
That’s why Pramila is determined to ensure our grassroots campaign continues to make an impact in Congress.
**Your answers will help us remain in line with the needs and priorities of our most engaged supporters, and guide congressional priorities for 2024 and beyond.**[**It will only take a moment, please make your voice heard by taking our 2024 Election Year Priorities Survey.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2024-congressional-priorities-survey/?source=em20240108&t=3&akid=3368%2E420207%2E2hd7My)
**[Take the survey ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/survey/2024-congressional-priorities-survey/?source=em20240108&t=4&akid=3368%2E420207%2E2hd7My)**
Thank you for making your voice heard,
Jayapal HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240108-3368-footer&t=5&refcode2=3368_420207_2hd7My&akid=3368%2E420207%2E2hd7My)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

subject: I was just on Newsmax! 📺
body:
|
---
| | Hey Peter - exciting day around the office! I just wrapped up a **live TV interview on Newsmax** to discuss the border crisis and why I oppose the Democrats' plan to give free healthcare to illegal immigrants.

If you weren't able to catch the interview live, you can watch my two clips from the interview at the link below.

[**Check out the interview when you have a moment ... and then please chip in whatever you can to our campaign to help us push forward in the final weeks!**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=3041fdd505&e=86e91e802d)

---
| [WATCH NEWSMAX INTERVIEW](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=503b0d57da&e=86e91e802d "WATCH NEWSMAX INTERVIEW")

| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=c5920465e5&e=86e91e802d)
---
| Securing our southern border has to be Washington's top priority. Anyone who isn't doing everything they can to tackle this issue simply isn't serious.

And don't even get me started on free health care for illegal immigrants when our state budget is already billions of dollars in deficit!

_**These are serious, urgent challenges. We need serious, urgent leaders who are ready to fight for solutions.**_

We have the momentum in this race, Peter. I'm out on the campaign trail every day giving everything I've got.

I hope you're standing with me. Thank you,

Max Ukropina

I just wrapped up a live TV interview on Newsmax to discuss the border crisis and why I oppose the Democrats' plan to give free healthcare to illegal immigrants. If you weren't able to catch the interview live, you can watch my two clips from the interview at the link below. | "WATCH NEWSMAX INTERVIEW" | | Securing our southern border has to be Washington's top priority. Anyone who isn't doing everything they can to tackle this issue simply isn't serious. And don't even get me started on free health care for illegal immigrants when our state budget is already billions of dollars in deficit! These are serious, urgent challenges. We need serious, urgent leaders who are ready to fight for solutions. We have the momentum in this race, Peter. I'm out on the campaign trail every day giving everything I've got. Friend, This past weekend we remembered the three year anniversary of the January 6th attack. Our opponent, Congresswoman Lauren Boebert was among those complicit in the planning of the attack, and in the days leading up to the attack on the Capitol took groups of MAGA supporters on reconnaissance tours of the Capitol helping them to identify entrances and weak points in the building's security.

More than 174 Capitol police officers were injured and at least 15 were hospitalized and DC officer Brian Sicknick was killed defending the same entrances that Boebert showed to her MAGA tour groups. Boebert never faced any consequence for these tours and even went so far as to deny medals to the brave Capitol Police Officers who defended the building that day. **_Making matters worse she made reference to her involvement in these events as a way_**** _to harass a group of Jewish visitors to the Capitol_**** _._**

In 2022, while traversing the Capitol, Lauren Boebert encountered a large group of Jewish citizens that included Rabbis and Orthodox Jews with traditional beards and yarmulkes. She approached the group and asked them if they were _“doing reconnaissance.”_ While she played it off as a joke, Boebert and her compatriots traffic heavily in anti-semitism and are constantly trying to find new conspiracies to pin on Jews. Such as when Boebert’s _partner in crime_ Marjorie Taylor Greene claimed “Jewish Space Lasers” started wildfires in California. **Coming up with a new conspiracy that Jews are conducting recon tours and spying on the Capitol is nothing new for divisive people like Boebert.** In her brief time in Congress, Lauren Boebert has alienated just about every group imaginable through her insensitive and inflammatory rhetoric. In her new district she is seen as an outsider and is more vulnerable than ever, **which is why we need you to support her Democratic challenger Ike McCorkle.** **[Can you support Ike’s campaign to defeat Boebert in her new district with a contribution of $25 or whatever you can spare so we can restore sanity in our government and remove Boebert once and for all?](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJXsSkXuWalByOLEsEPwER0xy28mkCpKrhjJsqExa4FWMJUY-YtZ9HPzbshCaFXFk75x6QsuwCXW-m_24Vwf-Pb6O8yJWXkrho-QsEX1ZAUHgVr26MVlvERypIpDogQzUvkIPzScpqW98jy-7nXeqRvlo8MVXMSvA5lE4VUG3IajT2k01fshuIOcSVfTQJoJrkwgJemmctU0eHdu-N6dvfd1OeSv9QbHU1BJX8fe_CtjiB4KaytFieFPPNJXIibsr1rQSRTEauCMBhtfpZ15Ar8L0858jMW5zDijs0ACUnWiYQphZeT8t2PIUXwM8jR-ZC/42t/IZYJUB9dQzij2NvcfU1AVg/h3/rjvKvPiegs_qeWqHDxH0DfynCoOIt2C6v_DYKLSV1_s)**

She approached the group and asked them if they were “doing reconnaissance. | | Friend, This past weekend we remembered the three year anniversary of the January 6th attack. Our opponent, Congresswoman Lauren Boebert was among those complicit in the planning of the attack, and in the days leading up to the attack on the Capitol took groups of MAGA supporters on reconnaissance tours of the Capitol helping them to identify entrances and weak points in the building's security. | More than 174 Capitol police officers were injured and at least 15 were hospitalized and DC officer Brian Sicknick was killed defending the same entrances that Boebert showed to her MAGA tour groups. Boebert never faced any consequence for these tours and even went so far as to deny medals to the brave Capitol Police Officers who defended the building that day. Making matters worse she made reference to her involvement in these events as a way to harass a group of Jewish visitors to the Capitol . | In 2022, while traversing the Capitol, Lauren Boebert encountered a large group of Jewish citizens that included Rabbis and Orthodox Jews with traditional beards and yarmulkes. She approached the group and asked them if they were “doing reconnaissance.” While she played it off as a joke, Boebert and her compatriots traffic heavily in anti-semitism and are constantly trying to find new conspiracies to pin on Jews. Such as when Boebert’s partner in crime Marjorie Taylor Greene claimed “Jewish Space Lasers” started wildfires in California. Coming up with a new conspiracy that Jews are conducting recon tours and spying on the Capitol is nothing new for divisive people like Boebert. In her brief time in Congress, Lauren Boebert has alienated just about every group imaginable through her insensitive and inflammatory rhetoric. In her new district she is seen as an outsider and is more vulnerable than ever, which is why we need you to support her Democratic challenger Ike McCorkle. ## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YwBtKTPvlRR9jQAGMsyY2g~~/AARclAA~-nGXIiLmRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~ "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Get matched with up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| Your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [ ](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gyojGZ6bZnYEOsaWmzerOw~~/AARclAA~~)
---
|
---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the right fit for you.](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gyojGZ6bZnYEOsaWmzerOw~~/AARclAA~~)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, it can seem daunting to choose one. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/YwBtKTPvlRR9jQAGMsyY2g~~/AARclAA~-nGXIiLmRUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to work towards a comfortable retirement.

[See how Vanguard, Fidelity and Schwab stack up »](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/gyojGZ6bZnYEOsaWmzerOw~~/AARclAA~~)
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Try this no-cost tool to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.

This article contains links to SmartAsset’s financial advisor matching tool, which may or may not match you with the firms mentioned in this profile. The matching tool does not include all available advisors and firms and matches based on specific criteria (investable assets, geography, and willingness to work with a remote advisor). This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. name: Rhena Hicks
subject: Session starts this week!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Friends-
The 2024 legislative session starts Wednesday!
Reflecting on 2023, we're proud of the work we put into all of these bills. The passing of the Affordable Energy Act was a huge step towards tackling the high cost of utility bills. We worked hard and fought for many issues last year, and learned so much in the process.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMMP/1/85567/images/2023%20Session%20Rewind.png]
In 2024, we're prepared to fight for the passage of bills that make life more affordable for Virginians like a Prescription Drug Affordability Board, paid sick leave, affordable housing, and more! These issues have been prominent in Virginia and we won’t stop advocating until there are solutions. We’re excited to share our 2024 progress with you throughout the session!
https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA [https://www.facebook.com/TeamFreedomVA] https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa [https://twitter.com/TeamFreedomVa] https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva [https://instagram.com/teamfreedomva]
Paid for by Freedom Virginia, Inc.

Norfolk, VA 23513
United States

name: Team Mondaire
subject: 2023 Report
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
With just 10 months until Election Day, we’re as energized and optimistic as ever.
Team,

It's hard to believe, but there are just 10 months until Election Day! And while we have the fight of our lives ahead of us, we are feeling as energized and optimistic as ever.

That’s because of _you_ and the power of this grassroots team. Mondaire says it all the time: this election isn’t about one candidate or one race—it’s about building a _movement_ by and for everyday people. **It’s about creating a better future for the many.**

Since the launch of Mondaire’s campaign, this team has stepped up in a massive way to do exactly that. In just the first six months of this campaign, thousands of grassroots donors have chipped in, hundreds of volunteers have signed up to donate their time, and countless supporters have used their voices to propel Mondaire’s message forward.

Here’s a look at what this team has built so far:
* **223 volunteers** have already signed up to make calls and knock on doors
* **2,957 grassroots donors** have chipped in
* **153 organizations and leaders** have officially endorsed Mondaire

The growth of this campaign has been inspiring, and the amazing thing is, we’re just getting started. Our grassroots movement is growing stronger by the day. If we keep up this kind of momentum, MAGA Republicans won’t stand a chance in November.

A better future is possible—but we have to fight with our heart and soul to make it happen. **We need you in this movement.**

Here are two ways to help right now:

[**Donate. Any amount gives us momentum and helps ensure Mondaire will have what it takes to flip NY-17 and retake our majority in November.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76726050/448280702/-460793036?refcode=em24_240108_wrapup_fndd_gq_act___TM_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240108_wrapup_fndd_gq_act___TM_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=c586a5a4-79ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTg2YTVhNC03OWFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j_P3Ed-53z0gvPzR4mCl0lCh_-mFzoKp9HZErZw9FCA=)

clean_body: With just 10 months until Election Day, we’re as energized and optimistic as ever. Team, It's hard to believe, but there are just 10 months until Election Day! And while we have the fight of our lives ahead of us, we are feeling as energized and optimistic as ever. That’s because of you and the power of this grassroots team. Mondaire says it all the time: this election isn’t about one candidate or one race—it’s about building a movement by and for everyday people. It’s about creating a better future for the many. Since the launch of Mondaire’s campaign, this team has stepped up in a massive way to do exactly that. In just the first six months of this campaign, thousands of grassroots donors have chipped in, hundreds of volunteers have signed up to donate their time, and countless supporters have used their voices to propel Mondaire’s message forward. Here’s a look at what this team has built so far: 223 volunteers have already signed up to make calls and knock on doors 2,957 grassroots donors have chipped in 153 organizations and leaders have officially endorsed Mondaire The growth of this campaign has been inspiring, and the amazing thing is, we’re just getting started. Our grassroots movement is growing stronger by the day. If we keep up this kind of momentum, MAGA Republicans won’t stand a chance in November. A better future is possible—but we have to fight with our heart and soul to make it happen. We need you in this movement.** Here are two ways to help right now: = = Thank you for being an integral part of this movement. Team Mondaire | Mondaire Jones is running for Congress to finish the work he started last term. He’s ready to fight to lower costs for residents of the Hudson Valley, defend our democracy, raise wages, and protect reproductive rights for all. And he’s doing it without a penny from corporate PACs. = = = PAID FOR BY MONDAIRE FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX #873, SLEEPY HOLLOW, NY 10591

Hello...

This could be the last email I ever send you, Friend.

But I have to be honest with you — no matter how weary I am about opening up.

**Right now, the odds are stacked against us, and I need to know how you’ll react to this email to understand how to move forward. Your response could change everything.**

My name is Jim Banks. If you haven’t heard of me, I’m an Afghanistan veteran from Indiana now serving in Congress.

I worked hard to serve my community alongside my wife, Amanda. And above all, I am a father to three amazing girls.

**Now, I am also a Senate candidate in a crucial race in Indiana. The outcome of this election will determine if we can take back the Senate.**

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won’t let them win so easily.

[**That’s why I’m reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=3191701a6afe41838efdbd569428bded&_e=15igaiywx3uIglPVpFvJmQ3PQ0PuY1v10rv5w6i982oSeluONZOqwH4uTUUEgeeXWXHx2eXYwZ57YPdBeuOpKFyE2W3QdZeX-JsYwO9pvXYUFYZ1f2CcGrPvghksxrOS_0St1QkGMmUuxaiLASbwYIuEDVEopIPhzEnwgRa3t2vzbpZs5hgzmRQ99F8AlcCWRkXPTzU3wH0JdS0uXfY32Hw7JFk_OSQKLeN-7qDzHyKy_x2nzZ0VgGlEW7hL0xMxsOzVw8rhfFesiuij_-XACg_Mi78Zoe4JWh0Naii2piy1MWrM0P_GuI0CgGuK3tKynkO5ICDlAWi7SfmgZEu9G8cl0jUtRKCWf9F2-MhwgxIsN52zQqUlQskFmwXWo9I55u9AAQ8rScFUUVfAicUvnQ%3D%3D)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76726669/448282572/571933754?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.08_B1_Reintro_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmJiNzQwYi03YmFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XPQB7I2r9Y3bU2XF89dANPR7qUl4VNvwBzm64wus_hg=) **Team, I've proudly taken up the title of 'unicorn' for working across the aisle – because it's become unheard of in our country's polarized brand of politics.** [**I want to tell you more about this, but can I first ask you to chip in any amount to help our campaign win reelection and keep our must-hold district blue?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76726670/448282573/571933754?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.08_B1_Reintro_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmJiNzQwYi03YmFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XPQB7I2r9Y3bU2XF89dANPR7qUl4VNvwBzm64wus_hg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76726671/448282574/571933754?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.01.08_B1_Reintro_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNmJiNzQwYi03YmFlLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XPQB7I2r9Y3bU2XF89dANPR7qUl4VNvwBzm64wus_hg=) My record stems back to when I worked in Florida's legislature. In the wake of the horrific shooting at my alma mater, Marjory Stoneman Douglas High School, I fought to pass gun safety legislation. It took working with our state's Republican governor and the GOP majority in the legislature – **but we got it done.** After being an outspoken critic of much of the Florida GOP's agenda in the legislature, I was still asked to become our state's Director of Emergency Management. We worked hard to mitigate disasters, and when record-level hurricanes ripped through our state, I led the recovery effort. It took negotiation and persistence to secure the funding that impacted communities needed to rebuild. **I got it done.** And when voters in my district sent me to Congress, they already knew what type of leader they were getting: one dedicated to serving them and fighting like hell on the issues they care deeply about. That's why, even in the wake of this Republican House Majority being one of the most unproductive and dysfunctional in our country's history, I still led the charge to pass legislation on reaffirming Israel's right to exist, keeping Iran's global influence at bay, and promoting Holocaust education. And if you couldn't have guessed by now, it took working across the aisle to make it happen. **We're getting sh*t done.** I've learned in my career that despite our (sometimes stark) differences in policy, Democratic issues are important to our daily lives, and we can all work together. And if being bipartisan makes me a 'unicorn,' heck, that's a title I’m proud to have. [**But 2024 will be a tough election year, and my record of success makes me an even bigger target for far-right MAGA Republicans. name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: I'm running to defend democracy, just like I did on January 6
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
|
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76726903/448283380/-1538229440?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240108_1_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2MjI3ODk1LTdjYWUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lu7UCdxo1OsZH2qNKLBEkQx9uhxtRKm7mUOgxTZlmNk=)

Hey Peter, it's Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee.

I've got an important announcement: **I'm hoping to make my return to DC – but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional district in the U.S. House.**

[I’m counting on your support to get there. Can you split a donation between this campaign and Defeat Republicans to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76726904/448283381/-1538229440?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240108_1_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2MjI3ODk1LTdjYWUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lu7UCdxo1OsZH2qNKLBEkQx9uhxtRKm7mUOgxTZlmNk=)
| **[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/76726905/448283382/-1538229440?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240108_1_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2MjI3ODk1LTdjYWUtZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lu7UCdxo1OsZH2qNKLBEkQx9uhxtRKm7mUOgxTZlmNk=)**
---

Here’s the thing Peter, I _never_ thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. _(I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!)_

But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself.

So when I put on my Capitol police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol,_it felt right._

But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol.

I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: **_we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists._**

clean_body: | = Hey Peter, it's Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee. I've got an important announcement: I'm hoping to make my return to DC – but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional district in the U.S. House. = | = Here’s the thing Peter, I never thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!) But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself. So when I put on my Capitol police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol,it felt right. But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol. I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. = = = = = Let's do it, Harry Dunn ****** **** **** **** **** ****** Defeat Republicans | Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www.DefeatRepublicans.org) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: One Of The HARDEST Questions To Answer...
body:
This Is A Tough One Have you ever done the right thing and then had the wrong thing happen to you? One of the real struggles we face is answering wh
| | [](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1759.1.cad7e66994f9a92c9739a1096897aff5) |
---
## This Is A Tough One
---
Have you ever done the **right thing** and then had the **wrong thing** happen to you? One of the real struggles we face is answering why Christians (_who love God and love people_) experience **suffering** in life. This previous WKND at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1760.1.ee274b5712d147185f1be5162235cab9) Tulsa & OKC, I addressed that very complicated question from the passage of **Acts 8:1-4**. I think this message will help you in REAL life. Watch it here: [The Book Of Acts Pt. 30 - Why People Suffer](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1761.1.a8015968f186fe2ea9f8ff4b88d38af3) Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1762.1.7309b47c1d810ff285001dbba6014458), GAB, [Facebook](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1763.1.b6d1d5390f1c8b266f0534bb173d6793), [Instagram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1764.1.472853c06df33db1c82d05b0f0ba490c), [Twitter](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1765.1.a4c4e219c02e0cc5487d39e5d66ae5ed), [Telegram](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1766.1.c2e004a43a6387f04029fff71c414aff), GETTR & [YouTube](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1767.1.ea8bc58a225cbb40d56b82f96c1c5139)). [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1768.1.de6ff0b9dc2d3c6f9d3d3a2f06d9afe0)
---
| | [ Partner w/Sheridan.Church In 2024 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1769.1.b0b53ee9a526905adb99a0cba35179ac)
---
---
## Upcoming Event Hosted At Sheridan.Church
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1770.1.18c065f425fa6d55e595e085ab001c14)
---
For 60 years people have asked: **WHO REALLY KILLED JFK?** _Movies_ , _books_ , _blogs_ and _government reports_ have all tried to answer the daunting question. One person who has put forth more evidence than anyone I know in answering this question is **Roger Stone** who has written a **New York Times Bestseller** answering who really killed JFK. **Roger Stone** is coming to Tulsa, OK for a _SPECIAL 2 Hour Event_ to lay out the evidence of who he believes killed JFK. There will also be a **LIVE Q &A session with Mr. Stone**. **When** : Thursday, February 1 | 6:30 pm **Where** : [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1771.1.d85abbdbf2b4f5547a1568e0a8d90903) | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK 74145 **MUST RSVP** : [www.sheridan.church/events](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1772.1.c7531049c8e68fb19d6c7089aeae4ddb)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1773.1.8a5e76b30ef754fdbfcc4c818ceb524b) Roger J. Stone
---
**Roger Stone** is a seasoned political operative, speaker, pundit, and New York Times Bestselling Author featured in the **Netflix documentary Get Me Roger Stone**.
**Richard Nixon** , **Ronald Reagan** , and **Donald Trump** —all of these Presidents relied on **Roger Stone** to secure their seat in the Oval Office. In a 45-year career in American politics, Stone has worked on over 700 campaigns for public office.
| | [ Click Here For Tickets To The Roger Stone Event ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1774.1.bd7429274eb753359c136178e6c8a3fe)
---
---
## What To Do To Be Ready For 2024
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1775.1.181ce0807a9262f168801afb6b800b70)
---
I am _not a prophet neither the son of the prophet_ but I am willing to bet the farm that 2024 will be **WILD**! The **Deep State Globalists** will pull out all the stops in this upcoming election year just like in 2020. The question then becomes: **what should we do to be ready for 2024?** I preached about this subject on Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1776.1.7f1b85c466f8cb355c546a4940f509e8) and I encourage you to check it out because it will help prepare you for what is coming. Watch the [sermon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1777.1.61ad3d0471b843f35180e5ed036e0e4f) here: [https://youtube.com/live/YG782xgZ_y8?feature=share](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1778.1.7c3df1586c5d2dc3fec03ecb9b036b2a) If you are looking for a church in 2024 know that you are invited to join me at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1779.1.60fa78d19fc1548874c8d604e188093c) Tulsa & OKC **Sundays @10am | 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK** **Sundays @6pm | 3100 N Meridian OKC, OK** Let's start 2024 _STRONG_! You can also partner with [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1780.1.d4f086211545133f75fa808185e4e4c4) by making a donation at [www.sheridan.church/give](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1781.1.71731a714c8f639ec3d4fdbb53be5958)
---
| | [ Read Through The Bible In 2024 ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1782.1.f65c025fe891d16cc0e4407f501c5fb4)
---
| [ ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1783.1.afdd8cd98fc00bf4ff259bf515abf360)
---
Join the [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1784.1.2500943c493d39718714f7a614130e8f) family in reading through the **ENTIRE** Bible in 2024.
Click the QR code or visit: [Sheridan's Bible Reading Plan](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1785.1.6049098f58af1a8831f3ae92030e1da7)
---
## This Will Benefit You More Than You Know!
---
Right now, **Biblical ILLITERACY** is at an _all-time high_ in America. Fewer than half of all adults can name the four Gospel writers. In a recent **LifeWay Research** study, the Bible reading habits among church attendees was shocking:
\- 19% read the Bible everyday
\- 26% read the Bible a few times per week
\- 14% read the Bible once a week
\- 22% read the Bible once a month
\- 18% read the Bible rarely or never In general, American Christians have a poor foundation in the Word of God. This is a major problem and is the reason why I decided to launch [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1786.1.788b965dfca21fa8346543cb469d4ee2). I want to encourage you to consider [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1787.1.084e840997263029b2df07db41755a71) as a means for you to grow in your faith and go from a convert to a true disciple. [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1788.1.0df4bb6ba3a319f02d2416aa1a9fb93d) is a 2 year intensive program consisting of 24 courses divided between 4 semesters. Classes are offered in-person & online (you can LITERALLY watch anytime from anywhere). _"Study to show yourself approved to God, a worker who does not need to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth"_ \- **2 Timothy 2:15** Enrolling in [Sheridan Bible College](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1789.1.b724b2935c0006f62918b66621684882) is not something you will regret. We have intentionally made tuition VERY inexpensive: $300 per semester. **Spring 2024 Semester Courses** :
\- Hebrews & The General Epistles
\- 5-Fold Ministry
\- 7 Churches Of Revelation
\- Pentateuch (First 5 Books of the Bible)
\- Johannine Literature (Gospel & Letters of John)
\- Helps Ministry Classes for the Spring 2024 Semester begin January 18. Enroll today at [www.sheridan.church/biblecollege](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=5165412.1790.1.df6ac940bf98d0a59da3aa001d6c1b41)
---

body:
I wanted to follow up because your support is crucial to us, and we're in the home stretch of a critical moment.

[|
---](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/sdbvn4uSB7gCI1NyJz3rVQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnfwxoP0QeaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cubGF0ZWVmYWhzaW1vbi5jb20vVwNzcGNCCmWYbYecZdut0GdSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAR)
| | Hey Friend, I hope this message finds you well. I'm sure you caught our last email, and I wanted to follow up because your support is crucial to us, and we're in the home stretch of a critical moment. As we dive into this election year, the enthusiasm and commitment from supporters like you are what keep us going. However, I have a little update – we didn't quite hit our digital fundraising goal as we closed out the final FEC quarter of 2023. [But instead of panicking we choose to do what we have always done on this campaign: grasp a moment of adversity to rally together and emerge even stronger.](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/mN6vKdojm6URDkgd6dH6Rg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnfwxoP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDgtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZhth5xl263QZ1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~) [In the spirit of turning challenges into triumphs, I set a new ONE WEEK GOAL: $2,000. It's a bold target, but I know the power of our community, and I believe we can achieve this together.](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/mN6vKdojm6URDkgd6dH6Rg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnfwxoP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDgtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZhth5xl263QZ1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~) Your support is instrumental in this journey. Picture the impact we can make – from organizing grassroots events to connecting with voters eager to join our vibrant team. Your contribution, no matter the size, will directly contribute to our success. Ready to be part of the solution? [[Click here](http://numerolinks.lateefahsimon.com/f/a/mN6vKdojm6URDkgd6dH6Rg~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRnfwxoP0Q7aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2xzLWVtYWlsP3JlZmNvZGU9SmFuMDgtMjRXA3NwY0IKZZhth5xl263QZ1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABE~)] to contribute and help us reach our $2,000 goal. Thank you for being a rock star supporter. We're genuinely grateful for your commitment, and I can't wait to see what we accomplish together in 2024. Let’s go! Lateefah

disclaimer_text:

KEVIN LINCOLN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’ve identified CA-9 as a seat we can flip from blue to red and grow our majority, and Kevin Lincoln is the conservative who can get that done. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=eb0c586a10a345068fa802c02a5f166e&_t=cpGHboO5pzX_HroRIDiyE5qPqtil6Y2ksERhPchuDbTkM9KyRfZQYkyuDlFBzuwrmKCcjcXU0QexswfnlqUI1mfm_i-L4pQyzvdoPxni64c%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=eb0c586a10a345068fa802c02a5f166e&_t=cpGHboO5pzX_HroRIDiyE5qPqtil6Y2ksERhPchuDbTkM9KyRfZQYkyuDlFBzuwrmKCcjcXU0QexswfnlqUI1mfm_i-L4pQyzvdoPxni64c%3D)
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eb0c586a10a345068fa802c02a5f166e&_e=MvcoWDF9Zk_5SX7Tt6YZDmDyqGXOh-2i2LwggNRvypWC-6SYlBHxJ1qX7EZuYC-W4E21hobxqssEuw-mB3Oe3OSIWPdR-XSHu2Zj4sCFtu5jHzb_PsPPMPXrGV3TcWJS_vFv_uQCLfsqQqbfPiUW8rtsg8JCjtuibgyo1W1YlfeHp2z7qP2RSpEGX47tmhFs0NTYBhuoj537nLrl5ar-amZo4CQs6hE0KZFoW85LoXQCRDOxuREWiNpIu7MTZGqYps-ANqE2gcSVK52GsUOPKbdHC4IVEy1s--bM5uF9oz5Ak3gHiqzjid1hpDMYAHVo6iDtNGjIrlky48hxGLBqzXUzga7n0tHQcz1bT8R2HYkVyucf9YxFiCR-9O9N_LMS6uqE0h-KVEmgavCWFm5zU1JG2yOyJdxctTDe5qIC6Ow%3D)
Peter,

As your new Speaker, one of my top priorities will continue to be electing Republicans and expanding our majority in the House.

That’s why I’m asking you to support _**Kevin Lincoln**_ in California’s 9th District – **one of our top pick-up opportunities in 2024.**

Kevin has already proven he can win tough fights – he currently serves as a **Republican mayor** in one of California’s largest Democrat-leaning cities.

He’s also a **U.S. Marine Corps veteran** who had the distinction of protecting the president while serving on the Marine One aircraft in the aftermath of 9/11.

**Kevin is the exact kind of leader and fighter I want serving with us in the House.[Will you support his campaign with a contribution of $25 or another amount today?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eb0c586a10a345068fa802c02a5f166e&_e=MvcoWDF9Zk_5SX7Tt6YZDmDyqGXOh-2i2LwggNRvypWC-6SYlBHxJ1qX7EZuYC-W4E21hobxqssEuw-mB3Oe3OSIWPdR-XSHu2Zj4sCFtu5jHzb_PsPPMPXrGV3TcWJS_vFv_uQCLfsqQqbfPiUW8rtsg8JCjtuibgyo1W1YlfeHp2z7qP2RSpEGX47tmhFs0NTYBhuoj537nLrl5ar-amZo4CQs6hE0KZFoW85LoXQCRDOxuREWiNpIu7MTZGqYps-ANqE2gcSVK52GsUOPKSE9i15fq91avTFXDwiKSBA2b7X6ykb_yKIO3eVwdpciWR4X5HgUQ0Qt5lfEjDVyOOp9AbF_o7mA7PE783sas2etcbdX1KqHMDzRY1fGVxOg4Lv6SaHWVoD8-C2EIWp01OBAZREn0VHbOgfwm8EEmdU%3D)**

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=eb0c586a10a345068fa802c02a5f166e&_e=MvcoWDF9Zk_5SX7Tt6YZDmDyqGXOh-2i2LwggNRvypWC-6SYlBHxJ1qX7EZuYC-W4E21hobxqssEuw-mB3Oe3OSIWPdR-XSHu2Zj4sCFtu5jHzb_PsPPMPXrGV3TcWJS_vFv_uQCLfsqQqbfPiUW8rtsg8JCjtuibgyo1W1YlfeHp2z7qP2RSpEGX47tmhFs0NTYBhuoj537nLrl5ar-amZo4CQs6hE0KZFoW85LoXQCRDOxuREWiNpIu7MTZGqYps-ANqE2gcSVK52GsUOPKaMUCOOiVTPLc59r22OMqVIDtIHHGrANuLw0FV7RLR2Ps87cylrd2vV0BIG365Bm5omBC5cAPMPH6gQ4WuxTgsiRFD-7-5wuIIsD81TxA0teGCM2rHaQscGhWI0cQDNK32nNofvukjiQ_TCsp3MYhtw%3D)
We’ve identified CA-9 as a seat we can **flip from blue to red** and grow our majority, and Kevin Lincoln is the conservative who can get that done.

But as this will be a tough fight against a well-funded, entrenched Democrat incumbent, Kevin needs all the support you can give him.

_**Mike Johnson**_
Speaker of the House

| **Meet Kevin Lincoln
**
My name is Kevin Lincoln, and my story, is the Valley’s story. I am a 3rd generation Stocktonian, raising a 4th generation in the city I love. I’m the grandson of Mexican immigrants, and my stepfather is an Army veteran.

Like many Stocktonians, my family has overcome economic setbacks. My own father struggled to survive on these streets, and was at one time, homeless. But I never let adversity define me. I joined the Marines and served in the White House Military Office, assigned to Marine One. I graduated college while working full-time and raising a family. I’ve worked in corporate America and served our community as a pastor, and as a non-profit leader.

I’m blessed with a beautiful wife, Bonnie, and two amazing children. I’ve lived a life of service, but the greatest honor of my life has been giving back to my community, through serving as Mayor of my hometown, Stockton.

body:
